Exodus12:1 Izipt gam sungah Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
Exodus12:2 “Tu kha in note' adingin kum kipatna hi ding hi; note' adingin kum khat sungah a kha masa hi ding hi.

Exodus12:4 ganno khat’ adingin innkuan a tawm luat leh mipa khat in ama' inn zom a vengte tawh a mi tawh kituakin la ding hi; a mi tamna leh a nek zah uh tawh kizui-in ganno man pia ding uh hi.
Exodus12:5 Na ganno uh a sitbang lo hi ding a
Exodus12:6 tua pen

Exodus12:8 Amaute in tua zanin a sa hangin ne ding uh hi; silngo sawhloh anlum leh a kha mehteh tawh amaute in ne ding uh hi.
Exodus12:9 A sate mun khat peuhpeuhah a sial ahi a
Exodus12:10 Zingsang dong a khing na omsak kei ding uh a
Exodus12:11 Hih bang zia-in na ne ding uh hi: na kawng uh gakin
Exodus12:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in tua zanin Izipt gam ka nawk ding a
Exodus12:13 Note’ omna inn tunga sisan in note adingin lim hi ding hi; sisan ka muh ciangin note kong paisan ding a
Exodus12:14 “Hih ni in note adingin phawkna ni hi ding hi
Exodus12:15 Note in ni sagih sung silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh hi; a ni masa ni-in note in na inn panun silngo na hemkhia ding uh hi
Exodus12:16 A ni masa ni-in note in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a
Exodus12:17 Note in silngo sawhloh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi
Exodus12:18 Kha masa
Exodus12:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh ni sagih sung na inn sung uh-ah silngo kimu lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat peuh
Exodus12:20 Silngo a kisawh peuhmah nane kei ding uh hi; na omna khempeuh uh-ah silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh hi
Exodus12:21 Tua ciangin Moses in Israel upate khempeuh samin amaute' kiangah
Exodus12:22 Puknah lom khat la un la
Exodus12:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Izipt mite that dingin Topa in hong nawk ding hi; amah in bangtungzawl leh kongkhak khuam nih tunga sisan a muh ciangin Topa in kongkhak paisan ding a
Exodus12:24 Note leh na tapate in hih pen biakna ngeina kip-in na nei tawntung ding uh hi.

Exodus12:27 note in

Exodus12:30 Tua zanin Faro leh a nasemte khempeuh leh Izipt mite khempeuh tho uh hi; Izipt gam sungah kahna lianpi om hi
Exodus12:31 Amah in Moses leh Aaron zan sap a
Exodus12:32 Na gensa bangun na tuuhonte uh leh na bawnghonte uh la un la
Exodus12:33 Tua gam panin mite manlangin a sawl khiat nading uh-ah Izipt mite nawhtat mahmah uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in
Exodus12:34 Tua ahih ciangin mite in silngo sawh nai loh a annel lom uh la-in
Exodus12:35 Moses in amaute' tunga a gen bangin Israel mite zong gamta uh hi
Exodus12:36 amau’ ngette a piak nadingun Topa in Izipt mite’ muhna-ah mite maipha pia hi. Tua bangin amaute in Izipt mite’ na sut uh hi.
Exodus12:37 Israel mite numei leh naupang kisim loin pasal tul za guk Rameses panin Sukkoth-ah khe-in pai uh hi.
Exodus12:38 Minam dang tampi leh tuuhon leh bawnghon
Exodus12:39 Izipt panin a ken’ uh annel lom panin amaute in silngo sawhloh moh em uh hi
Exodus12:40 Israel mite Izipt-ah a om uh hun sung in kum za li leh kum sawmthum ahi hi.
Exodus12:41 Kum za li leh kum sawmthum a cin’ ni teekteekin Izipt leitang panin Topa ’ mihonpite paikhia uh hi.
Exodus12:42 Amaute Izipt leitang panin a paikhiatpih nadingin hih in Topa ’ zan vilna ahi hi; tua mah bangin Israel mite khempeuh in amau khang tawntungin Topa ’ adingin hih zan mah zan vilna-in nei uh hi.
Exodus12:43 Topa in Moses leh Aaron' kiangah
Exodus12:44 ahih hangin sum tawh a kilei sila peuhmah in a vun na at khit uh ciangin ne thei ding hi.
Exodus12:45 Peemta hita leh a kicial nasem hita leh in ne thei lo ding hi.
Exodus12:46 Inn khat sungah kine ding hi; inn pua-ah a sa na paikhiatpih kei ding uh hi; a guh na kuaitan kei ding uh hi.
Exodus12:47 Israel mihon khempeuhin hih ding uh hi.
Exodus12:48 Khual mi khat note' kiangah hong peem a
Exodus12:49 Gam mi leh note' lakah hong peem khual mi’ adingin ngeina khat bek om ding hi
Exodus12:50 Tua bangin Israel mite khempeuh in hih uh hi; Topa in Moses leh Aaron a thupiak bangin amaute in hih uh hi.
Exodus12:51 Tua ni teekteekin Topa in Israel mite a honpi-un Izipt gam panin paikhiatpih hi.

Exodus25:38 A taitehte leh a kuangte kham citak hi ding hi.
Exodus25:39 Kham citak talen khat tawh hih nazatte khempeuh kibawl ding hi.

Exodus26:1 “Tua tham loin a kop-a kikhuk khau hoih tawh kigan dalna puan sawm leh a dum

Exodus28:5 “Amaute in kham

Exodus40:30 Amah in kikhopna buk leh biakna tau kikal-ah kisilna kuang koih a
Exodus40:31 Moses leh Aaron leh a tapate in amau’ khut leh a khete uh tua tui tawh sil uh hi;
Exodus40:32 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin amaute kikhopna bukah a pai ciang leh biakna tau nai-ah a pai uh ciangin amaute kisil uh hi.
Exodus40:33 Amah in biakbuk leh biakna tau kiim-ah a buk tual bawl a
Exodus40:34 Tua ciangin meii in kikhopna buk tuam a
Exodus40:35 A tungah meii a omna hangin kikhopna buk sungah Moses tum thei lo a
Exodus40:36 A khualzin sung tawntung uh biakbuk tung panin meii a kilakkhiat toh peuhpeuh ciangin Israel mite mai lam nawtin pai uh hi;
Exodus40:37 ahih hangin meii a kilakkhiat kei leh a kilakkhiat ni mateng amaute paikhia lo uh hi.
Exodus40:38 Bang hang hiam cih leh a khualzin sung tawntung uh Israel mi khempeuh' muhna-ah biakbuk tungah sunin Topa ’ meii omin
Leviticus1:1 Topa in Moses samin
Leviticus1:2 “Israel mite tungah gen in la
Leviticus1:3 “Ama biakna in bawnghon panin meihal biakna ahih leh
Leviticus1:4 amah in meihal biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga ding a
Leviticus1:5 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Topa ’ mai-ah a bawngtal go ding hi; Aaron’ suan siampite in a si hong paipihin
Leviticus1:6 Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna ganhing a vun hawk-in semnen ding hi;
Leviticus1:7 tua ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite in biakna tau tungah mei koihin
Leviticus1:8 tua ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite in a sanente
Leviticus1:9 ahih hangin a sungkuate leh a khete tui tawh sil ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in mei tawh kihal biakna
Leviticus1:10 “Meihal biak nadingin ama letsong in tuu hita leh keel hita leh a hon lak panin ahih leh
Leviticus1:11 tua ciangin amah in Topa ’ mai biakna tau tung leilu lam pangah go ding a
Leviticus1:12 Tua ciangin amah in semnen ding a
Leviticus1:13 ahih hangin a sungkuate leh a khete amah in tui tawh sil ding hi. Siampipa in a vekpi-in pia-in
Leviticus1:14 “ Topa tungah ama biakna in vasa tawh meihal biakna ahih leh
Leviticus1:15 Tua ciangin siampipa in biakna tau-ah paipihin a lu heektat ding a
Leviticus1:16 amah in a tangkhai leh a multe botkhia-in
Leviticus1:17 amah in a khate-in balkeek ding a
Leviticus2:1 “Mi khatpeuh in Topa tungah biakna-in an tawh biakna hong paipih leh
Leviticus2:2 tua ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite kiangah paipih ding hi. Tua ciangin amah in annel khut dim khat leh sathau
Leviticus2:3 An tawh biakna a val teng pen Aaron leh a tapate ading hi ding hi; tua in Topa ’ tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangthopen ahi hi.
Leviticus2:4 “Nangmah in biak nadingin meibung sunga ki-em an tawh biakna na paipih ciangin
Leviticus2:5 Na biakna in belpei dai tunga ki-em an tawh biakna ahih leh
Leviticus2:6 nang in bal nenin a tungah sathau na sung ding hi; tua in an tawh biakna ahi hi.
Leviticus2:7 Na biakna in sikbel dai sunga kihuan an tawh biakna ahih leh
Leviticus2:8 Nangmah in hih nate tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna Topa kiangah na paipih ding hi; tua pen siampipa kiangah a kipaipih ciangin amah in biakna tau-ah paipih ding hi.
Leviticus2:9 Siampipa in an tawh biakna panin a phawkna biakna teng la-in
Leviticus2:10 An tawh biakna a val teng pen Aaron leh a tapate ading hi ding hi; tua in Topa tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangtho pen ahi hi.
Leviticus2:11 “ Topa ’ tungah na paipih an tawh biakna in silngo tawh kibawl lo ding hi; bang hang hiam na cih leh silngo hita leh khuaizu khatpeuh peuh hita leh Topa ’ tungah meihal biakna-in na hal kei ding hi.
Leviticus2:12 Anpal tawh biakna ahih leh Topa ’ kiangah na paipih thei ding hi; ahih hangin a gim namtui dingin biakna tau tungah kipia lo ding hi.
Leviticus2:13 An tawh na biaknate khempeuh ci na sawh ding hi; an tawh na biakna-ah na Pasian tawh na thuciamna ci hel loin na om kei ding hi; na biakna khempeuh ci tawh na pia ding hi.
Leviticus2:14 “Anpal tawh Topa tungah biakna na piak leh
Leviticus2:15 Nang in a tungah sathau sungin
Leviticus2:16 Siampipa in phawk nadingin a kigawivui an pawlkhat leh a sathau leh a paknamtui khempeuh hal ding hi; tua in Topa tungah meihal biakna ahi hi.
Leviticus3:1 “Mi khat’ biakna in thunuam-a biakna ahih a
Leviticus3:2 Tua ciangin amah in a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk kongah go ding hi; tua ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding hi.
Leviticus3:3 Thunuam-a biakna panin Topa tungah mei tawh biakna-in amah in a gilpi tuam a thaute leh asungkuate tunga a om a thau khempeuh tawh
Leviticus3:4 a kawng-a om a kal nihte athau leh a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding hi.
Leviticus3:5 Tua ciangin Aaron’ suante in singkuang tunga om meihal biakpiakna tau tung mah ah hal ding uh hi; tua in Topa adingin a gim namtui
Leviticus3:6 “ Topa tungah thunuam-a a piak ding ama biakna in tuu leh keelhonte sung panin anu hita leh apa hita leh ganhing khat ahi leh
Leviticus3:7 Amah in a biak nadingin tuuno khat a piak leh
Leviticus3:8 a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai-ah tua ganhing go ding hi; tua ciangin Aaron’ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi.
Leviticus3:9 Tua ciangin thunuam-a biakna panin Topa tungah meihal biakna in amah in a thau
Leviticus3:10 a kawng-a om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus3:11 Tua ciangin siampipa in Topa tungah mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi.
Leviticus3:12 “Ama biakna in keel ahih leh
Leviticus3:13 a lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai-ah go ding hi; tua ciangin Aaron’ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi.
Leviticus3:14 Tua ciangin amah in tua sung panin Topa tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in a piak dingin a gilpi tuam a thau leh a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh
Leviticus3:15 a kawng-a om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus3:16 Tua ciangin siampipa in a gim namtui dingin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. A thau khempeuh Topa’ aa ahi hi.
Leviticus3:17 Tua in na khang tawntungun na ten’na khempeuh uhah note in a thau leh a si na nek loh nadingun a tawntungin ngeina kip hi ding hi
Leviticus4:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus4:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih lo ding ci-in Topa in a thupiakte khatpeuh peuh mi khatpeuh in theih lohna hangin khial a
Leviticus4:3 a khialpa pen sathau a kinilh siampipa ahih a
Leviticus4:4 Amah in Topa mai kikhopna buk kongah bawngtal paipihin
Leviticus4:5 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in bawngtal si tawmkhat la-in
Leviticus4:6 tua ciangin siampipa in si sungah a khutme diahin
Leviticus4:7 Tua ciangin siampipa in kikhopna buk sung Topa mai-a om paknamtui biakna tau kite
Leviticus4:8 Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal thau khempeuh a gilpi tuam a thau leh a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh
Leviticus4:9 a kawng-a om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus4:10 (thunuam biakna bawngtal panin hihte a kilak mah bangin) la ding a
Leviticus4:11 Ahih hangin bawngtal vun leh a sa khempeuh
Leviticus4:12 a bawngtal buppi puakhia-in vut kibuakna
Leviticus4:13 “Israel mihonte khempeuh in theih lohna hangin khialhna khat gamta-in tua pen mihonte in a phawk kei a
Leviticus4:14 amau’ gamtatnasa khialhna a kitheih ciangin
Leviticus4:15 tua ciangin mihonte’ upate in Topa mai
Leviticus4:16 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in kikhopna bukah bawngtal sisan kimkhat paipihin
Leviticus4:17 tua ciangin siampipa in a sisan sungah a khutme diahin dalna puan mai Topa mai-ah sagih vei theh ding hi.
Leviticus4:18 Tua ciangin amah in Topa mai kikhopna buk sunga om biakna tau kite tungah a sisan kimkhat nuh ding hi; amah in kikhopna buk kongah a om meihal biakna tau bulah sisan a om lai teng sung ding hi.
Leviticus4:19 Tua ciangin amah in a thau khempeuh la-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi.
Leviticus4:20 Tua bangin a bawngtal hih ding hi; amah in khialna hanga biakna bawngtal a hihsa mah bangin hih zong hih ding hi; siampipa in amau adingin kilemna bawl sak ding hi; amaute kimaisak ding hi.
Leviticus4:21 Amah in giahphual pua-ah bawngtal puakhia ding a
Leviticus4:22 “Ukpa khat khialin
Leviticus4:23 ama gamtatnasa khialhna ama tungah a va kihilh leh
Leviticus4:24 keel lu tungah a khut nga-in
Leviticus4:25 Tua ciangin siampipa in a khutme tawh khialhna hanga biakna si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh-in
Leviticus4:26 Thunuam-a biakna sathaute mah bangin amah in biakna tau tungah a thau khempeuh hal ding hi; tua ahih ciangin siampipa in ama khialhna hangin ama adingin kilemna bawlsak ding hi; amah kimaisak ding hi.
Leviticus4:27 “Hih lo ding ci-in Topa ’ thupiakte khatpeuh peuh mi mawkmawk khat in theih lohna hangin hihin a khialh leh a mawh ahi hi.
Leviticus4:28 Ama gamtatnasa a khialhna ama tungah a va kihilh ciangin amah in a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin biak nading a sitbang lo keel a nu khat paipih ding hi.
Leviticus4:29 Amah in khialhna hanga biakna lu tungah a khut nga-in
Leviticus4:30 Siampipa in a khutme tawh a si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh ding a
Leviticus4:31 Thunuam-a biakna panin a thaute a kilakkhiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh lakhia ding a
Leviticus4:32 “Amah in khialhna hanga biakna-in a piak dingin tuuno khat a paipih leh
Leviticus4:33 khialhna hanga biakna lu tungah a khut nga-in
Leviticus4:34 Tua ciangin siampipa khialhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat a khutme tawh la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh ding a
Leviticus4:35 Thunuam-a biakpiakna panin tuuno thau a kilak khiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh lakhia ding a
Leviticus5:1 “Mi khatpeuh in teci pang dingin kiciamna za-in
Leviticus5:2 Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in gamlak ganhing nin a sisa hita leh inn ganhing nin a sisa hita leh a bokvak a nin ganhing a sisa hita leh
Leviticus5:3 Tua ahih kei leh amah in mihing nitna hita leh
Leviticus5:4 Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in asia bawl ding hita leh a pha bawl ding hita leh mite a kiciam theih ngei kiciamna nam khatpeuh peuh ama kam tawh a theih lohin a kiciam pak khak leh
Leviticus5:5 Hihte khatpeuh peuhah mi khat a mawh ciangin
Leviticus5:6 amah in mawhna biakna-in tuuhon pan ahi a
Leviticus5:7 “Ahih hangin amah in tuuno khat a piak zawh kei leh
Leviticus5:8 Amah in siampipa tungah tuate paipih ding a
Leviticus5:9 amah in khialhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat biakna tau pangah theh ding a
Leviticus5:10 Tua ciangin amah in ngeina kip om bangin meihal biak nadingin a khat pia ding hi; siampipa in a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding hi; amah kimaisak ding hi.
Leviticus5:11 “Ahih hangin amah in vakhu nih ahi a
Leviticus5:12 Amah in siampipa kiangah paipih ding a
Leviticus5:13 Tua bangin siampipa in hihte khatpeuh peuh a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding hi; amah kimaisak ding hi. An tawh biakna-a mah bangin a om lai teng siampipa’ ading ahi hi
Leviticus5:14 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus5:15 “Mi khatpeuh in theih lohna hangin thu palsatin Topa ’ na a siangtho khatpeuh peuhah a khialh leh
Leviticus5:16 Amah in a siangtho na a hih khialhna-ah lohkikna zong bawl ding a
Leviticus5:17 “Mi khatpeuh peuh in hih lo ding ci-in Topa ’ thupiakte khatpeuh peuh hihin a khialh leh
Leviticus5:18 Tuuhon lak panin a sitbang lo tuutal khat
Leviticus5:19 Tua in mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi; amah in Topa ’ mai-ah a mawh ahi hi
Leviticus6:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus6:2 “Mi khatpeuh khialin
Leviticus6:3 tua ahih kei leh a mang na khat mu-in tua thu-ah zuau-in
Leviticus6:4 mi khat khialin a mawh ciangin amah in a suhte hita leh
Leviticus6:5 a man loin a kiciamnasa na khatpeuh peuh hita leh loh ding hi; amah in a cingin lohin sehnga suah sehkhat piak beh ding a
Leviticus6:6 Tua ciangin amah in Topa tungah a mawhna hanga biakna tuuhon lak panin a sitbang lo tuutal khat
Leviticus6:7 Siampipa in Topa mai-ah ama ading kilemna bawlsak ding a
Leviticus6:8 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus6:9 “Aaron leh a tapate thu pia in la
Leviticus6:10 Siampipa in a saihadial puan silhin
Leviticus6:11 Tua ciangin amah in a puante suahin puan dang silh ding a
Leviticus6:12 Biakna tau tunga mei kikuangsak den ding hi; kimitsak lo ding hi; siampipa in zingsang simin a tungah sing cihin
Leviticus6:13 Biakna tau tungah mei kikuangsak tawntung ding hi; kimitsak lo ding hi.
Leviticus6:14 “Tua ciangin hihte in an tawh biakna ngeinate ahi hi. Aaron’ suante in biakna tau mai
Leviticus6:15 Siampipa in
Leviticus6:16 Aaron leh a tapate in a om lai teng ne ding uh hi; a siangtho mun khatah silngo sawh loh kine ding hi; kikhopna buk tual ah ne ding uh hi.
Leviticus6:17 Tua pen silngo sawh-a ki-em hilo ding hi. Meihal biakna hong kipiakna sung panin amau’ tanh dingin ka piaksa ahi hi; tua in khialhna hanga biakna leh mawhna hanga biakna bangin a siangthopen na ahi hi.
Leviticus6:18 Na khang tawntung uh adingin thu hong kipiak mah bangin
Leviticus6:19 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus6:20 “Hih in amah sathau a kinilh ni-in Aaron leh a suante in Topa tungah a piak ding biakna ahi hi; an tawh biakna ngeina bangin annel seu khat sehsawm suah sehkhat
Leviticus6:21 Tua pen belpei tung khatah sathau tawh kibawl ding hi; an tawh biakna mah bangin lim takin helsa leh balnensa-in na paipih ding a
Leviticus6:22 Aaron’ suante sung panin amah a laih dingin sathau a kinilh siampipa in
Leviticus6:23 Siampipa in an tawh a biakna peuhmah a vekpi-in kihal ding hi; kine lo ding hi
Leviticus6:24 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus6:25 “Aaron leh a tapate tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih in khialhna hanga biakna ngeina ahi hi. Meihal biakna a kigawhna mun Topa mai-ah khialhna hanga biakna kigo ding hi; tua in a siangthopen ahi hi.
Leviticus6:26 Khialhna hanga biakna a pia siampipa in ne ding hi; kikhopna buktual sung a siangtho mun khatah kine ding hi.
Leviticus6:27 A sa a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi; puan tungah a si a kitheh khak ciangin
Leviticus6:28 Tua ciangin a kihuanna leibeel kisukham ding hi; ahih hangin tau beel tawh a kihuan ahih leh a beel kikiatin tui sungah kisawp siang sitset ding hi.
Leviticus6:29 Siampite lak panin pasal peuhmah in ne thei ding uh hi; tua in a siangthopen ahi hi.
Leviticus6:30 Ahih hangin siangtho munah kilemna bawl nadingin kikhopna buk sungah a kipaipih si a kilak khiatna khialhna hanga biakna sa kine lo ding hi: tua pen mei tawh kihal ding hi.
Leviticus7:1 “Hih in mawhna hanga biakna ngeina ahi hi. A siangthopen ahi hi;
Leviticus7:2 amaute in meihal biakna a gawhna mun uhah mawhna hanga biakna go ding uh a
Leviticus7:3 Tua ciangin a thau khempeuh a mei thau
Leviticus7:4 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus7:5 Topa tungah meihal biakna-in siampipa in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi; tua in mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi.
Leviticus7:6 Siampite lakah pasal peuhmah in ne thei ding hi; a siangtho mun khatah kine ding hi; tua in a siangthopen ahi hi.
Leviticus7:7 Mawhna hanga biakna in khialhna hanga biakna tawh kibang a
Leviticus7:8 Mi khatpeuh’ meihal biakna a piaksak siampipa in ama piaksak tua meihal biakna sa a vun ngah ding hi.
Leviticus7:9 Meibung sunga a ki-em an tawh biakna peuhmah leh sikbel dai ahi a
Leviticus7:10 An tawh biakna khempeuh
Leviticus7:11 “Hih in
Leviticus7:12 Amah in lungdam kohna-in a piak leh
Leviticus7:13 Amah in lungdamkoh nadingin thunuam-a ama biakpiakna tawh silngo kisawh anlum mohte ama biakna-in paipih khawm ding hi.
Leviticus7:14 Amah in Topa biak nadingin tua biakna sung panin moh khat ciat pia ding hi; thunuam-a biakna si a theh siampipa in tua moh ngah ding hi.
Leviticus7:15 Lungdam kohna-in thunuam-a ama biakpiakna a sa pen a piak ni-in kine ding hi; amah in a zingsang dong bangmah sit lo ding hi.
Leviticus7:16 Ahih hangin ama biakna piakna in thuciamna biakpiakna ahi a
Leviticus7:17 ahih hangin a nithum ni-in biakpiakna sa a om lai teng mei tawh kihal ding hi.
Leviticus7:18 A ni thum ni-in thunuam-a ama biakpiakna sa khatpeuh peuh a kinek leh
Leviticus7:19 “A nin na khatpeuh peuh tawh a kisawh kha sa kine lo ding hi; mei tawh kihal ding hi; a siang mi khempeuh in a sa ne thei ding uh a
Leviticus7:20 ahih hangin ama tungah nitna om napi-in thunuam-a Topa tungah biakpiakna sa a nepa ama mite lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi.
Leviticus7:21 Mi khat in a nin na khat
Leviticus7:22 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus7:23 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in bawngtal ahi a
Leviticus7:24 A mawk sih ganhing thau leh gamsate in a balgawp ganhing thaute na dangin kizang thei ding a
Leviticus7:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ganhing thau a ne mi peuhmah ama mite lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi.
Leviticus7:26 Tua tham loin note in na ten’na uh mun khatpeuh peuh ah vasa namte’ aa hita leh ganhingte’ aa hita leh a sisan peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus7:27 Sisan khatpeuh peuh a ne mi peuhmah ama mite lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi
Leviticus7:28 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus7:29 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa tungah thunuam-a ama biakpiakna a piapa in Topa kiangah ama biakna paipih ding hi; thunuam-a ama biakpiakna panin
Leviticus7:30 amah in meihal biakna Topa tungah a khut-in paipih ding hi; Topa ’ mai-ah veii-a biak nadingin a iik a kiveii theih nadingin amah in athau a iik tawh paipih ding hi.
Leviticus7:31 Siampipa in biakna tau tungah a thau hal ding a
Leviticus7:32 Thunuam-a biakpiakna panin biakna-in siampipa tungah a taklam phei na pia ding uh hi;
Leviticus7:33 Aaron’ suante sung panin thunuam-a biakna sisan leh athau a piapa in a taklam phei ngah ding hi.
Leviticus7:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kiveii a iik leh a kipia a phei pen keimah in Israel mite tung
Leviticus7:35 Hih in
Leviticus7:36 Israel mite in amaute tungah a piak nadingin amaute sathau a kinilh ni-in Topa in hih thu pia hi; tua in a khang tawntungun amau’ ngeina kip ahi hi

Leviticus8:2 “Aaron leh amah tawh a om a tapate
Leviticus8:3 kikhopna buk kongah Israel mihonte khempeuh khawm in
Leviticus8:4 Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses in hih hi; kikhopna buk kongah mihonte kikhawm hi.
Leviticus8:5 Moses in mihonte kiangah
Leviticus8:6 Moses in Aaron leh a tapate paipihin tui tawh amaute a sil hi.
Leviticus8:7 Amah in a puantungsilh amah silhsak a
Leviticus8:8 Amah in ama tungah a awmdal bulhin
Leviticus8:9 Amah in ama lu tungah a dialpi koihin
Leviticus8:10 Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau la-in
Leviticus8:11 Amah in biakna tau tungah tuate kimkhat sagih vei thehin
Leviticus8:12 Amah in nilh sathau kimkhat Aaron’ lu tungah sung a
Leviticus8:13 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin
Leviticus8:14 Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal paipih hi; Aaron leh a tapate in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal’ lu tungah amau’ khut nga uh hi.
Leviticus8:15 Kilemna bawl nadingin Moses in goin
Leviticus8:16 Amah in a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh leh a sintuamte leh a kal nihte a thau tawh la-in
Leviticus8:17 Ahih hangin
Leviticus8:18 Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna tuutal pia hi; Aaron leh a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amau’ khut nga uh hi.
Leviticus8:19 Moses in goin
Leviticus8:20 Tuutal a kisem nen ciangin
Leviticus8:21 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin
Leviticus8:22 Tua ciangin amah in a tuutal dang
Leviticus8:23 Moses in goin a si tawmkhat la-in Aaron’ taklam bilteep leh a taklam khutpi leh a taklam khepi nuh hi.
Leviticus8:24 Aaron tapate hong kipaipihin
Leviticus8:25 Tua ciangin amah in a thau
Leviticus8:26 Topa mai-ah a om silngo sawhloh anlum lawh sung panin amah in silngo sawhloh moh khat leh sathau sawh anlum moh khat leh moh pheng khat la-in
Leviticus8:27 Amah in hihte khempeuh Aaron’ khut sung leh ama tapate’ khut sungah koihin
Leviticus8:28 Tua ciangin Moses in amaute’ khut sung panin tuate la-in
Leviticus8:29 Moses in a iik la-in veii a
Leviticus8:30 Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau kimkhat leh biakna tau tunga om a si la-in
Leviticus8:31 Moses in Aaron leh a tapate’ kiangah
Leviticus8:32 a sa leh anlum a om laite mei tawh na hal ding uh hi.
Leviticus8:33 Note hong kikipsak nading ni sagih bei ding ahih manin
Leviticus8:34 Tu ni-a a kibawl bangin
Leviticus8:35 Kikhopna buk kongah ni sagih sung sun leh zan na om ding uh a
Leviticus8:36 Aaron leh a tapate in Topa in Moses tung tawnin a thupiaknate khempeuh hih uh hi.
Leviticus9:1 A ni giat ni-in Moses in Aaron leh a tapate leh Israel upate sam hi;
Leviticus9:2 amah in Aaron kiangah
Leviticus9:3 Israel mite kiangah
Leviticus9:4 leh thunuam-a biakna-in Topa ’ mai-ah piak dingin bawngtal khat leh tuutal khat leh
Leviticus9:5 Amaute in kikhopna buk mai-ah Moses thupiak teng hong paipih uh hi; mihonpite khempeuh a nai-ah hong pai-in Topa mai-ah ding uh hi.

Leviticus9:7 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron kiangah

Leviticus9:9 Aaron’ tapate in ama tungah a sisan pia uh a
Leviticus9:10 ahih hangin
Leviticus9:11 A sa leh a vunte amah in giahphual pua lamah mei tawh hal hi.
Leviticus9:12 Amah in meihal biakna go hi; Aaron’ tapate in ama tungah a si pia uh a
Leviticus9:13 Amaute in meihal biakna ama tungah a nen nenin a lutang tawh pia uh hi; amah in biakna tau tungah tuate hal hi.
Leviticus9:14 Amah in a sungkuate leh a khete sawp a
Leviticus9:15 Tua ciangin a masa a
Leviticus9:16 Amah in meihal biakna paipihin ngeina kip omsa bangin pia hi.
Leviticus9:17 Amah in zingsang meihal biakna banah an tawh biakna paipihin

Leviticus9:19 bawngtal leh tuutal thau

Leviticus11:1 Topa in Moses leh Aaron’ tungah
Leviticus11:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen un: Hihte in leitunga om ganhing khempeuh lak panin na nek theih ding uh a nungta ganhing ahi hi.
Leviticus11:3 Ganhingte lak panin a khecin a ka
Leviticus11:4 Ahi zongin eknel haite lak pan hita leh khecin kate lak pan hita leh
Leviticus11:5 Sakikh ganhing in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note’ adingin a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus11:6 Bilpi in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note’ adingin a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus11:7 Vok pen a khecin a kat hangin eknel hai lo ahih ciangin note’ adingin a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus11:8 Note in tuate’ sa na ne kei ding uh a
Leviticus11:9 “Tua sunga omte sung panin hihte khempeuh na ne thei ding uh hi. Tuipi sung hita leh gun sung hita leh tui sungah a om phe leh lip a neite peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi.
Leviticus11:10 Ahih hangin tuipi sung
Leviticus11:11 Tuate pen note adingin a kihhuai hi ding hi; note in tuate’ sa na ne kei ding uh a
Leviticus11:12 Tui sunga a omte sung panin phe leh lip a nei lo peuhmah note adingin a kihhuai ahi hi.
Leviticus11:13 “Vasate lak panin note in na kih ding uh
Leviticus11:14 mu-meika
Leviticus11:15 va-ak nam khempeuh
Leviticus11:16 kalaoh-vasa
Leviticus11:17 keising tuimu
Leviticus11:18 gam vatawt
Leviticus11:19 gun vapi
Leviticus11:20 “Khe li tawh a pai
Leviticus11:21 Ahi zongin khe li tawh a pai kha a nei ganhingte khempeuh lak panin leitungah a tuan nadingun a khepek uh tawh kizom ngaltak tawn a neite na ne thei ding uh hi.
Leviticus11:22 Tuate lak panin na nek theih dingte un: kauphe kitom nam khempeuh
Leviticus11:23 Ahih hangin khe li nei-in kha a nei ganhing dangte khempeuh note’ adingin a kihhuai ahi hi.
Leviticus11:24 “Hite tawh note a nin na suak ding uh hi; a sisa a lawng peuhmahte nitak mateng a nin hi ding a
Leviticus11:25 a sisa themkhat a pua peuhmah in a puan sawpin
Leviticus11:26 A khecin a ka ahih hangin eknel a hai lo ganhing peuhmah note adingin a nin ahi hi; tuate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:27 Khe li tawh a pai ganhingte khempeuh lak panin amau’ khebom tawh a paite khempeuh note adingin a nin ahi hi; tuate a sisa a lawng peuhmahte nitak mateng a nin hi ding a
Leviticus11:28 a sisa a puapa in a puan sawpin
Leviticus11:29 “Leitunga a vak a pai thei ganhingte lak panin note’ adingin a ninte in: savokphual
Leviticus11:30 tawlbawkpi
Leviticus11:31 A hon tat ganhing khempeuhte’ lak panin hihte in note’ adingin a nin ahi hi; tuate a sih ciangin a lawng peuhmah a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:32 Tuate a sisa khatpeuh peuh a tukna nate
Leviticus11:33 Tuate khatpeuh peuh leibeel khatpeuh peuh sungah a kiat leh
Leviticus11:34 Tua lei beel sungah a om a kine thei ding an tungah tua bang tui a tuk leh a nin hi ding hi; tua bang beel sunga om dawn theih ding peuhmah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:35 Tuate a sisa themkhat a tukna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi; meibung hita leh belpei hita leh kisuzan ding hi; tuate a nin ahi hi; note’ adingin a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:36 Ahi zongin tuinak leh tuibeem ahih leh siang ding hi; ahih hangin a sisate a lawng peuhmah nin ding hi.
Leviticus11:37 Tuate a sisa themkhat a kivawh ding khaici tungah a tuk leh
Leviticus11:38 ahih hangin khaici tui kidiah a
Leviticus11:39 “Note’ nek theih ding ganhing khatpeuh peuh a sih leh
Leviticus11:40 a sisa a ne pa in ama puante sawpin nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi; a sisa a puapa in zong ama puante sawpin nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:41 “Leitungah a hontat ganhing peuhmah a kihhuai ahi hi; tuate kine lo ding hi.
Leviticus11:42 A awmtal peuhmah leh khe li-a a pai peuhmah
Leviticus11:43 A hontat ganhing khatpeuh peuh tawh nomau mah a kihhuai-in na kibawl tawm kei ding uh hi; tuate tawh nomau na kinin tawmsak kei ding uh hi; na kinit tawmsak uh leh a nin na suak ding uh hi.
Leviticus11:44 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi; tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap un la
Leviticus11:45 Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ Pasian a hi dingin Izipt gam panin note hong paikhiatpihpa in keimah Topa ka hi hi; tua ahih ciangin kei siangtho ka hih manin note na siangtho ding uh hi
