Leviticus14:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus14:2 “Hih in
Leviticus14:3 giahphual pua lamah siampipa pai khia-in vel ding hi. Tua ciangin a phak natna pen a phakpa tung pan a dam leh
Leviticus14:4 a kisiangsak ding mipa’ adingin a hing vasa siang nih leh taamtaak sing leh a ausan puan leh puknah a la dingin siampipa in amaute sawl ding hi;
Leviticus14:5 amaute in tuiluang tungah leibeel khat sungah a vasa khat a gawh nading uh siampipa in thu pia ding hi.
Leviticus14:6 Amah in a hing lai vasa pen taamtaak sing leh a ausan puan leh puknah tawh la khawmin
Leviticus14:7 amah in phak natna panin a kisiangsak dingpa tungah sagih vei theh ding hi; tua ciangin amah siang hi
Leviticus14:8 A kisiangsak ding mipa in a puante sawpin
Leviticus14:9 A ni sagih ni-in amah in a sam khempeuh met ding hi; a khamul leh a mitkhu mul
Leviticus14:10 “A ni giat ni-in amah in a sitbang lo tuuno apa nih
Leviticus14:11 Amah a siangsak siampipa in a kisiangsak ding mipa leh hih nate kikhopna buk kong-a Topa mai-ah koih ding hi.
Leviticus14:12 Siampipa in tuuno apa khat la-in sathau biingta khat tawh mawhna hanga biakna-in pia-in veii-a biakna-in Topa mai-ah tuate veii ding hi;
Leviticus14:13 amaute in siangtho mun sunga khialhna hanga biakna leh meihal biakna a gawhna mun uhah amah in tuuno go ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna hanga biakna pen khialhna hanga biakna mah bangin siampipa’ aa ahi hi; tua in a siangthopen ahi hi.
Leviticus14:14 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat la-in amah in tua si pen a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ taklam bil teep
Leviticus14:15 Tua ciangin siampipa in sathau biingta panin kimkhat la-in amahmah’ veilam khut sungah sungin
Leviticus14:16 a veilam khut sunga om sathau sungah a taklam khutme diahin
Leviticus14:17 Ama khut sungah a om lai sathau kimkhatte pen siampipa in a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ taklam bil teep
Leviticus14:18 siampipa in a khut sunga sathau om lai teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ lu nilh ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in ama adingin Topa mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi.
Leviticus14:19 Ama nitna panin a kisiangthosak ding mipa adingin kilemna bawl nadingin siampipa in khialhna hanga biakna pia ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah in meihal biakna go ding hi;
Leviticus14:20 siampipa in meihal biakna leh an tawh biaknate biakna tau tungah pia ding hi. Tua bangin siampipa in ama adingin kilemna bawlsak ding a
Leviticus14:21 “Ahih hangin amah zawngin tua zah a piak zawh kei leh
Leviticus14:22 vakhu nih ahi a
Leviticus14:23 A ni giat ni-in amah in Topa mai
Leviticus14:24 siampipa in mawhna hanga tuuno
Leviticus14:25 Amah in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno go ding hi; siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat la-in
Leviticus14:26 Siampipa in amahmah’ veilam khut sungah a sathau kimkhat sung ding hi;
Leviticus14:27 a veilam khut sunga om sathau tawmkhat a taklam khutme tawh Topa mai-ah sagih vei theh ding hi;
Leviticus14:28 siampipa in ama khut sunga a om sathau tawmkhat a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ taklam bil teep
Leviticus14:29 siampipa in a khut sunga a om lai sathau teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ ading Topa ’ mai-ah kilemna bawl nadingin a lu nilhsak ding hi.
Leviticus14:30 Amah in vakhu hita leh kawl vakhu no hita leh
Leviticus14:31 khat pen khialhna hanga biak nading
Leviticus14:32 Hih in phak natna a vei
Leviticus14:33 Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
Leviticus14:34 “Note adinga kong piak Kanaan gamah na om ciangun note’ leitang-a inn khat sungah phak natna kong tun’sak ciangin
Leviticus14:35 inn neipa pai-in siampipa kiangah
Leviticus14:36 Tua ciangin
Leviticus14:37 Amah in a natna vel ding hi; a natna pen tua inn kawm tungah omin a hing meel ahih kei leh a san meel na pua-in tua natna kawm maitang sangin a thuk zawk tuak leh
Leviticus14:38 inn sung panin inn kongah siampipa paikhia ding a
Leviticus14:39 A ni sagih ni-in siampipa hong pai kikin
Leviticus14:40 natna a ban’na suang lakhia-in khuapi pua lam a nin mun khatah a paih nadingun siampipa in thu pia ding hi;
Leviticus14:41 amah in a inn sung kimkot kiat sakin
Leviticus14:42 tua ciangin amaute in suang dang la-in tua suangte’ omna munah koihin
Leviticus14:43 “Amah in a suangte lakhia-in a inn kiatin a zut khit ciangin tua inn sungah a natna hong suah kik leh
Leviticus14:44 siampipa pai-in en ding hi; inn sungah a natna a kizelh leh
Leviticus14:45 Amah in tua inn
Leviticus14:46 Tua tham loin tua inn a kikhakcip sung teng a sungah a lut mipa a nitak dong a nin hi ding hi;
Leviticus14:47 tua inn sunga a lum mipa in ama puante sawp ding hi; tua inn sunga an ne mipa in ama puante sawp ding hi.
Leviticus14:48 “Ahih hangin siampipa hong pai-in a vel a
Leviticus14:49 Tua inn sian’ thosak nadingin amah in vasa neu nih
Leviticus14:50 tui luang tungah leibeel sungah a vasa khat go ding a
Leviticus14:51 taamtaak sing leh puknah leh a ausan khau pen a vasa hing tawh la khawmin
Leviticus14:52 Tua bangin amah in vasa’ si tawh
Leviticus14:53 amah in vasa hing pen khuapi pua lam gam lakah khahkhia ding hi; tua bangin amah in tua inn adingin kilemna bawlsak ding a
Leviticus14:54 Hih in phak natna khatpeuh peuh tawh kisai-in ngeina ahi hi: cithak tawh kisai
Leviticus14:55 puan tung hita leh inn sung hita leh a om phak natna tawh kisai
Leviticus14:56 a bawk hita leh meima hita leh a tuampian mun tawh kisai-in
Leviticus14:57 bang hunin nin a
Leviticus15:1 Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
Leviticus15:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Pasal khatpeuh a na tui a paikhiat ciangin tua a paikhia a na tui pen a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus15:3 Amah a ninsak a na paikhia tawh kisai-in ngeina hih bang ahi hi: a na tui a paipai a
Leviticus15:4 A na tui a paikhia mipa’ lupna peuhpeuh a nin hi ding hi; ama tutna peuhpeuh a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:5 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puante sawpin
Leviticus15:6 A na tui a paikhia mipa’ tutnasa na khatpeuh peuh tungah a tu mi peuhmah in a puante sawpin
Leviticus15:7 A na tui a paikhia mipa’ pumpi a lawng mi peuhmah in a puante sawpin
Leviticus15:8 A na tui a paikhia mipa in a siang mipa tungah cil a siat leh
Leviticus15:9 A na tui a paikhia mipa a tutna tutphat khatpeuh peuh in a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:10 Ama nuai-ah a om na khatpeuh peuh a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi; tua bang na a tawm mipa in a puante sawpin
Leviticus15:11 A na tui a paikhia mipa in tui sungah a khut sil lopi-in a lawn’ mi peuhpeuh in ama puante sawpin
Leviticus15:12 A na tui a paikhia mipa in a lawn’ lei tawh kibawl um-le-beelte kisukham ding hi; sing tawh kibawl kuang-le-keute ahih leh tui sungah kisawp ding hi.
Leviticus15:13 “A na tui a paikhia mipa a na tui paikhiatna hangin a kisian’sak ciangin
Leviticus15:14 A ni giat ni-in amah in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhu no nih la-in
Leviticus15:15 siampipa in tuate
Leviticus15:16 “Mi khat in a na tui a teh leh
Leviticus15:17 A tungah a na tui a tukna puan leh savun peuhmah tui tawh kisawp ding a
Leviticus15:18 Pasal khat in numei khat tawh a lupkhawm khit ciangin
Leviticus15:19 “Numei khat in nin a neih ciangin
Leviticus15:20 Amah a nit hun sunga a lupna peuhpeuh a nin hi ding hi; amah a tutna peuhpeuh zong a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:21 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puan sawpin
Leviticus15:22 Ama tutna a lawng peuhmah in ama puante sawpin
Leviticus15:23 ama tutna ahi lupna hita leh na khatpeuh peuh hita leh
Leviticus15:24 Pasal khatpeuh mah tua nu tawh lumin
Leviticus15:25 “Numei khat in ama nin hun hilo napi-in ni tampi sung a si suak ahi a
Leviticus15:26 Ama nin neih hun sung tenga a lupna khempeuh a nit sunga ama zat lupna tawh kibang ding hi; amah in a nin ahih mah bangin a tutna khempeuh zong a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:27 Hih nate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding a
Leviticus15:28 Ahih hangin tua nu a nin a kisian’sak leh
Leviticus15:29 A ni giat ni-in tua nu in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhu no nih la-in
Leviticus15:30 Siampipa in khialhna hanga biakna dingin khat pia-in
Leviticus15:31 “Amau’ laizanga om ka biakbuk nitsakna hangin amau’ nitna sungah amaute si kha ding uh ahih ciangin
Leviticus15:32 Hih in a na tui a paikhia mipa ahih kei leh a na tui tehin
Leviticus15:33 nin a neinu ading zong ahi hi; tua-in
Leviticus16:1 Aaron’ tapa nihte in Topa mai-ah ngeina lopi-in mei tawh va nai uh a
Leviticus16:2 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus16:3 Ahih hangin siangtho munah hih bangin Aaron hong pai ding hi: khialhna hanga biak nadingin bawngtal no khat leh meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat hong paipih ding hi.
Leviticus16:4 Amah in a siangtho saihadial puantungsilh silhin
Leviticus16:5 Amah in Israel mihonte tung panin khialhna hanga biak nadingin keeltal nih leh meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat la ding hi.
Leviticus16:6 “Aaron in amahmah adingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in
Leviticus16:7 Tua ciangin amah in keeltal nih la-in
Leviticus16:8 Aaron in tua keel nihte tungah ai sanin
Leviticus16:9 Aaron in Topa ’ adingin ai a pha keel paipihin
Leviticus16:10 ahih hangin Azazel adingin ai a pha keel pen gam lakah Azazel kiangah a kipuak theih nadingin kilemna bawl nading a hing-in Topa ’ mai-ah kipaipih ding hi.
Leviticus16:11 “Aaron in amahmah adingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in
Leviticus16:12 Amah in Topa ’ biakna tau panin mei-am a dim paknamtui beel khat leh a kisunen paknamtui khut nih dim khat la ding hi; amah in dalna puan sungah paipihin
Leviticus16:13 teci pan’na tungah a om hehpihna tokhom pen paknamtui khu in a tuam theih nading Topa ’ mai-ah a om mei tungah a paknamtui koih ding hi
Leviticus16:14 amah in bawngtal si tawmkhat la-in
Leviticus16:15 “Tua ciangin amah in mite ading ahi khialhna hanga biakna keel go-in
Leviticus16:16 amah in tua bangin Israel mite’ nitna hang
Leviticus16:17 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl dingin amah tumin ama ading leh a innkuanpihte ading leh Israel mi honte khempeuh adingin kilemna a bawl khit hong paikhiat matengin kikhopna buk sungah kuamah om lo ding hi.
Leviticus16:18 Tua ciangin Topa ’ mai-ah a om biakna tau-ah amah va pai-in
Leviticus16:19 Amah in a khutme tawh a si tawmkhat biakna tau tungah sagih vei thehin
Leviticus16:20 “Amah in siangtho mun
Leviticus16:21 Aaron in keel hing’ lu tungah a khut tegel nga-in
Leviticus16:22 Keel in amau mawhnate khempeuh pua-in gam daihna-ah pai ding hi; amah in gam lakah a keel khah ding hi.
Leviticus16:23 “Tua ciangin kikhopna bukah Aaron hong pai-in
Leviticus16:24 amah in a siangtho mun khatah a pumpi tui sungah silin
Leviticus16:25 Amah in biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna sathau hal ding hi.
Leviticus16:26 Azazel’ kiangah keel a pai sakpa in a puante sawpin a pumpi tui sungah silin
Leviticus16:27 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl nadingin hong kipaipih si a kilakna khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal leh khialhna hanga biakna keel pen giahphual pua lamah kipuakhia ding hi; amau vun leh a sa leh a ekte mei tawh kihal ding hi.
Leviticus16:28 Tuate a halpa in ama puante sawpin tui sungah a pumpi silin
Leviticus16:29 “Hih in
Leviticus16:30 bang hang hiam cih leh hih ni-in note sian’sak nadingin note’ ading kilemna kibawl ding hi; na khialhna khempeuh panun Topa ’ mai-ah na siang ding uh hi.
Leviticus16:31 Tua in note’ adingin a thupi tawlngakna sabbath hi a
Leviticus16:32 A pa’ tanga siampi dingin sathau kinilh a ki-ap siampipa in kilemna bawlin
Leviticus16:33 amah in biakinn sian’ suahna bawlin
Leviticus16:34 Hih in
Leviticus17:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus17:2 “Aaron leh ama tapate leh Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in. Hih in Topa ’ thupiaksa na ahi hi.
Leviticus17:3 Israel mi khatpeuh in bawngtal ahi a
Leviticus17:4 Topa ’ biakbuk mai Topa tungah letsongin piak dingin kikhopna buk kongah a paipih kei leh
Leviticus17:5 Hih in
Leviticus17:6 siampipa in kikhopna buk kong-a Topa ’ biakna tau tungah a si thehin
Leviticus17:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a biak uh keel milimte adingin amau’ biakpiaknate go nawn lo ding uh hi. Hih in amau’ khang tawntungin amaute tungah ngeina kip khat hi ding hi.
Leviticus17:8 “Nangmah in amaute tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: Israel mite sung pan hita leh
Leviticus17:9 Topa tungah piak dingin kikhopna buk kongah a paipih kei leh
Leviticus17:10 “Israel mite sung pan hita leh
Leviticus17:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh a pumpi nuntakna in sisan sungah a om hi; note ading kilemna bawl nadingin note adingin biakna tau tungah tua sisan ka pia zo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh sisan in nuntakna ahih manin kilemna a piangsak na ahi hi.
Leviticus17:12 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khin hi: Note lakah kuamah in sisan ne lo ding hi; note lakah hong peem khualmi khatpeuh in zong sisan ne lo ding hi.
Leviticus17:13 Israel mite khatpeuh hita leh
Leviticus17:14 “Bang hang hiam cih leh ganhingte khempeuh’ nuntakna in a sisan ahi hi; tua ahih ciangin Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khin zo hi: Ganhing khatpeuh peuh’ sisan na ne kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ganhing khempeuh nuntakna in a sisan ahi hi; sisan a ne mi peuhmah a mipihte kiang panin kihawlkhia ding hi.
Leviticus17:15 A mawk sih hita leh gamsate in a balgawp hita leh a ne mi peuhmah
Leviticus17:16 Ahih hangin amah in tuate sawp loin ahi zongin kisil loin ahi zongin a om leh amah in a ama mawhna pua ding hi
Leviticus18:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus18:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:3 Note na ten’na uh Izipt gamah amaute a gamtat bangin note na gamta kei ding uh a
Leviticus18:4 Note in keima biakna ngeina kipte semin ka thukhamte lenin tuate na zui ding uh hi. Keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:5 Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte leh ka biakna ngeina kipte na zui ding uh hi; tuate a zui mi-in nungta ding hi. Keimah in Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:6 “Note kuamah in na kinaipih na behte uh mawhpih dingin na naih kei ding uh hi. Keimah in Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:7 Na nu mawhpihna tawh na pa tungah maizumna na tun’ kei ding hi; amah in na nu ahi hi
Leviticus18:8 Nangmah in na pa’ zi na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua in na pa’ maizum nading ahi hi.
Leviticus18:9 Nangmah in na sanggamnu
Leviticus18:10 Nangmah in na tapa’ tanu ahih kei leh na tanu’ tanu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ maizumna in nangma maizumna mah ahi hi.
Leviticus18:11 Nangmah in na pa’ zi tanu
Leviticus18:12 Nangmah in na pa’ sanggamnu na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu in na pa tawh a kinai beh numei ahi hi.
Leviticus18:13 Nangmah in na nu’ sanggamnu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in na nu tawh a kinai beh numei ahi hi.
Leviticus18:14 Nangmah in na pa’ sanggampa tungah mindaina na tun’ kei ding hi; tua in ama zi na naih kei ding hi cih nopna hi; tua nu in nangma innlak nu ahi hi.
Leviticus18:15 Nangmah in na monu na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu in na tapa’ zi ahi hi; na mawhpih kei ding hi.
Leviticus18:16 Nangmah in na sanggampa’ zi na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua in na sanggampa’ maizum nading ahi hi.
Leviticus18:17 Nangmah in na luppih nupi khat’ tanu na mawhpih kei ding a
Leviticus18:18 Nangmah in a sanggamnu hing suan dingin numei khat zi-in na la kei ding hi; a sanggamnu hing lai pi-in amah na luppih kei ding hi.
Leviticus18:19 “Nangmah in numei khat nin nei-a a nit hun sungin luppih dingin na naih kei ding hi.
Leviticus18:20 Nangmah in na vengpa’ zi tawh na lumkhawm kei ding a
Leviticus18:21 Nangmah in Molek tungah mei halna tawh biakpiak nadingin na tate khatpeuh peuh napia kei ding a
Leviticus18:22 Nangmah in numei khat tawh lupkhop bangin pasal khat tawh na lumkhawm kei ding hi; tua in a kihhuai ahi hi.
Leviticus18:23 Nangmah in ganhing khatpeuh tawh mawhin tua tawh na kininsak kei ding a
Leviticus18:24 “Hih nate khatpeuh tawh note kininsak kei un: bang hang hiam cih leh note’ mai-a ka paihkhiat ding minamte in hihte khempeuh tawh amau kininsak uh hi;
Leviticus18:25 leitang a nin suak ahih ciangin keimah in a leitang mawhna daan pia-in
Leviticus18:26 Ahih hangin
Leviticus18:27 (bang hang hiam cih leh note’ ma-a a om gam mite in hih kihhuainate khempeuh hih uh a
Leviticus18:28 tua bang hi kei leh leitang in note ma-a a om minamte a luakkhiat bangin note in amah na nitsak uh ciangin note hong luakhia ding hi.
Leviticus18:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih kihhuainate khatpeuh a hih ding peuhmah
Leviticus18:30 Tua ahih ciangin note ma-a a kizang hih a kihhuai ngeinate khatpeuh peuh na gamtat ngei loh nading uh leh tuate tawh nomau na kinitsak ngei loh nadingun kong thuhilh zui un: keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
Leviticus19:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus19:2 “Israel mi honte khempeuh kiangah hih bangin gen in: Note na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa note’ Pasian keimah in ka siangtho hi.
Leviticus19:3 Note a kuamah peuh in na nu leh na pa uh zahtakin
Leviticus19:4 Milimte lamah kihei kei un la
Leviticus19:5 “Note in Topa tungah thunuam-a biak piakna na piak uh ciangin
Leviticus19:6 Tua pen na piak ni mah uh ahih kei leh a zing ciangin kine ding hi; a ni thum ni ciang dong a om lai peuhmah mei tawh kihal ding hi.
Leviticus19:7 A ni thum ni-in a kinek peuhmah leh
Leviticus19:8 tua a ne mi peuhmah in ama mawhna pua ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa ’ na a siangtho ninsak hi; tua mipa ama mite sung panin kihawlkhia ding hi.
Leviticus19:9 “Na leitang tung panun an na lak uh ciangin
Leviticus19:10 Note in na leenggui lo uh hawk mai loin
Leviticus19:11 “Note na guta kei ding uh hi; khat leh khat na kikhem kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:12 Note in a man lopi-in keima min tawh na kiciam kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:13 “Note in na vengte uh na nengniam kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:14 Note in bil ngongte phuisam loin mittawte mai-ah puk theih nading na koih kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:15 “Note in thukhenna ah thuman lo na hih kei ding uh hi; note in mizawngte langgen loin
Leviticus19:16 Note in na mihingte lak uhah mi gensia-in vaksuk vakto loin
Leviticus19:17 “Note in na lungsim sung uhah na sanggampa uh mudah loin
Leviticus19:18 Note in nomau’ mipihte tungah phu la loin
Leviticus19:19 “Note in ka thukhamte na zui ding uh hi. Note in na ganhingte uh a namdang tawh ta na neisak kei ding uh hi; note in na lo uhah khaici nam nih na pawi kei ding uh hi; khau nam nih a kigan puan zong note tungah kibaang lo ding hi.
Leviticus19:20 “Sila ahi numei
Leviticus19:21 ahih hangin tua pa in amahmah adingin mawhna hanga biak nadingin tuutal khat
Leviticus19:22 Siampipa in tuapa a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin mawhna hanga biakna tuutal tawh Topa mai-ah ama adingin kilemna bawlsak ding hi; amah a gamtatnasa a khialhna kimaisak ding hi.
Leviticus19:23 “Note tua gamah tungin an dingin kung nam khempeuh na suan uh ciangin
Leviticus19:24 A kum lina ciangin amau’ gah khempeuh siangtho-in
Leviticus19:25 Ahih hangin a kum ngana ciangin tuate in note adingin hong gah semsem nadingin tuate gah na ne thei ding uh hi: keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:26 “Note in sa khatpeuh peuh a sunga sisan tawh na ne khawm kei ding uh hi. Note in mai lam thu genkholhna ahih kei leh ai saanna na sem kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus19:27 Note in na baa samte uh met loin na khamul mongte uh zong na tan kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus19:28 Note in a site’ hangin na ci tung uh liamsak loin note tungah ciamtehna khatpeuh peuh na sun kei ding uh hi: keimah in Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:29 “Na tanu uh biakinn sunga paktat dinga piakna tawh siasak kei un; tua bang hi leh pasian dangte biakna sungah na tung ding uh a
Leviticus19:30 Note in ka sabbath-te tangin ka biakinn na zahtak ding uh hi: keimah in Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:31 “Vankahte leh ai saante lamah kihei kei un; amaute tawh a kininsak dingin amaute zong kei un: keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:32 “Note in sam kangte mai-ah na kun ding uh a
Leviticus19:33 “Na gam sung uhah note lakah khualmi khat hong peem leh
Leviticus19:34 Note lakah a hong peem khual mite tual sung mi mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a
Leviticus19:35 “Note in thukhenna
Leviticus19:36 Note in tawi khaina maan
Leviticus19:37 Note in ka thukhamte khempeuh leh ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in tuate na kem ding uh hi: keimah in Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus20:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus20:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite khatpeuh peuh hita leh Israel sunga a peem khual mite hita leh
Leviticus20:3 Keimah mah in tua mipa ka maisiat ding a
Leviticus20:4 Amah in Molek tungah a tate khat a piak ciangin gam sung mite in tuapa kimuhmawh bawlin amah a thah kei uh leh
Leviticus20:5 keimah in tua mipa leh ama innkuanpihte maisiatin
Leviticus20:6 “Mi khat vankahna leh ai saanna lamah kihei-in tuate thu a dot leh
Leviticus20:7 Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap un la
Leviticus20:8 Ka thukhamte zui un la
Leviticus20:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nu ahih kei leh a pa a samsia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi; amah in a nu ahih kei leh a pa samsia khin a
Leviticus20:10 “Pasal khat in ama vengpa’ zi tawh a mawh leh
Leviticus20:11 A pa’ zi tawh a lumkhawm mipa in a pa a mindaisak suak hi; amau tegel kithat ding hi
Leviticus20:12 Pasal khat a monu tawh a lupkhop leh
Leviticus20:13 Pasal khat in numei khat tawh lupkhop bangin pasal dang khat tawh a lupkhop leh
Leviticus20:14 Pasal khat in zi la-in a zi’ nu tawh zong a lak thuah leh
Leviticus20:15 Pasal khat in ganhing khat tawh a mawh leh
Leviticus20:16 Numei khat in ganhing khat naih-in tua tawh a mawh leh
Leviticus20:17 “Pasal khat in ama sanggamnu
Leviticus20:18 Pasal khat in nin nei numei khat tawh lumkhawmin
Leviticus20:19 Note in na nu’ sanggamnu ahih kei leh na pa’ sanggamnu tawh na mawh kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua in a nai behte tawh mawhna ahi hi; amaute in amau’ mawhna pua ding hi.
Leviticus20:20 Pasal khat in a pa’ sanggampa’ zi tawh a lupkhop leh
Leviticus20:21 Pasal khat in a sanggampa’ zi a lak leh
Leviticus20:22 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukham khempeuh leh ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in
Leviticus20:23 Note’ mai-ah keimah in ka paihkhiat ding minamte’ ngeinate na zui kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in hih nate khempeuh gamta uh ahih ciangin amaute ka kih hi.
Leviticus20:24 Ahih hangin keimah in note tungah
Leviticus20:25 Tua ciangin note in a siang ganhing leh a nin ganhing
Leviticus20:26 Note in keima adingin na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ahi keimah in ka siangtho a
Leviticus20:27 “Pasal ahi a
Leviticus21:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus21:2 “Aaron’ tapa siampite tungah thu gen in la
Leviticus21:3 ahih kei leh nungak ahi a sanggamnu (tua nu in pasal nei nai lo ahih manin amah tawh a kinai ahi hi; tua nu’ hangin amah kininsak thei ding hi) longal ama mite lakah misite’ hangin kininsak lo ding hi.
Leviticus21:4 Amah in pasal neisa numei khatpeuh hangin ama mite lakah va kininsakin
Leviticus21:5 Amaute in a lu uh mettol loin
Leviticus21:6 Amaute in amau’ Pasian adingin siangtho ding uh a
Leviticus21:7 Amaute in numei paktat ahih kei leh a kininsaksa numei ten’pih lo ding uh hi; a pasal in a maksa numei zong ten’pih lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh siampipa in ama Pasian adingin siangtho hi.
Leviticus21:8 Amah in note’ Pasian’ anlum pia ahih manin note in amah na ap ding uh hi; amah in note’ adingin siangtho ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ahi keimah
Leviticus21:9 Siampi khatpeuh peuh’ tanu in paktatna tawh amah leh amah a kidaisak leh
Leviticus21:10 “Ama sanggamte lakah a lianpen
Leviticus21:11 amah in a nu leh a pa luang nangawn ahi zongin si luang khatpeuh peuh kiangah pai loin
Leviticus21:12 biakinn panin zong pai khia loin
Leviticus21:13 Amah in a zi dingin nungak la ding hi.
Leviticus21:14 Meigong numei
Leviticus21:15 tua in ama mite lakah a tate a daisak loh nading ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah a siangthosakpa in keimah Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus21:16 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus21:17 “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: Na suan leh khakte sung panin a khang a khangin poina a nei mi in ama Pasian’ anlum pia dingin hong neh thei lo ding hi.
Leviticus21:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh poina a nei
Leviticus21:19 khut hoih lo
Leviticus21:20 elkul leh mi cingtak lo
Leviticus21:21 siampi Aaron’ suan leh khakte sung panin poina a nei mi khatpeuh in Topa ading meihal biakna a pia dingin a nai-ah hong pai lo ding hi; amah in poina nei ahih manin
Leviticus21:22 Amah in ama Pasian’ anlum
Leviticus21:23 ahih hangin amah in poina nei ahih manin
Leviticus21:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Aaron leh a tapate leh Israel mite khempeuh tungah a gen hi.
Leviticus22:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus22:2 “Aaron leh a tapate in keima min siangtho a daisak loh nadingun amaute in keima tungah a hong ap uh ahi
Leviticus22:3 Amaute kiangah
Leviticus22:4 Aaron’ gui sung panin meima leh a na tui a paikhia mi peuhmah in amah a sian’tho mateng a siangtho nate ne thei lo ding hi. Misi lawn’na hita leh a na tui a tehpa lawn’na hita leh a nin na khatpeuh peuh a lawngpa
Leviticus22:5 amah a nit theih nadingin a bokvak ganhing khat hita leh nitna a ngah theih nading mi khat hita leh a lawngpa
Leviticus22:6 tua bang na a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a
Leviticus22:7 Ni a tum ciangin amah siang ding hi: tua khit ciangin amah in a siangtho nate ne thei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua bangte pen ama nek ding mah ahi hi.
Leviticus22:8 A mawk sihte hita leh gamsate in a balgawpte hita leh amah in ne-in tua tawh amah kininsak lo ding hi`: keimah in Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus22:9 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in ka thuhilhna zui ding uh hi; tua hi kei leh amaute in tua thu a daisak uh ciangin khialhna thuakin sihpih ding uh hi: amaute a siangthosakpa in keimah Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus22:10 “A pua lam mi in a siangtho na ne lo ding hi. Siampipa’ innah a om peemta ahi a kicial nasemte ahi zongin a siangtho na ne lo ding hi;
Leviticus22:11 ahih hangin siampi khat in ama adingin sum tawh sila khat a lei leh
Leviticus22:12 Siampipa’ tanu khat in a pualam mi khat tawh a kiten’ leh tua nu in a siangtho biakna nate ne thei lo ding hi.
Leviticus22:13 Ahih hangin siampipa’ tanu pen meigong ahi a
Leviticus22:14 Mi khat in theih lohna hangin a siangtho na khat a nek leh
Leviticus22:15 Israel mite in Topa ’ tungah a piak ahi
Leviticus22:16 tua bangin amau’ na a siangthote nekna tawh mawhna leh khialhna amaute pua sak lo ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in amaute a siangthosak Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus22:17 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus22:18 “Aaron leh a tapate leh Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite sung panin ahi zongin Israel sungah a peem mite lak pan ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin
Leviticus22:19 hong kisan’ theih nadingin bawngtal hita leh tuu hita leh keel hita leh
Leviticus22:20 Note in a sitbang khatpeuh peuh na pia kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hong kisang zo lo ding hi.
Leviticus22:21 Mi khatpeuh in bawnghon panin ahi zongin a tuu leh keel hon panin ahi zongin thuciamna tun’sak nading hita leh ut thu-a biakna-in hita leh Topa tungah thunuam-a biakna a piak ciangin
Leviticus22:22 Ganhing a mittaw
Leviticus22:23 Bawngtal hita leh tuuno hita leh a na khatpeuh a saulua ahih kei leh a tom luate pen note in ut thu-a biakna-in na pia thei ding uh hi; ahih hangin thuciamna biak nadingin kisang zo lo hi.
Leviticus22:24 A ciltangte a sanim
Leviticus22:25 gamdang mite khatpeuh peuh tung pana kingah tua ci bang ganhingte zong na Pasian uh’ adingin note in na pia kei ding uh hi. Amaute sitbang a
Leviticus22:26 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus22:27 “Bawng ahih kei leh tuu ahih kei leh keel khat a suah ciangin a pi tawh ni sagih sung omkhawm ding hi; a ni giat ni-a kipanin tua ganno pen Topa ’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in kisang thei ding hi.
Leviticus22:28 A pi pen bawng hita leh tuu hita leh
Leviticus22:29 Note in Topa tungah lungdam koh biakna na piak uh ciangin
Leviticus22:30 A tua ni mahin kine ding a
Leviticus22:31 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thupiaknate zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi: keimah in Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus22:32 Note in keima min siangtho na daisak kei ding uh hi; Israel mite lakah kei hong kisiangthosak ding hi; keimah in note a hong siangthosak Topa
Leviticus22:33 note’ Pasian ahi dingin Izipt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpihpa ka hi hi: keimah in Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus23:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in a siangtho biak kikhopnate hi ci-a na gen ding uh a kiseh Topa ’ pawi ahi a kiseh keima pawite in hihte ahi hi.
Leviticus23:3 Ni guk sungin nasep kizo ding hi; ahih hangin a ni sagih ni in a thupi tawlngakna sabbath
Leviticus23:4 “Hihte in amaute adingin a kiseh hunin note in na gen ding uh ahi Topa ’ pawi a kisehte a siangtho biak kikhopnate ahi hi.
Leviticus23:5 A kha masa
Leviticus23:6 Tua kha mah a ni sawm-le-nga ni in Topa tungah silngo sawhloh anlum pawi ahi hi; ni sagih sung note in silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:7 A ni masa ni-in note in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi; note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi;
Leviticus23:8 Ahih hangin note in Topa tungah meihal biakna ni sagih sung na pia ding uh hi; a ni sagih ni in a siangtho kikhopna khat ahi hi; note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi
Leviticus23:9 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note tungah ka hong piak leitangah note tungin an na lak uh ciangin
Leviticus23:11 note hong kisan’theih nadingin amah in Topa mai-ah anlom veii ding hi; a zing ciang sabbath khit ciangin siampipa in tua anlom veii ding hi.
Leviticus23:12 Note in anlom na veii ni-un
Leviticus23:13 Tua tawh a kipia khawm ding an tawh biakna in sathau tawh a kibawl annel seu seh sawmsuah seh nih hi ding a
Leviticus23:14 Note in na Pasian uh biakna na paipih ma
Leviticus23:15 “Note in a zing ciang sabbath khit ciang
Leviticus23:16 a sabbath sagihna khit a zing ciang dong ni sawmnga na sim ding uh hi; tua ciangin note in an thak ahi an tawh biakna Topa tungah na paipih ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:17 Note in na ten’na uh panin veii dingin seu seh sawmsuah seh nih a kibawl anlum lum nih nong paipih ding uh hi; tuate in annel kibawl
Leviticus23:18 Note in anlum tawh a sitbang lo kum khat a pha tuuno sagih
Leviticus23:19 Note in khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat leh thunuam-a biakpiakna-in kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nih na pia ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:20 Siampipa in Topa mai-ah veii-a biakna-in anpal anlum leh tuuno nih tawh tuate veii ding hi; tuate in siampipa adingin Topa mai-ah a siangtho hi ding hi.
Leviticus23:21 Note in tua ni mahin genthangna na bawl ding uh hi; note in a siangtho kikhop khat na nei ding uh hi; note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi; tua in note ten’na khempeuh ah na khang tawntungun thukham khat hi tawntung hi.
Leviticus23:22 “Note in na leitang panun an na lak uh ciangin
Leviticus23:23 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:24 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: A kha sagihna
Leviticus23:25 Note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi; Note in Topa ’ tungah meihal biakna na paipih ding uh hi
Leviticus23:26 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:27 “Hih a kha sagihna ni sawm ni in kilemna ni ahi hi; tua in note’ adingin a siangtho kikhopna hun hi ding a
Leviticus23:28 Note in tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua in Topa note Pasian’ mai-ah note adingin kilemna bawl nadingin kilemna bawl ni ahi hi.
Leviticus23:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni-in amahmah a kigawt tawm lo peuhmah ama mite kiang panin kihawlkhia ding hi.
Leviticus23:30 Tua ni-in na khatpeuh peuh a sem mi peuhmah keimah in ama mite lak panin ka susia ding hi.
Leviticus23:31 Note in na na sem kei ding uh hi; tua in na khang tawntungun na ten’na khempeuh uhah thukham khat hi tawntung ding hi.
Leviticus23:32 Tua in note adingin thupi tawlngakna sabbath khat hi ding a
Leviticus23:33 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:34 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih kha sagihna a ni sawm-le-nga ni akipan ni sagih sung in Topa ading buk pawi ahi hi.
Leviticus23:35 A ni masa ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat hi ding hi; note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:36 Ni sagih sung note in Topa tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi; a ni giat ni-in note in a siangtho kikhopna khat nei-in Topa ’ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi; tua in a thupi kikhopna khat ahi hi; note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:37 “Hihte in Topa tungah mei tawh kihal biakna
Leviticus23:38 note in Topa tungah na piak uh Topa ’ Sabbath-te
Leviticus23:39 “Note in leitanga piangte na kaihkhop khit uh
Leviticus23:40 Note in a ni masa ni-in singkung hoih gahte
Leviticus23:41 Note in tua pen kum simin ni sagih sung pawi-in na nei ding uh hi; tua in note’ khang tawntungin thukham khat hi tawntung ding hi; note in kha sagihna sungah na bawl ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:42 Note in ni sagih sung buk sungah na teeng ding uh hi; Israelte lakah tualsung mi khempeuh buk sungah teeng ding hi;
Leviticus23:43 tua pen keimah in Izipt gam panin amaute ka paikhiapih lai-in Israel mite buk sungah ka teen’sakna thu note suan leh khakte in a theih nading ahi hi; keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
Leviticus23:44 Tua bangin Moses in Israel mite tungah Topa ’ pawi a kisehte a gen hi.
Leviticus24:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus24:2 “Meivak khat a tawntungin a kivak suak theih nadingin meivak adingin oliv gah a kisuzante panin sathau siangtho nang kiangah hong paipih nading uh Israel mite thu pia in.
Leviticus24:3 Kikhopna buk sung
Leviticus24:4 Amah in kham citak meivak khuam tungah meivakte a ngeina bangin Topa mai-ah om sak tawntung ding hi.
Leviticus24:5 “Nangmah in annel la in la
Leviticus24:6 Nangmah in kham citak sabuai tungah tuate gual nih-in na koih ding a
Leviticus24:7 Phawkna-in Topa tungah mei tawh biakna-in piak dingin anlum tawh a paikhawm theih nadingin nangmah in a gual nihte-ah paknamtui siangtho na koih ding hi.
Leviticus24:8 Sabbath ni simin Aaron in a tawntunga thuciamna-in Israel mite tangin Topa mai-ah a ngeina bangin koih tawntung ding hi.
Leviticus24:9 Tua in Topa tungah mei tawh kihal biakna sung panin amah in a tawntunga a ngah ding a siangtho pen ama kaih ahih manin
Leviticus24:10 Tu-in Israel mite khat’ tapa
Leviticus24:11 Israel numei’ tapa in Min Siangtho gensia-in samsia hi. Amaute in Moses kiangah amah paipih uh hi. Ama nu’ min in Shelomith hi a
Leviticus24:12 Topa ’ deihna amaute tungah a kigen mateng amaute in tua mipa khumcip uh hi.
Leviticus24:13 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus24:14 “A samsia mipa pen giahphual pua lamah paipih in; ama samsiat a za mi khempeuh ama lu tungah amau’ khut nga sak in la
Leviticus24:15 Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: ama Pasian a samsia mi peuhmah in ama khialhna thuak ding hi.
Leviticus24:16 Topa ’ min a gensia mipa kithat ding hi; mihonte khempeuh in amah deng ding uh hi; peemta hita leh tualsung mi hita leh
Leviticus24:17 Mi a thatpa kithat ding hi.
Leviticus24:18 Ganhing a thatpa in a ganhing mah-in loh ding hi.
Leviticus24:19 Mi khat in a vengte khat a poisak leh
Leviticus24:20 guh kitan tang ding guh kitan
Leviticus24:21 Ganhing a thatpa in loh ding hi; mi a thatpa kithat ding hi.
Leviticus24:22 Note in peemta leh tualsung mi adingin ngeina a kibang khat na nei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
Leviticus24:23 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Israel mite tungah thu gen hi; amaute in a samsia mipa giahphual pua lamah paipih uh a
Leviticus25:1 Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses kiangah
Leviticus25:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitangah na tun’ uh ciangin
Leviticus25:3 Kum guk sung note in na lo uh na pawi ding uh hi; kum guk sung note in na leenggui lo uh hah-in a gahte na kaikhawm ding uh hi;
Leviticus25:4 ahih hangin a kum sagihna ah
Leviticus25:5 A li pote note in na kaikhawm kei ding uh hi; a kipuah lo leenggui gahte note in na kaikhawm kei ding uh hi; leitang’ adingin a thupi tawlngakna kum hi ding hi.
Leviticus25:6 Leitang sabbath kum-a piang tawmte in note ading
Leviticus25:7 a piang khempeuhte in na bawngte uh ading leh na leitang uhah a om ganhingte an ding ahi hi.
Leviticus25:8 “Kum nipi sagih hun in note adingin kum sawm-li-le-kua ahih theih nadingin note in kum nipi sagih
Leviticus25:9 Tua ciangin note in kha sagihna a ni sawm ni-in nakpi-in peengkul na tum ding uh hi; kilemna ni-in note in na gam khempeuh uhah peengkul aw na gingkhia sak ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:10 Note in a kum sawmngana siangtho sakin
Leviticus25:11 Tua a kum sawmngana in note adingin jubili hi ding hi; tua kum sungin note in lo pawi loin
Leviticus25:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua in jubili ahi hi; tua in note adingin siangtho ding hi; note in lo pan-a piangsate na ne ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:13 “Hih Jubili kum sungin note khempeuh in nomau neihsa ciat na ngah kik ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:14 Note in na vengte tungah na zuak uh ahi zongin na vengte kiang panun na lei uh ahi zongin note khat leh khat na kikhem kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:15 Jubili khit ciangin a kum pha zah tawh kituakin note in na vengte uh kiang panin lei-in
Leviticus25:16 A kum a tam leh a man na khangsak ding uh hi; a kum a tawm leh a man na kiamsak ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh no tungah hong zuak pen a tuk tung ding zah ahi hi.
Leviticus25:17 Note khat leh khat kikhem loin na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus25:18 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte hihin
Leviticus25:19 Leitang in gah gahin
Leviticus25:20 Note in
Leviticus25:21 keimah in a kum gukna ah note tungah thupha kong pia ding a
Leviticus25:22 A kum giatna ah lo na pawi uh ciangin
Leviticus25:23 Leitang in keima’ aa ahih manin neih suak dingin leitang kizuak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note in kei tawh a omkhawm mikhual leh peemtate na hi uh hi.
Leviticus25:24 Note in na neih uh leitang khempeuh na kitanh kik sak thei ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:25 “Na sanggampa zawngin a neihsa leitang khenkhat a zuak leh
Leviticus25:26 Mi khat in tua na a tatsak ding mi a neih kei a
Leviticus25:27 amah in tua na a zuak zawh a kumte sim hen la
Leviticus25:28 Ahih hangin amah in ama adingin ngah kik zawh nading lampi a neih kei leh
Leviticus25:29 “Mi khat in khuapi kulh sungah ten’na inn khat a zuak leh
Leviticus25:30 Tua pen kum khat khit bit sungin a kitatkik kei leh
Leviticus25:31 Ahih hangin a kimkotah kulh a nei lo khua neu-a innte pen gam sung lote tawh a kibangin kingaihsun ding hi; tuate kitanh kik thei ding hi; jubili ciangin tuate kipiakhia ding hi.
Leviticus25:32 Ahi zongin Levi mite’ khuapite
Leviticus25:33 Levi mi khatpeuh in ama tat kik theih ding hi napi a tat kei leh
Leviticus25:34 Ahih hangin amau khuapi taang gamte kizuak thei lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua in amau’ neih tawntung na ahi hi.
Leviticus25:35 “Na sanggampa uh zawng-in
Leviticus25:36 Na sanggampa uh no kiangah hong ten’ theih nadingin ama tung panin ameet akhang la kei un la
Leviticus25:37 Note in ama tungah a meet-in sum leitawi pia loin
Leviticus25:38 Keimah in note’ Pasian ahi ding leh
Leviticus25:39 “Na gei-a na sanggampa zawngin
Leviticus25:40 amah in nang kiangah a kicial nasem leh peemta bangin om ding hi. Amah in jubili kum mateng nang tawh na hong sem ding hi;
Leviticus25:41 tua ciangin nang kiang panin amah leh amah tawh a om a tate paikhia-in
Leviticus25:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Izipt gam panin ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte ahi uh hi; a amaute sila-in kizuak lo ding hi.
Leviticus25:43 Note in hih gawpgawpna tawh amah na uk kei ding uh a
Leviticus25:44 Note in na neih theih ding uh sila pasal leh sila numeite in: note in na kimkot uh a
Leviticus25:45 Note in na gam sung uhah a suak
Leviticus25:46 Note in amaute pen note khit ciangin na tapate uh tungah amau’ neih tawntung dingin a luah dingin na pia thei ding uh hi; note in sila-in amaute na nei thei ding uh a
Leviticus25:47 “Note tawh a om khualmi ahih kei leh peemta khat hong hau a
Leviticus25:48 amah in a kizuak khit ciangin amah kitanh kik thei ding hi; ama sanggamte khatpeuh peuh in amah tanh thei ding hi;
Leviticus25:49 ama innlak pa ahih kei leh a innlak sanggampa in tanh thei ding hi; ama innkuan sunga a kinai pih a beh khatpeuh in amah tanh thei ding hi; tua ahih kei leh zong amah a hauh leh amahmah kitanh kik thei ding hi.
Leviticus25:50 Amah in ama tungah amahmah a kizuak-a kipan jubili kum dong amah a leipa tawh tuat ding a
Leviticus25:51 Kum tampi in a sap lai leh
Leviticus25:52 Ahih hangin jubili kum ding kum tawmkhat in a sap leh amah in a topa tawh tuatna khat nei ding hi; ama sepsak ding kum a om lai tawh kituakin ama kitatkhiat nadingin sum pia kik ding hi.
Leviticus25:53 Amah in a topa tungah a kum kum-a kicial nasempa tawh kibang ding hi; a topa in note’ muhna ah hih gawpgawpna tawh amah uk lo ding hi.
Leviticus25:54 Hih bang danin amah a kitatkhiat kei leh
Leviticus25:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite in kei adingin nasemte ahi uh hi; amaute pen Izipt gam panin keimah in ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte ahi uh hi: keimah in Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus26:1 “Note in nomau adingin a mai-ah na kun dingun milim bawl loin
Leviticus26:2 Note in ka sabbath-te tangin ka biakinn na zahtak ding uh hi: keimah in Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus26:3 “Note in ka thukham zui-in ka thupiaknate mangin tuate na sep uh leh
Leviticus26:4 keimah in note guahtui amau’ hunin kong pia ding a
Leviticus26:5 Na cil uh ante lenggah lawh hun dong kimang ding a
Leviticus26:6 Keimah in gam sungah nopsakna hong pia-in
Leviticus26:7 Note in na galte uh na delh ding uh a
Leviticus26:8 Note nga in zakhat zo-in
Leviticus26:9 Keimah in note ka hong pingaihsut ding a
Leviticus26:10 Note in sau veipi a kikhol a luite ne-in
Leviticus26:11 Keimah in note lakah omna ka bawl ding a
Leviticus26:12 Keimah in note lakah omin note’ Pasian hi-in
Leviticus26:13 Note in amau sila na hih loh nadingun Izipt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi; keimah in note’ hakkolte kuaitanin note a dingtangin kong pai sak hi.
Leviticus26:14 “Ahih hangin note in ka thu ngai loin
Leviticus26:15 note in ka thukhamte nialin
Leviticus26:16 keimah in note tungah hih bangin kong hih ding hi: note tungah hong tung dingin keimah in thakhat thu-a dipkuatna
Leviticus26:17 Keimah in note kong maisiat ding a
Leviticus26:18 Tua bang hi napi-in note in ka thu nong ngaih kei uh leh
Leviticus26:19 keimah in na kiphatsakpih uh note’ vangliatna susia-in
Leviticus26:20 na leitang un ama gah piangsak loin
Leviticus26:21 “Tua ciangin kei tawh kilehngatin pai-in
Leviticus26:22 Keimah in note lakah gamsate hong khahin
Leviticus26:23 “Hih banga hihna tawh kei lamah note hong kihei loin
Leviticus26:24 kei zong note tawh a kilehngatin pai-in
Leviticus26:25 Keimah in thuciamna omsa bangin phulakna na a sem ding namsau khat note tungah kong tung sak ding hi; na khuapi sung uhah note na kikhaihkhop uh leh zong keimah in note’ lakah natna kong tung sak ding a
Leviticus26:26 Keimah in note’ nuntakna an ka suksiat ciangin
Leviticus26:27 “Tua bang hi napi-in note in keima thu ngai loin
Leviticus26:28 note tawh a kilehngatin ka heh ngawh pah ding a
Leviticus26:29 Note in na tapate uh a sa na ne ding uh a
Leviticus26:30 Keimah in mual dawn-a na biaknate uh susia-in
Leviticus26:31 Keimah in na khuapite uh siasakin
Leviticus26:32 Keimah in leitang ka siasak ding a
Leviticus26:33 Keimah in minamte lakah note kong thehthang ding a
Leviticus26:34 “Tua ciangin na galte uh leitangah na om tan vei uh
Leviticus26:35 Ama tungah na ten’ lai takun a ngah loh tawlngakna ahi na sabbath-te uh
Leviticus26:36 Note sung panin galte leitangah a om lai mite tungah lungsim gimna ka tungsak ding hi; nahthel ging in amaute tai sak ding a
Leviticus26:37 Kuamah in delh lo napi-in namsau mai pan a taikhia bangin amaute khat leh khat kiphupai ding uh hi; note in na galte uh nan’ zawh nading vangliatna na nei kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus26:38 Minamte lakah note na sia ding uh a
Leviticus26:39 Note sung panin galte’ leitangah a om laite amau’ mawhna hangin kiam ding uh hi; amau’ pute pate’ mawhna hangin amau zong amaute mah bangin kiam ding uh hi.
Leviticus26:40 -
Leviticus26:41 “Ahih hangin kei tungah khemna tawh hong gamtatnasa uh leh kei tawh kilehngatin a paina uh hangin amaute tawh kilehngatin pai-in
Leviticus26:42 tua ciangin keimah in Jakob tawh ka thuciamna ka phawk ding a
Leviticus26:43 Ahih hangin amaute in leitang nusia-in
Leviticus26:44 Bang bang ahi zongin
Leviticus26:45 ahih hangin keimah in amaute ka ngaihsutna-in keimah in amau’ Pasian ka hih theih nadingin
Leviticus26:46 Hihte Moses tung tawnin Sinai Mual tungah Topa in amah leh Israel mite kikalah a bawl thukhamte leh biakna ngeina kipte leh thute ahi hi.
Leviticus27:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus27:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Mi khat in a tuam vilvel-in kiciamna a bawl ciangin
Leviticus27:3 pasal kum sawmnih panin kum sawmguk a phate a man na sehna pen
Leviticus27:4 Tua mi in numei ahih leh
Leviticus27:5 Tua mi in kum nga pan kum sawmnih ciang a pha mi ahih leh
Leviticus27:6 Tua mi in kha khat pan kum nga ciang a pha mi ahih leh
Leviticus27:7 Tua mi in kum sawmguk pan a tungsiah ahih leh
Leviticus27:8 Mi khat zawng lua-in nangma seh zah a piak zawh kei leh
Leviticus27:9 “Mite in Topa tungah biakna-in a piakte in ganhing ahih leh
Leviticus27:10 Amah na khatpeuh peuh
Leviticus27:11 Tua pen Topa tungah biakna-in kipia thei lo ganhing nin khat ahih leh
Leviticus27:12 siampipa in hoih hi ci-in ahi zongin sia hi ci-in ahi zongin a man zah seh ding hi; nang siampipa in a seh bangin hi pah ding hi.
Leviticus27:13 Ahih hangin amah in tua ganhing a tat nop leh
Leviticus27:14 “Mi khat in a siangtho dingin Topa tungah a inn a ap ciangin
Leviticus27:15 A appa in ama inn a tat nop leh
Leviticus27:16 “Mi khat in a luah ahi ama leitang phel khat Topa tungah a ap leh
Leviticus27:17 Amah in jubili kum a
Leviticus27:18 ahih hangin jubili khit ciangin amah in a lo a ap leh
Leviticus27:19 Lo a appa in a tat nop leh
Leviticus27:20 Ahih hangin amah in a lo tanh nuam lo ahi a
Leviticus27:21 a lo pen
Leviticus27:22 Amah in a luahna tawh a neih a hilo
Leviticus27:23 siampipa in jubili kum ciang dong ding tua mah seh ding a
Leviticus27:24 Jubili kum ciangin a lo pen a kileina-pa
Leviticus27:25 A kisehna peuhmah biakinn shekel tawh kizui hi ding hi: gerah sawmnih ciangin shekel khat hi ding hi.
Leviticus27:26 “Ahih hangin tacil pen Topa’ aa ahih mah bangin
Leviticus27:27 Ganhing nin ahih leh
Leviticus27:28 “Ahih hangin mi khat in a neih
Leviticus27:29 Mite lak panin a kisusia mang ding a
Leviticus27:30 “Leitung pana piang seh sawmsuah seh khat khempeuh khaici hita leh singgah hita leh
Leviticus27:31 Mi khatpeuh in seh sawmsuah seh khat a
Leviticus27:32 Bawnghon leh tuu
Leviticus27:33 Mi khat in pha hiam sia hiam ci-in kantel lo ding a
Leviticus27:34 Hihte in Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Israel mite ading Moses tungah a piak thupiakte ahi hi.
Numbers1:1 Amaute in Izipt gam panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kum nihna
Numbers1:2 “Israel mi honte khempeuh a mi pha zah tawh kizui-in a innkuankuan
Numbers1:3 nang leh Aaron in Israel sungah kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah a pha
Numbers1:4 A minam simin a beh sungah a lutang ahi mi khat ciat nang tawh hong om ding uh hi.
Numbers1:5 Hihte in no hong huh dingte min ahi hi. Reuben sung panin Shedeur’ tapa Elizur;
Numbers1:6 Simeon sung panin Zurishaddai’ tapa Shelumiel;
Numbers1:7 Judah sung panin Amminadab’ tapa Nahshon;
Numbers1:8 Issakhar’ sung panin Zur’ tapa Nethanel;
Numbers1:9 Zebulun
Numbers1:10 Josef tapate
Numbers1:11 Benjamin sung panin Gideoni’ tapa Abidan;
Numbers1:12 Dan sung panin Ammishaddai’ tapa Ahiezer;
Numbers1:13 Asher’ sung panin Okran’ tapa Pagiel;
Numbers1:14 Gad sung panin De-uel’ tapa Eliasaf;
Numbers1:15 Naftali sung panin Enan’ tapa Ahira ahi hi
Numbers1:16 Hihte in mihon sung panin a kiteel
Numbers1:17 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin Moses leh Aaron in a min kilosa hih mite khawmin
Numbers1:18 
Numbers1:19 
Numbers1:20 Israel tacil
Numbers1:21 Reuben minam tul sawmli leh tulguk leh zanga pha hi.
Numbers1:22 Simeon mi
Numbers1:23 Simeon minam tul sawmnga leh tulkua leh zathum pha hi.
Numbers1:24 Gad mi
Numbers1:25 Gad minam tul sawmli leh tulnga leh zaguk leh sawmnga pha hi.
Numbers1:26 Judah mi
Numbers1:27 Judah minam tul sawmsagih leh tulli leh zaguk pha hi.
Numbers1:28 Issakhar mi
Numbers1:29 Issakhar minam tul sawmnga leh tulli leh zali pha hi.
Numbers1:30 Zebulun mi
Numbers1:31 Zebulun minam tul sawmnga leh tul sagih leh zali pha hi.
Numbers1:32 Josef mi
Numbers1:33 Efraim minam tul sawmli leh zanga pha hi.
Numbers1:34 Manasseh mi
Numbers1:35 Manasseh minam tul sawmthum leh tulnih leh zanih pha hi.
Numbers1:36 Benjamin mi
Numbers1:37 Benjamin minam tul sawmthum leh tulnga leh zali pha hi.
Numbers1:38 Dan mi
Numbers1:39 Dan minam tul sawmguk leh tulnih leh za sagih pha hi.
Numbers1:40 Asher mi
Numbers1:41 Asher minam tul sawmli leh tulkhat leh zanga pha hi.
Numbers1:42 Naftali mi
Numbers1:43 Naftali minam tul sawmnga leh tulthum leh zali pha hi.
Numbers1:44 Hih mite
Numbers1:45 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi vekpi
Numbers1:46 a vekpi in tul zaguk leh tulthum leh zanga leh sawmnga pha hi.
Numbers1:47 Ahih hangin Levi mite ahih leh amau’ nam min pua-in adangte tawh kisim khawm lo hi.
Numbers1:48 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers1:49 “Levi minamte na sim kei ding hi
Numbers1:50 ahih hangin Levi mite pen teci pan’na biakbuk leh a sung nazat khempeuh
Numbers1:51 Biakbuk a kikhin ding ciangin Levi mite in phel ding uh hi; biakbuk a kilam ding ciangin Levi mite mah in lam ding uh hi. Midang khatpeuh peuh a kiang nai-ah hong pai leh
Numbers1:52 Israel mite in a milip-un amau’ giahphual ciat leh a dialkhai gei ciat uhah a pawl pawlin a puanbuk uh lam ding uh hi;
Numbers1:53 ahih hangin Israel mi honte tungah hehna a om loh nadingin teci pan’na biakbuk kiim-ah Levi mite in phual sat ding uh hi; Levi mite in teci pan’na biakbuk kem ding uh hi
Numbers1:54 Tua bangin Israel mite in hih uh hi; Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute gamta uh hi.
Numbers2:1 Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
Numbers2:2 “Israel mite in amau’ dialkhai gei ciatah a beh dialkhaite tawh phual sat ding uh hi; amaute in a pang simah kikhopna buk mai ngatin phual sat ding uh hi.
Numbers2:3 Nisuahna lam pangah phual a sat dingte in Judah’ giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding hi
Numbers2:4 ama pawl tul sawmsagih leh tulli leh zaguk pha hi.
Numbers2:5 Ama zomah phual a sat dingte in Issakhar minam hi ding hi
Numbers2:6 ama pawl tul sawmnga leh tulli leh zali pha hi.
Numbers2:7 Tua ciangin Zebulun minam hi ding hi. Zebulun mite makaipa in Helon’ tapa Eliab ahi hi
Numbers2:8 ama pawl tul sawmnga leh tul sagih leh zali pha hi.
Numbers2:9 Judah’ phual a
Numbers2:10 “A leitaw lam pangah a pawl pawlin Reuben’ giahphual dialkhai a neite ahi ding hi
Numbers2:11 ama pawl tul sawmli leh tulguk leh zanga pha hi.
Numbers2:12 Ama zomah phual a sat dingte in Simeon minam hi ding hi
Numbers2:13 ama pawl tul sawmnga leh tulkua leh zathum pha hi.
Numbers2:14 Tua ciangin Gad minam hi ding hi
Numbers2:15 ama pawl tul sawmli leh tulnga leh zaguk leh sawmnga pha hi.
Numbers2:16 Reuben giahphual a
Numbers2:17 “Tua ciangin kikhopna buk in
Numbers2:18 “A nitumna lam pangah a pawl pawlin Efraim giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding hi
Numbers2:19 ama pawl tul sawmli leh zanga pha hi.
Numbers2:20 Ama zomah Manasseh minam hi ding hi
Numbers2:21 ama pawl tul sawmthum leh tulnih leh zanih pha hi.
Numbers2:22 Tua ciangin Benjamin mite a makaipa in Gideoni’ tapa Abidan ahi hi
Numbers2:23 ama pawl tul sawmthum leh tulnga leh zali pha hi.
Numbers2:24 Efraim giahphual-a a pawl pawl-a omte a vekpi in tulza leh tulgiat leh zakhat pha hi. Amaute a thumna ah paikhia ding uh hi.
Numbers2:25 “A leilu lam pangah a pawl pawlin Dan giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding hi
Numbers2:26 ama pawl tul sawmguk leh tulnih leh za sagih pha hi.
Numbers2:27 Ama zom-ah phual a sat dingte in Asher minam hi ding hi
Numbers2:28 ama pawl tul sawmli leh tulkhat leh zanga pha hi.
Numbers2:29 Tua ciangin Naftali minam hi ding hi
Numbers2:30 ama pawl tul sawmnga leh tulthum leh zali pha hi.
Numbers2:31 Dan’ giahphual a
Numbers2:32 Hihte in Israel mite a beh zui-a kisim ahi hi; a pawl pawl-a giahphual-a om mi vekpi in tul za guk leh tulthum leh sawmnga pha hi.
Numbers2:33 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah Levi mite kisim khawm lo hi.
Numbers2:34 Tua bangin Israel mite in hih uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin a beh tawh kizui-in a innkuankuan-in amau dialkhaite gei-ah giahphual sat uh a
Numbers3:1 Hite in Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Moses tawh a thugen hun lai-a Aaron leh Moses’ huna mite ahi hi.
Numbers3:2 Hihte in Aaron’ tapate’ min ahi hi: A ta upa Nadab
Numbers3:3 hihte in sathau a kinilh siampi
Numbers3:4 Ahih hangin Sinai gamlak Topa mai-ah mei siangtho lo a zat uh ciangin Topa mai-ah Nadab leh Abihu si hi; amaute in ta nei lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Eleazar leh Ithamar in a pa uh Aaron’ nuntak sung teng siampi na sem uh hi.
Numbers3:5 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:6 “Levi minamte va paipih in la
Numbers3:7 Amaute in biakbuk ah a sep uh ciangin amah leh mi honpi’ adingin kikhopna buk mai-ah na sem ding uh hi;
Numbers3:8 amaute in kikhopna buk sung nazat khempeuh vaan ding uh a
Numbers3:9 Nangmah in Aaron leh a tapate tungah Levi mite na pia ding hi; amaute pen Israel mite lak panin ama tungah a kipiate ahi hi.
Numbers3:10 Nangmah in Aaron leh a tapate na seh ding a
Numbers3:11 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:12 “En in
Numbers3:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh tacil khempeuh keima’ aa ahi hi; Izipt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in
Numbers3:14 Topa in Sinai gamlakah Moses kiangah
Numbers3:15 “Levi mite
Numbers3:16 Tua ahih ciangin Moses thu a kipiak bangin amah in Topa ’ thupiakna tawh kizui-in amaute sim hi.
Numbers3:17 Levi’ tapate’ min in: Gershon
Numbers3:18 Gershon’ tapate’ min in: Libni leh Shimei ahi hi.
Numbers3:19 Kohath’ tapate’ min: Amram
Numbers3:20 Merari tapate’ min in: Mahli leh Mushi ahi hi. Hih mite in Levi mite beh lutang ahi hi.
Numbers3:21 Gershon beh in Libni mite leh Shimei mite ahi hi; hihte in Gershonte beh ahi hi.
Numbers3:22 Amaute
Numbers3:23 Gershonte beh in nitumna lam biakbuk nungah giahphual satin
Numbers3:24 tua Gershon mite sung pan a beh ukpi in Lael’ tapa Eliasaf ahi hi.
Numbers3:25 Gershonte beh in kikhopna buk sungah a et dingte in
Numbers3:26 buktual-a a kikhaite
Numbers3:27 Kohathte beh in Amram mite
Numbers3:28 Pasal khempeuh kha khat pan tungsiah
Numbers3:29 Kohathte beh in biakbuk leitaw lam pangah giahphual satin
Numbers3:30 Kohath mite sung pan a beh ukpi in Uzziel’ tapa Elizafan ahi hi.
Numbers3:31 Amau’ et dingte in thuciamna singkuang
Numbers3:32 Siampi Aaron’ tapa Eleazar in Levi mi makaite tungah a ukpi hi ding a
Numbers3:33 Merari-te beh in Mahli mite leh Mushi mite ahi hi; hihte in Merari-te beh ahi hi.
Numbers3:34 Amaute kha khat panin a tungsiah pasal peuhmah tulguk leh zanih ahi hi.
Numbers3:35 Merari-te beh sung pan a beh ukpi in Abihail’ tapa Zuriel ahi hi; amaute biakbuk leilu lam pangah giahphual sat dingte ahi hi.
Numbers3:36 Merari-te beh et dinga a kisehte in biakbuk khuampeekte
Numbers3:37 Buktual kimkot-a khuampite leh a bullente tawh
Numbers3:38 Nisuahna lam pang biakbuk mai
Numbers3:39 Moses leh Aaron in Topa ’ thupiakna tawh a innkuan kuanun a sim Levi mi pasal kha khat panin a tungsiah peuhmah tul sawmnih leh tulnih pha hi.
Numbers3:40 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:41 Israel mite lak panin tacil khempeuh tangdingin Levi mite nong lak sak ding a
Numbers3:42 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topa ’ thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh a sim hi.
Numbers3:43 Kha khat panin a tungsiah tacil pasal a kisim peuhmah tul sawmnih leh tulnih leh zanih leh sawmsagih leh thum ahi hi.
Numbers3:44 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:45 “Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh leh a ganhingte uh tangdingin Levi mite leh a ganhingte uh la in; Levi mite keima’ aa hi ding hi: keimah in Topa ka hi hi.
Numbers3:46 Levi mi pasal khempeuh sangin Israel mi tacil khempeuh zanih leh sawmsagih leh thum-in tam zaw ahih manin
Numbers3:47 tuate tat nadingin shekel khatah gerah sawmnih a pha biakinn shekel zangin mi khat ciangin shekel nga pai na la ding a
Numbers3:48 tua a tamzaw teng a kitatna uh sumte Aaron leh a tapate tungah pia in
Numbers3:49 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Levi mite banah a val lai mite tung panin kitatkhiatna sum la hi;
Numbers3:50 amah in biakinn shekel zangin Israel mi tacilte tung panin sum shekel tulkhat leh zathum leh sawmguk leh nga la hi;
Numbers3:51 tua ciangin
Numbers4:1 Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
Numbers4:2 “Levi mite lak panin Kohath mite amau’ innkuankuan leh a beh beh-in
Numbers4:3 kikhopna buk sungah na sem dingin na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha tapa khempeuh sim in.
Numbers4:4 Kikhopna buk sungah Kohath mite nasep ding in a siangtho pen nate ahi hi.
Numbers4:5 Giahphual a kisuan ding ciangin
Numbers4:6 tua ciangin amaute in savun tawh tuam ding uh a
Numbers4:7 Ompihna Anlum sabuai tungah amaute in puan a dum phah ding uh a
Numbers4:8 tua ciangin amaute in a ausan puan tawh tuate khuh ding uh a
Numbers4:9 Mei vakna meivak khuam pen
Numbers4:10 amaute in a nazat khempeuh tawh savun-in tunin a puak nading tal tungah koih ding uh hi.
Numbers4:11 Puan a dum khat tawh kham biakna tau khuh ding uh a
Numbers4:12 amaute in biakinn sungah a kizang nazat khempeuh la-in puan a dum khat tawh tunin
Numbers4:13 Amaute in a sumngo biakna tau panin a vutte luak khia ding uh a
Numbers4:14 tua lai-ah nasep nadinga a kizang
Numbers4:15 Aaron leh a tapate in biakinn leh biakinn nazat khempeuh a tun khit uh giahphual a kisuan ding ciangin
Numbers4:16 “Siampi Aaron’ tapa Eleazar in meivak tui
Numbers4:17 Topa in Moses leh Aaron’ kiangah
Numbers4:18 “Levi mite lakah Kohath minamte a siat loh nadingin hih in;
Numbers4:19 a siangtho pen nate nai-ah amaute a pai ciangin si loin a hin’ na dingun hih un: Aaron leh a tapate pai-in a nasep ding uh leh a van puak ding ciat uhah amaute seh ding uh hi
Numbers4:20 ahih hangin a siangtho nate tom khano sung bek nangawn a en dingin amaute tum lo ding uh hi
Numbers4:21 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers4:22 “Gershon mite zong
Numbers4:23 kikhopna buk sungah nasem dingin na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha tapa khempeuh na sim ding hi.
Numbers4:24 Nasep leh van puak ciangin Gershonte beh nasep ding;
Numbers4:25 amaute in biakbuk dalna puante
Numbers4:26 buktual-a a kikhaite
Numbers4:27 Gershon beh pasalte nasep ding
Numbers4:28 Hih in kikhopna buk sungah
Numbers4:29 “Merari mite zong amau’ innkuankuan leh a beh beh-in na sim ding hi;
Numbers4:30 kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha tapa khempeuh na sim ding hi.
Numbers4:31 Kikhopna buk sungah amau’ nasep dingte khempeuh biakbuk khuampeekte
Numbers4:32 a kimkot-a om buktual-a khuampite a bullente tawh
Numbers4:33 Hih in siampi Aaron’ tapa Ithamar’ khut nuai-ah Merari mite in kikhopna buk sungah a sep ding teng uh ahi hi
Numbers4:34 Moses leh Aaron leh mi honte’ makaite in Kohath mi tapate a innkuankuan leh a beh beh-in
Numbers4:35 kikhopna buk sungah na sem dingin na sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha mi khempeuh a sim uh hi;
Numbers4:36 a beh tangun tulnih leh za sagih leh sawmnga pha hi.
Numbers4:37 Topa in Moses a thupiakna bangin Moses leh Aaron in a sim
Numbers4:38 Gershon mite a innkuankuan leh a beh beh-in
Numbers4:39 kikhopna buk sungah na sem dingin na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha tapa khempeuh—
Numbers4:40 a innkuankuan leh a beh beh-in tulnih leh zaguk leh sawmthum pha hi.
Numbers4:41 Topa ’ thupiakna bangin Moses leh Aaron in a sim
Numbers4:42 Merari mite a innkuankuan leh a beh beh-in
Numbers4:43 kikhopna buk sungah na sem dingin na a sem thei kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha tapa khempeuh—
Numbers4:44 a beh tangun tul thum leh zanih ahi hi.
Numbers4:45 Topa in Moses a thupiakna bangin Moses leh Aaron in a sim
Numbers4:46 Moses leh Aaron leh Israel makaite in a sim
Numbers4:47 kikhopna buk sungah van puak nasep leh nasep a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha
Numbers4:48 a kisim tapa khempeuh tulgiat leh zanga leh sawmgiat pha hi.
Numbers4:49 Moses tung tawnin Topa ’ thupiakna bangin a sep ding a puak ding ciat uh kiseh hi; Moses in Topa ’ thupiak bangin amaute sim hi.
Numbers5:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers5:2 “Amaute in mi phakte
Numbers5:3 a laizangah keima omna ahi amau’ giahphual a nitsak loh nadingun hih bangin a nin numei leh pasal paikhia sakin giahphual pua-ah na omsak ding hi
Numbers5:4 Tua mah bangin Israel mite in hih uh a
Numbers5:5 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers5:6 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in
Numbers5:7 a gamtatnasa a khialhna pulak ding hi; amah in a tatkhialhna-ah a kicingin din kik ding a
Numbers5:8 Ahih hangin a mipa in
Numbers5:9 Amaute in siampipa tungah a paipih uh biakna peuhmah
Numbers5:10 mi khempeuh’ na a siangthote zong ama’ aa hi ding hi; mi khatpeuh in siampipa tungah a piak peuhmah ama’ aa hi ding hi
Numbers5:11 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers5:12 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in
Numbers5:13 pasal khat in tua nu luppihin
Numbers5:14 a pasal in upmawhna lungsim nei-in
Numbers5:15 tuapa in siampipa kiangah a zi paipihin
Numbers5:16 “Siampipa in tua nu va paipihin
Numbers5:17 siampipa in lei beel khat-in tui siangtho la ding a
Numbers5:18 Siampipa in Topa ’ mai-ah tua numei koih ding a
Numbers5:19 Tua ciangin siampipa in amah kiciam sakin
Numbers5:20 Ahih hangin na pasal’ ukna nuai-ah om napi-in nangmah vak vai a
Numbers5:21 (siampipa in tua numei kiciam sak ding a
Numbers5:22 hih tuisia in na gil sung zui hen la
Numbers5:23 “Tua ciangin siampipa in hih hamsiate laibu khat sungah gelhin tuisia sungah sil khia ding hi;
Numbers5:24 amah in tua numei a tuisia dawnsak ding a
Numbers5:25 Siampipa in numei’ khut sung panin upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna lakhia ding a
Numbers5:26 siampipa in phawk nadingin an tawh biakna khut dim khat la-in
Numbers5:27 Amah in a tui a dawnsak khit ciangin
Numbers5:28 Ahih hangin amahmah kininsak hi loin a siang ahih leh
Numbers5:29 “Zi khat in a pasal’ ukna nuai-ah om napi-in vak vai-in amahmah a kinitsak ciangin
Numbers5:30 ahih kei leh pasal khat in upmawhna lungsim nei-in a zi a upmawh ciangin
Numbers5:31 Pasal in mawhna panin suakta ding a
Numbers6:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers6:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in; numei ahi a
Numbers6:3 leenggahzu leh kham theih zu panin a pumpi kikem ding hi; leenggahzu pan ahih kei leh kham theih zu pan a kibawl tuithuk dawn lo ding a
Numbers6:4 Amah a kituam koih hun sung teng leenggui panin a piang bangmah ne lo ding hi
Numbers6:5 “Tuam om dingin a kiciam hun sung teng ama lu tungah mul kiatna kitah lo ding hi; Topa adingin a tuam om hun a cin’ mateng amah a siangtho hi ding hi; amah in a sam a sau-in khawi ding hi.
Numbers6:6 “ Topa adingin a tuam om hun sung teng mi si luang kiangah pai lo ding hi.
Numbers6:7 A nu
Numbers6:8 A tuam om hun sung teng Topa ’ adingin a siangtho ahi hi.
Numbers6:9 “Mi khatpeuh ama gei-ah thakhatin si-in
Numbers6:10 A ni giat ni-in amah in siampipa kiang kikhopna buk kongah vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhu no nih paipih ding a
Numbers6:11 siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nadingin khat pia-in
Numbers6:12 a tuam om ding hun sung teng Topa adingin amah tuam omin
Numbers6:13 “A tuam om hun a cin’ ciangin zuih ding Nazir ngeina in hih ahi hi: kikhopna buk kongah amah kipaipih ding a
Numbers6:14 amah in Topa tungah a letsong ahi meihal biak nadingin kum khat a pha sitbang lo tuuno a pa khat
Numbers6:15 leh silngo sawhloh anlum lawh khat
Numbers6:16 Siampipa in Topa ’ mai-ah tuate paipihin a khialhna hanga biakna leh a meihal biakna pia ding a
Numbers6:17 a tuutal pen Topa tungah thunuam-a biakna-in silngo sawhloh anlum lawh tawh pia khawm ding hi; an tawh biakna leh leenggahzu tawh a biakna zong siampipa in pia ding hi.

Numbers8:1 Tu-in Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers8:2 “Aaron tungah hih bangin gen in. Meivakte na koih ciangin
Numbers8:3 Aaron in tua mah bangin hih hi; Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin
Numbers8:4 Hih in meivakkhuam a kibawlna zia hi a
Numbers8:5 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers8:6 “Israel mite panin Levi mite la khia in la
Numbers8:7 Amaute sian’sak nadingin hih bangin na hih ding hi: sian’suahna tui amaute tungah theh in la
Numbers8:8 Tua ciangin bawngtalno khat leh sathau leh annel a kibawl an tawh biakna amaute na la sak ding a
Numbers8:9 Kikhopna buk mai-ah Levi mite paipihin
Numbers8:10 Topa mai-ah Levi mite na paipih ciangin
Numbers8:11 amaute in Topa ’ na a sep theih nadingun Aaron in Israel mite sung panin Levi mite Topa mai-ah veii-a biakna-in a pia ding hi.
Numbers8:12 Tua ciangin Levi mite in bawngtalte lu tungah a khut uh nga ding uh hi; Levi mite’ ading kilemna bawlsakna dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in khat
Numbers8:13 Aaron leh a tapate’ mai-ah Levi mite na koih ding a
Numbers8:14 “Tua ciangin Israel mite lak panin Levi mite na khenkhia ding a Levi mite in keima’ aa hi ding hi.
Numbers8:15 Amaute siangsakin veii-a biakna-in na piak khit ciangin kikhopna bukah nasem dingin Levi mite pai ding uh hi.
Numbers8:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite’ lak panin kei tungah amaute hong kipia khin hi; naubu a hong
Numbers8:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh
Numbers8:18 Israel mite lak panin tacil khempeuh tangdingin Levi mite ka la khin hi.
Numbers8:19 Kikhopna bukah Israel mite adingin na a sem ding leh
Numbers8:20 Tua bangin Moses leh Aaron leh Israel mi honpite khempeuh in Levi mite tungah hih uh hi; Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses tungah a thupiak khempeuh tawh kizui-in Israel mite in amaute tungah hih uh hi.
Numbers8:21 Levi mite in khialhna panin amaute kisiangthosak tawm uh a
Numbers8:22 Tua khit ciangin Aaron leh a tapate omna kikhopna buk sungah nasem dingin Levi mite pai uh hi; Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in Levi mite tungah a hih uh hi.
Numbers8:23 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers8:24 “Hih in Levi mite tawh a kisai thu ahi hi; kum sawmnih leh kumnga pan a tungsiah a phate in kikhopna buk nasepna sungah na a sem dingin pai ding uh hi;
Numbers8:25 kum sawmnga a phak uh cianga kipan nasepna panin amau kihemkhia-in na sem nawn lo ding uh hi;
Numbers8:26 ahih hangin kikhopna buk sungah a sanggamte huh ding uh a

Numbers9:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in. Note lakah mi khatpeuh ahi a

Numbers9:14 Note lakah khualmi khat hong peemin
Numbers9:15 Biakbuk a kidin’sak ni-in meii in teci pan’na puanbuk ahi
Numbers9:16 Tua bangin om den hi; sun-in meii in tuam a

Numbers9:18 Topa in thu a piak ciangin Israel mite a ding khia uh a

Numbers9:20 Biakbuk tungah ni tawmno sung meii om thei zel hi; tua bang ciangin Topa ’ thupiak bangin giahphual ah amaute om uh hi; tua ciangin Topa ’ thupiakna mah tawh amaute a ding khia uh hi.
Numbers9:21 Khat veivei nitak-a kipan zingsang dong tua meii om hi; zingsangin meii a kilak toh ciangin amaute a ding khia uh hi; tua hi kei leh

Numbers9:23 Topa ’ thupiakna tawh amaute in giahphual sat uh a
Numbers10:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers10:2 “Ngun peengkul nih bawl in; tuate na bawl ciangin na seek ding hi; mi honte khop nading leh giahphual nusiat nadingin na zang ding hi.
Numbers10:3 A nih-in a kitum ciangin kikhopna buk kong nangma kiangah mihon khempeuh hong kikhawm ding uh hi.
Numbers10:4 Ahih hangin amaute in khat bek a tum leh Israel minamte’ lutangte ahi makaite nangma kiangah hong kikhawm ding uh hi.
Numbers10:5 Theihsakna na tum ciangin nisuahna lam panga giahphualate ding khia ding uh hi.
Numbers10:6 Theihsakna a nih veina na tum ciangin leitaw lam panga giahphual a
Numbers10:7 Mihonte a kikaih khop ding ciangin na tum ding a
Numbers10:8 Aaron’ tapa siampite in peengkulte tum ding uh hi. Peengkul zatna in na khang tawntungun note adingin a kip den ngeina khat hi ding hi.
Numbers10:9 Na gam sung uhah no hong nengniam na galte uh tawh na kido ding uh ciangin
Numbers10:10 Na lungdam hun uh
Numbers10:11 A kum nihna
Numbers10:12 Sinai gamlak panin Israel mite phual khat pan phual khatah ding khia uh hi; Paran gamlakah meii khawl hi.
Numbers10:13 Moses tung tawnin Topa ’ thupiakna tawh khualzin cilna kipan uh hi.
Numbers10:14 Judah mite’ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawl pawlin ding khia masa uh hi; tua mihonte Amminadab’ tapa Nahshon in uk hi.
Numbers10:15 Issakhar minam honte Zuar’ tapa Nethanel in uk hi.
Numbers10:16 Zebulun minam honte Helon’ tapa Eliab in uk hi.
Numbers10:17 Biakbuk a kiphel khit ciangin
Numbers10:18 Reuben’ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawl pawlin ding khia uh hi; tua mihonte Shedeur’ tapa Elizur in uk hi.
Numbers10:19 Simeon minam honpite Zurishaddai’ tapa Shelumiel in uk hi.
Numbers10:20 Gad minam honpite De-uel’ tapa Eliasaf in uk hi.
Numbers10:21 Tua ciangin a siangtho nate pua-in Kohath mite ding khia uh a
Numbers10:22 Efraim mite’ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawl pawlin ding khia uh hi; tua mihonte Ammihud’ tapa Elishama in uk hi.
Numbers10:23 Manasseh minam honte Pedahzur’ tapa Gamaliel in uk hi.
Numbers10:24 Benjamin minam honte Gideoni’ tapa Abidan in uk hi.
Numbers10:25 Tua ciangin giahphualte khempeuh’ nung dalin Dan mite’ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawl pawlin ding khia uh hi; tua mi honte Ammishaddai’ tapa Ahiezer in uk hi.
Numbers10:26 Asher minam honte Okran’ tapa Pagiel in uk hi.
Numbers10:27 Naftali minam honte Enan’ tapa Ahira in uk hi.
Numbers10:28 Hih in Israel mite a din’ khiat uh ciangin amau’ mihonte tawh kizui-in a paina zia uh ahi hi.
Numbers10:29 Moses in ama zi sanggampa ahi
Numbers10:30 Ahih hangin amah in
Numbers10:31 Amah in
Numbers10:32 Kote hong zui lecin
Numbers10:33 Tua ahih ciangin Topa ’ mual panin ni thum lam a pai uh hi; a tawlngak nading mun uh a zon’sak dingin Topa ’ thuciamna singkuang in amau mai ni thum lam na pai khol hi.
Numbers10:34 Giahphual panin a din’ khiat peuhmah uh ciangin sun-in amaute tungah Topa ’ meii a om hi.
Numbers10:35 Singkuang a din’ khiat peuhmah ciangin Moses in
Numbers10:36 A khawl ciangin
Numbers11:1 Mi honte in amau’ tuahsiatna thu hangin Topa ’ zakin phun uh hi; Topa in tua thu a zak ciangin ama hehna so a
Numbers11:2 Tua ciangin Moses’ zak dingin mite kiko uh hi; Moses in Topa tungah thu ngen a
Numbers11:3 Tua ahih manin tua mun pen Taberah kici hi
Numbers11:4 Tu-in amaute’ lakah a om gamdang mite in anlim a lunggulh mahmah uh hi; Israel mite zong kap kik uh a
Numbers11:5 Izipt ah man pia loin i nek ngasate
Numbers11:6 ahih hangin tu-in i tha bei ta a
Numbers11:7 Manna pen nannan tang tawh kibang a
Numbers11:8 Mite pai kawikawi-in khawm uh a
Numbers11:9 Zan-in giahphual tungah daitui a kiat ciangin manna tawh kia khawm hi.
Numbers11:10 Mite a innkuankuan-un
Numbers11:11 Moses in Topa kiangah
Numbers11:12 Keimah in hih mite khempeuh paii ka hi hiam? Nangmah in kei kiangah
Numbers11:13 Hih mite khempeuh piak ding koi lai-ah sa ngah ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mai-ah amaute kap-in
Numbers11:14 Kei guak in hih mite khempeuh ka si zo kei hi
Numbers11:15 Hih bangin kei hong bawl ding na hih leh
Numbers11:16 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers11:17 Keimah hong pai sukin tua munah nang tawh i kiho ding hi; keimah in nang sunga om lungsim pawl khat la-in amaute sungah ka guang ding hi; nang guak in na puak loh nadingin amaute in mite’ vangik hong puakpih ding uh hi.
Numbers11:18 Mite tungah
Numbers11:19 Note in ni khat sung
Numbers11:20 na ikkhiat dong uh leh na kih dong matengun kha khat tawntung na ne ding uh hi
Numbers11:21 Ahih hangin Moses in
Numbers11:22 Amaute’ kham zah dingin tuu honte leh bawng honte amau’ adingin kigo ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh tuipi ngasate khempeuh amau’ kham zah ding kiman ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
Numbers11:23 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers11:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses paikhia-in mite tungah Topa ’ thugente gen sawn hi; amah in mite a makai mi sawmsagih kaikhawmin
Numbers11:25 Tua ciangin meii sungah Topa hong pai sukin amah hopih a
Numbers11:26 Giahphual ah mi nih om uh a

Numbers11:28 Ama teel mite lakah khat ahi
Numbers11:29 Ahih hangin Moses in ama kiangah
Numbers11:30 Moses leh Israel upate giahphual ah a ciahkik uh hi.
Numbers11:31 Topa kiang pan huih nungin
Numbers11:32 Tua sun tawntung leh a zan tawntung leh a zing ciang tawntung mite ding-in vamimte khawm uh hi; tawm a khawm pen mipa in beem sawm dim khawm hi; amaute in amau adingin giahphual kimkotah tuate pho uh hi.
Numbers11:33 Sa a kigaih ma
Numbers11:34 Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Kibrothhattavah kici hi
Numbers11:35 Kibrothhattavah panin Hazeroth munah mite zin uh hi; Hazeroth ah amaute taam uh hi.

Numbers13:2 “Israel mite tungah ka piak Kanaan leitang a vaan dingin mi sawl in; amaute lakah makai ahi

Numbers13:4 Hihte in amaute’ min ahi hi: Reuben minam panin Zakkur’ tapa Shamua;
Numbers13:5 Simeon minam panin Hori’ tapa Shafat;
Numbers13:6 Judah minam panin Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb;
Numbers13:7 Issakhar minam panin Josef’ tapa Igal;
Numbers13:8 Efraim minam panin Nun’ tapa Hoshea;
Numbers13:9 Benjamin minam panin Rafu’ tapa Palti;
Numbers13:10 Zebulun minam panin Sedi’ tapa Gaddel;
Numbers13:11 Josef minam (Manasseh minam) panin Susi’ tapa Gaddi;
Numbers13:12 Dan minam panin Gemalli’ tapa Ammiel;
Numbers13:13 Asher minam panin Mikhael’ tapa Sethur;
Numbers13:14 Naftali minam panin Vofsi’ tapa Nahbi;
Numbers13:15 Gad minam panin Makhi’ tapa Ge-uel ahi hi.
Numbers13:16 Hihte in gam vaan dinga Moses in a sawl mite’ min ahi hi. Moses in Nun’ tapa Hoshea pen Joshua ci hi.
Numbers13:17 Moses in Kanaan gam vaan dingin amaute sawl a
Numbers13:18 leitang bang ci hiam
Numbers13:19 amau’ ten’na gam in nuntak olna gam hiam haksatna gam hiam
Numbers13:20 a leitang a lei hoih hiam lei sia hiam
Numbers13:21 Tua ahih ciangin amaute pai to-in Zin gamlak panin Hamath khua lutna gei
Numbers13:22 Amaute Negeb lamah paito uh a
Numbers13:23 Amaute Eshkol Kuam tung uh a
Numbers13:24 Tua lai panin Israel mite in leenggah bawk a lawhna hangin tua mun pen Eshkol Kuam kici hi.
Numbers13:25 Ni sawmli a cin’ ciangin gam vaanna panin amaute hong ciahkik uh hi.
Numbers13:26 Paran gamlak Kadesh muna Moses leh Aaron leh Israel mi honte khempeuh kiangah amaute hong tung uh hi; amaute leh mihon khempeuh tungah thu puak kik uh a
Numbers13:27 Amaute in ama kiangah
Numbers13:28 Ahi zongin tua gama teeng mite thahat uh a
Numbers13:29 Amalek mite Negeb gamah teeng uh hi; Hih mite
Numbers13:30 Ahih hangin Kaleb in Moses mai-ah mite gamdai sakin

Numbers15:4 biakna a paipih mipa in annel seu khat sehsawm suah sehkhat sathau bung khat sehli suah sehkhat tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna Topa tungah pia ding hi;

Numbers18:2 Amaute in nang hong pawlin
Numbers18:3 Amaute in note hong huhin puanbuk nasep khempeuh sem ding uh hi; ahih hangin note leh amaute si kha ding na hih ciangun biakinn nazatte leh biakna tau kiangah pai lo ding uh hi.

Numbers18:6 En un
Numbers18:7 Nang leh na tapate in biakna tau tawh kisai nate leh dalna puan sunga om nate khempeuhah na siampi nasep uh na sem ding uh hi; na siampi nasep uh letsongin kong piak hi a

Numbers18:9 Hih in mei tawh hal dingte lak panin a kisiit

Numbers18:12 Sathau a limci pen khempeuh

Numbers18:18 ahih hangin a kiveii sa-iik leh a taklam phei nomau aa ahih mah bangin

Numbers18:23 Ahih hangin Levi mite in kikhopna buk nasep sem ding uh a
Numbers18:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in biakna-in Topa tungah a piak uh Israel mite’ sehsawm suah sehkhat pen Levi mite tungah luah dingin ka pia khin hi; tua ahih ciangin Israel mite lakah amaute in luah a neih loh ding uh ka gensa ahi hi

Numbers29:1 “A kha sagihna a ni masa ni-in kikhopna siangtho khat na nei ding uh hi; leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua pen note in peengkul na tum ni ding uh hi a

Numbers29:16 a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna
Numbers29:17 “A ni nih ni-in bawngtalno sawm-le-nih
Numbers29:18 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:19 a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna leh an tawh a biakna leh leenggahzu tawh a biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:20 “A ni thum ni-in bawngtal sawm-le-khat
Numbers29:21 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:22 a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna leh an tawh a biakna leh leenggahzu tawh a biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:23 “A ni li ni-in bawngtal sawm
Numbers29:24 ngeina om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:25 a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna
Numbers29:26 “A ni nga ni-in bawngtal kua
Numbers29:27 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:28 a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna leh an tawh a biakna leh leenggahzu tawh a biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:29 “A ni guk ni-in bawngtal giat
Numbers29:30 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:31 a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna
Numbers29:32 “A ni sagih ni-in bawngtal sagih
Numbers29:33 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:34 a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna
Numbers29:35 “A ni giat ni-in a zahtakhuai kikhopna na nei ding uh hi; leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh hi
Numbers29:36 meihal biakna
Numbers29:37 leh ngeina kip om bangin bawngtal
Numbers29:38 a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna leh an tawh biakna leh leenggahzu tawh a biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:39 “Na thuciam biak piakna uh leh ut thu-a na biak piaknate uh banah na meihal biaknate

Numbers31:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers31:2 “Israel mite’ phu Midiante tungah la in; tua khit ciangin na mite kiangah nang hong kigawm ding hi
Numbers31:3 Tua ciangin Moses in mite kiangah
Numbers31:4 Israel minamte nam khat panin tul khat ciat gal sungah na kuansak ding uh hi
Numbers31:5 Tua ahih ciangin Israel tul tampi sung pan minam khatah tul khat
Numbers31:6 Moses in amaute’ minam khat panin tul khat ciat leh biakinn nate leh pataukoh nadingin peengkulte siampi Eleazar’ tapa Finehas kengsakin gal sungah kuansak khawm hi.
Numbers31:7 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Midiante do uh a
Numbers31:8 Amaute in midangte leh Midian kumpite a thatna uhah Midian kumpi ngate Evi
Numbers31:9 Israel mite in Midian nupite leh a tate uh man uh hi; amaute in a bawngte
Numbers31:10 Amau’ ten’na a khuapite khempeuh uh leh a giahphual khempeuhte uh mei tawh halsak uh a
Numbers31:11 a matsa khempeuh uh
Numbers31:12 Tua ciangin amaute in Jerikho nai
Numbers31:13 Moses leh siampi Eleazar leh mihon makaite khempeuh giahphual pua-ah a dawn dingin paikhia uh hi.

Numbers31:15 Moses in amaute tungah
Numbers31:16 En un
Numbers31:17 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in
Numbers31:18 Ahih hangin lupkhopna tawh pasal a thei nai lo nungaknote khempeuh note adingin kem un.
Numbers31:19 Giahphual pua-ah ni sagih sung om un; note lakah mi khatpeuh peuh a thatte leh a kithatsa a lawng peuhmahte in
Numbers31:20 Puan khempeuh
