Numbers31:22 kham
Numbers31:23 mei a do zo peuhmahte bek mei-ah na hal ding uh a
Numbers31:24 A ni sagih ni-in na puante uh na sawp ding uh a
Numbers31:25 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers31:26 “Nang leh siampi Eleazar leh mihonte’ beh lutangte in gal sunga a kiman mihing leh ganhingte sim un;
Numbers31:27 galdo dingin a kuankhia galhangte leh mihonte khempeuh tungah gal sunga a kimante khennih suahin a kikimin hawm sak in.
Numbers31:28 Galdo dingin a kuankhia galkapte’ tung panin mite
Numbers31:29 a lang a ngah sung panun la in la
Numbers31:30 A lang Israel mite in a ngah sung panin mite
Numbers31:31 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses leh siampi Eleazar in hih uh hi.
Numbers31:32 Tu-in galkapte in a lak gal sunga a mat uh a om lai a kihawm dingte in: tuu tul zaguk leh tul sawmsagih leh tulnga
Numbers31:33 bawng tul sawmsagih leh tulnih
Numbers31:34 la tul sawmguk leh tul khat
Numbers31:35 leh lupkhopna tawh pasal a thei nailo numei a vekpi-in mi tul sawmthum leh tulnih ahi hi.
Numbers31:36 A lang ahi
Numbers31:37 Topa ’ tuu-siah pen tuu za guk leh sawmsagih leh nga ahi hi.
Numbers31:38 Bawngte tul sawmthum leh tulguk hi a
Numbers31:39 Late tul sawmthum leh za nga hi a
Numbers31:40 Mi tul sawm leh tulguk hi a
Numbers31:41 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin
Numbers31:42 Galdo dingin a kuankhia mite tung panin Moses in a khenkhiat
Numbers31:43 mihonte in a lang a ngah teng tuu tul za thum leh tul sawmthum leh tul sagih leh za nga
Numbers31:44 bawng tul sawmthum leh tulguk
Numbers31:45 la tul sawmthum leh za nga
Numbers31:46 mi tul sawm leh tul guk ahi hi—
Numbers31:47 Moses in Israelte in a ngah a lang sung panin mihing leh ganhing sawmnga ciangin khat ciat la-in
Numbers31:48 Tua ciangin galkap tul tampite tunga uliante ahi

Numbers35:1 Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab leizangah Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers35:2 “Amaute in amau’ neih a luah uh sung panin ten’ nadingin Levi mite tungah khuapi a piak nadingun Israel mite thu pia in: khuapi kiim-a lonona gamte Levi mite tungah na pia ding hi.
Numbers35:3 Khuapite in amau’ ten’ nading hi ding a
Numbers35:4 Levi mite tungah na piak ding uh khuapi lonona gamte in khuapi kulh panin a kimkot tong tul ciang bang ding hi.
Numbers35:5 Khuapi pualam na teh ding a
Numbers35:6 Levi mite tungah na piak uh khuapite in bukna khuapi gukte hi ding a
Numbers35:7 Levi mite tungah na piak uh khuapi khempeuh in sawmli leh giat hi-in
Numbers35:8 Israel mite’ neihsa sung panin na piak ding khuapite in
Numbers35:9 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers35:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Jordan kantanin Kanaan gamah na tun uh ciangin
Numbers35:11 sawm lopi-in mi khatpeuh a that kha mi thatte a va tai theih nadingin note adingin bukna khuapi dingin khuapite na teel ding uh hi.
Numbers35:12 Thu kikhen dingin mi honpi mai-ah a din’ ma-in mi thatte a sih loh nadingin khuapite in phulapa’ kiang panin note’ adingin bukna hi ding hi.
Numbers35:13 Na piak uh khuapite in note’ bukna khuapi gukte hi ding hi.
Numbers35:14 Bukna khuapi dingin Jordan gal khatah khuapi thum
Numbers35:15 Sawm lopi-in mi khatpeuh a that khate a tai theih nadingin hih khuapi gukte in Israel mite leh khual mite leh note lakah a peemte’ adingin bukna hi ding hi.
Numbers35:16 “Ahih hangin amah in na-a kizang sik khat tawh amah satin amah a sih leh
Numbers35:17 Amah in
Numbers35:18 Tua ahih kei leh
Numbers35:19 A kinaipih pen khat in a phu la-in mi thatpa that ding hi; amah a tuah ciangin that ding hi.

Numbers35:21 tua ahih kei leh galbawlna tawh a khut-in tumin a sih leh
Numbers35:22 “Ahih hangin gal bawl lopi-in thakhatin amah sunin
Numbers35:23 ahih kei leh
Numbers35:24 mi thatpa leh a phulapa kikalah hih ngeina kipte tawh kizui-in mihonpi in khen ding hi;
Numbers35:25 a phulapa’ khut sung panin mihonpi in mi thatpa honkhia-in
Numbers35:26 Ahih hangin hun khatpeuh peuhah amah a taina bukna khuapi gamgi kheng in a pai a
Numbers35:27 a phulapa in ama bukna khuapi daihual pua lamah amah mu-in
Numbers35:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh siampi lianpa a sih matengin tua mipa a bukna khuapi sungah a om ding ahi hi; ahih hangin siampi lianpa a sih khit ciangin mi thatpa a neihsa leitangah ciahkik thei ding hi.
Numbers35:29 “Hihte in na ten’na khempeuh uhah na khang tawntungun thukham leh ngeina hi ding hi.
Numbers35:30 Khatpeuh in mi khat a thah leh
Numbers35:31 Tua tham loin
Numbers35:32 Siampi lianpa a sih ma-in bukna khuapi ah a taisa mipa a gamah a ciahkik theih nadingin ama nuntakna tat nading sum na sang kei ding uh hi.
Numbers35:33 Na ten’na leitang uh na ninsak kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi thahna in leitang ninsak a
Numbers35:34 A laizangah keimah ka ten’na
Numbers36:1 Josef tapate beh Manasseh
Numbers36:2 amaute in
Numbers36:3 Ahih hangin Israel sungah minam dangte’ tapate khatpeuh peuh tawh amaute kiteng leh a pate uh’ luahna panin amau aa teng kilakhia-in a manawh minamte tungah tua luahna kipia beh ding hi; tua ahih ciangin ko’ ngahsa luahna panin a kikhen khia ding ahi hi.
Numbers36:4 Israel mite’ jubili hong tun ciangin
Numbers36:5 Moses in Topa genna tawh kizui-in Israel mite thu pia a
Numbers36:6 Hih in Zelofehad’ tanute tawh kisai-in Topa thupiak ahi hi; Amaute in hoih a sak pente uh tawh kiteng hen; ahih hangin amau’ behte bek ten’pih thei ding uh hi.
Numbers36:7 Israel mite’ gamhte minam khat pan namdang khatah paikhia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mi khempeuh a minam ciat uh tawh kip ding uh hi.
Numbers36:8 Israel mite khempeuh in a pate’ uh gamh a luah theih nadingun
Numbers36:9 Tua ahih ciangin minam khat pan a dangah gamh paikhia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite sung panin minam khempeuh amau’ gamh ciat tawh kip ding uh hi
Numbers36:10 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Zelofehad’ tanute gamta uh hi;
Numbers36:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Zelofehad’ tanu Mahlah
Numbers36:12 Josef’ ta Manasseh’ tapate innkuan sungah amaute in pasal nei uh a
Numbers36:13 Hihte in Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab leizangah Israel mite tungah Moses tung tawnin Topa in a piak thupiaknate leh ngeina kipte ahi hi.

Deuteronomy5:4 -

Deuteronomy5:8 “A kiseek milim hita leh
Deuteronomy5:9 amaute mai-ah kun loin
Deuteronomy5:10 ahih hangin kei hong it-in ka thupiakte a zui mi a tul tampite tungah itna kip a lakpa ka hi hi.

Deuteronomy5:12 “ Topa na Pasian in hong thupiak bangin na siangthosak dingin sabbath ni tang in.
Deuteronomy5:13 Ni guk sung na semin na nasep ding khempeuh na hih ding hi;
Deuteronomy5:14 ahih hangin a ni sagih ni in Topa na Pasian’ sabbath ni ahi hi; tua ni-in nangmah bangin na nasem pasal leh na nasem numeite a tawlngak theih nadingin
Deuteronomy5:15 Izipt gamah nasem na hihna leh tua lai panin Topa na Pasian in a vangliatna khut leh a thahatna tawh hong paikhiatpihna na phawk ding hi; tua ahih ciangin sabbath ni na tan’ ding Topa na Pasian in thu hong pia hi.
Deuteronomy5:16 “ Topa na Pasian in hong piak leitang tungah na khan’ sau-in na nopsak theih nadingin Topa na Pasian in hong thupiak bangin na nu na pa zahtak in.

Deuteronomy5:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh a si thei mihing khempeuh sung panin eite’ zak bangin mei sung panin a nungta Pasian a paukhiatna awging za-in

Deuteronomy6:8 Na khut tung uhah lim dingin tuate na hen ding uh a

Deuteronomy6:13 Topa na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; ama na bek na sem ding uh a

Deuteronomy6:15 bang hang hiam cih leh note lakah a om Topa na Pasian uh in a aam Pasian ahi hi; tua bang hi kei leh note tungah Topa na Pasian uh hong hehin lei maitang panin note hong susia ding hi.
Deuteronomy6:16 “Massah ah amah na ze-et uh bangin Topa na Pasian uh na ze-et nawn kei ding uh hi.

Deuteronomy6:21 na tapate uh kiangah

Deuteronomy6:24 Tu hun-a bangin i nuntak theih nadingin amah in eite’ hoih tawntung nading deihna ah Topa i Pasian zahtakin hih thukhamte khempeuh i zuih ding Topa in thu hong pia hi.

Deuteronomy7:1 “ Topa na Pasian un luah dinga na tumna uh leitangah hong paipihin
Deuteronomy7:2 Topa na Pasian un note tungah amaute hong pia-in
Deuteronomy7:3 Amaute tawh kiteeng loin
Deuteronomy7:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh pasian dangte na sem dingin keimah zuihna panin na tapate uh amaute in heikhia ding uh hi. Tua ciangin no tungah Topa ’ hehna hong so-in note hong susia pak ding hi.
Deuteronomy7:5 Note in amau tungah hih bangin na gamta ding uh hi: a biakna taute uh phelsakin
Deuteronomy7:6 “Bang hang hiam cih leh note in Topa note’ Pasian tungah a siangtho mi na hi uh hi; lei maitang-a om mite khempeuh sung panin a neih manpha ama mi ahi dingin Topa na Pasian un note hong teel zo hi.
Deuteronomy7:7 Topa in note hong itin hong teelna in midangte sangin na tam zawkna hang uh hi lo hi
Deuteronomy7:8 Topa in salsuahna Izipt kumpipa Faro khut sung panin note hong tankhia-in a vangliatna tawh hong paikhiatpihna in Topa in note hong itin
Deuteronomy7:9 Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian uh Pasian hi a
Deuteronomy7:10 amah a mudah mite a maitang uhah suksiatna tawh a thukpahpa ahihna thei un; amah a mudah mi tungah zekai loin a maitang mah ah thuk ding hi.
Deuteronomy7:11 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni-a no kong thupiak ahi thupiakna
Deuteronomy7:12 “Note in hih ngeina kipte za-in
Deuteronomy7:13 amah in note hong itin
Deuteronomy7:14 Midangte khempeuh sangin note thupha hong kilim piak zaw ding hi; note lak hita leh na ganhingte lak uh hita leh a nu ahi a
Deuteronomy7:15 Topa in note tung panin natna khempeuh lakhia ding hi; note in na theihsa uh ahi Izipt gam-a natna siate note tungah khat zong hong tung lo ding a
Deuteronomy7:16 Topa na Pasian un no tungah hong piak mi khempeuh na beisak ding uh a
Deuteronomy7:17 “Na lungsim uhah
Deuteronomy7:18 amaute na kihta kei ding uh hi
Deuteronomy7:19 na mitte un a muhsa a lian ze-etnate
Deuteronomy7:20 Tua tham loin
Deuteronomy7:21 Note in amaute na kihta kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a lian a kihtakhuai ahi Pasian
Deuteronomy7:22 Topa na Pasian un note mai-ah hih minamte tawm tawmin siang khiasak ding hi; note adingin gamsate hong tam khan’ lua kha ding ahih manin amaute thakhat thu-in na beisak kei ding uh hi.
Deuteronomy7:23 Ahih hangin Topa na Pasian un note tungah amaute hong pia ding a
Deuteronomy7:24 Amah in note khut sungah amaute’ kumpite hong pia ding a

Deuteronomy28:9 Note in Topa na Pasian uh hong thupiaknate zui-in ama lampi na tot uh leh amah in note tungah hong ciamsa bangin ama adingin a siangtho mi dingin Topa in note hong kipsak ding hi.

Joshua1:1 Topa ’ nasem Moses a sih khit ciangin Topa in Moses’ nasem ahi Nun’ tapa Joshua kiangah
Joshua1:2 “Ka nasempa Moses si ta hi; tua ahih ciangin tu-in ding in la
Joshua1:3 Moses tungah ka ciam bangin na khe in a totna mun khempeuh nang tungah kong pia ding hi.
Joshua1:4 Gamlak leh hih Lebanon panin gun lianpi ahi Eufrates gun dong
Joshua1:5 Na nuntak sung tawntung kuamah in na mai hong khak zo lo ding hi; Moses tawh ka om mah bangin nang tawh zong kong om ding hi; nang kong tamasak kei ding a
Joshua1:6 Thahat in la hang in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute piak dingin a pate uh tungah ka ciam leitang hih mite na luahsak ding hi.
Joshua1:7 Thahat-in hang in la
Joshua1:8 Hih thukham laibu na mangngilh ngei kei ding hi. A sunga a kigelh thute khempeuh tawh kizui-in na gamtat theihna dingin sun leh zanin na lungngaingai ding hi; tua hi leh na lampi mavang ding a
Joshua1:9 Thu hong pia khin hilo ka hi hiam? Thahat in la hang in; lau kei in la
Joshua1:10 Tua ciangin Joshua in mite’ uliante thu pia-in
Joshua1:11 “Giahphual-ah pai un la
Joshua1:12 Tua ciangin Joshua in Reuben mite
Joshua1:13 “ Topa ’ nasem Moses in note thu hong piakna kammal
Joshua1:14 Moses in Jordan gal khata note hong piak leitangah na zite
Joshua1:15 note hong piak bangin Topa in na sanggamte uh tungah tawlngakna pia-in
Joshua1:16 Amaute in Joshua dawngin

Joshua11:9 Topa ’ sawl bangin Joshua in amaute hih hi; amau’ sakolte uh a zagui sattat sakin mei tawh a leengte uh halsak hi.
Joshua11:10 Tua hun lai takin Joshua kihei kikin Hazor la a
Joshua11:11 Amaute in tua sunga om khempeuh namsau tawh hihin amaute susia mang hi; husang khat zong om nawn lo a
Joshua11:12 Topa ’ nasem Moses in a thu piaksa bangin Joshua in tua kumpite’ khuapite
Joshua11:13 Ahih hangin Hazor khua longal mualtunga om khuapite khat zong Israel mite in hal lo uh hi; Joshua in tua khua hal hi.
Joshua11:14 Israel mite in tua khuapite sunga van kinusiate leh ganhingte amau’ galzawh van dingin la uh hi; ahih hangin amaute a suksiat khit matengun namsau tawh vatgawp uh a
Joshua11:15 Topa in ama nasem Moses a thu piak bangin Moses in zong Joshua thu pia a
Joshua11:16 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in gam khempeuh
Joshua11:17 Seir lamah a kikhung to Halak Mual panin Hermon Mual nuai Lebanon kuam a om Baalgad ciang dong la hi. Amah in amau’ kumpite khempeuh la-in amaute vatgawpin that hi.
Joshua11:18 Hih kumpite khempeuh tawh sauveipi sung Joshua kido hi.
Joshua11:19 Gibeon khua-a teeng Hiv mite longal Israel mite tawh kilemna a bawl khuapi khat zong om lo hi; amaute in tuate khempeuh simin a lak uh ahi hi.
Joshua11:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Moses a thupiakna bangin amaute a kisuksiat mang nading leh hehpihna ngah loin a kibeisak theih nadingin Israelte a do nadingin a lungsim uh khauhsak ding Topa ’ bawl ahi hi.
Joshua11:21 Tua hun lai takin Joshua hong pai-in mualtung gam
Joshua11:22 Israel mite’ leitangah Anak mite khat zong om nawn lo hi; Gaza
Joshua11:23 Topa in Moses tungah a gensa bangin Joshua in leitang khempeuh la hi; tua ciangin Joshua in amau minam tawh kizui-in a ngah ding bangin Israel mite tungah gamh-in pia hi. Tua-a kipan galdona panin tua gam tawlnga hi.

Joshua21:12 Ahih hangin tua khuapi’ lote leh a khua neute pen Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb tungah a neih dingin kipia khin hi.

Joshua21:41 Israel mite’ neihsa lakah Levi mite’ khuapi a vekpi-in a lonona gamte tawh khuapi sawm-le-giat ahi hi.
Joshua21:42 Hih khuapite in a kiim ciatah lonona gam nei hi; hih khuapi khempeuh tua bang ahi hi.

1Samuel1:1 Efraim mi Zuf tapa Tohu
1Samuel1:2 Amah in zi nih nei hi; khat’ min in Hannah hi a
1Samuel1:3 Hih mipa a kum kumin a khuapi panin
1Samuel1:4 Elkanah in biakna a piak ciangin a zi Peninnah leh a tanu leh a tapate khempeuh tungah tanh pia hi;
1Samuel1:5 amah in Hannah a it hangin Topa in amah ta neisak lo ahih manin Hannah tungah tanh nih a pia hi.
1Samuel1:6 Topa in amah ta neisak lo ahih manin amah a el a zipih a lawmnu in amah nakpi takin phin zel
1Samuel1:7 Tua ahih ciangin a kum kumin tua bangin hih uh hi; Topa ’ inn-ah amah a paitoh simin a lawmnu in amah phin zel hi. Tua ahih ciangin Hannah kapin an ne lo hi.
1Samuel1:8 Tua ciangin ama pasal Elkanah in ama kiangah
1Samuel1:9 Amaute in Shiloh-ah ne-in a dawn khit uh ciangin Hannah ding hi. Tu-in Topa ’ biakinn kongkhak khuam pangah siampi Eli tu hi.
1Samuel1:10 Tua nu nakpi takin lungkhamin Topa ’tungah thungenin nakpi takin a kap hi.
1Samuel1:11 Amah in thuciamna khat bawlin
1Samuel1:12 Topa mai-ah thungenin a om lai takin Eli in tua nu’ kam na en hi.
1Samuel1:13 Hannah a lungsim-ah pau hi; a mukte bek liingin a awging kiza lo hi; tua ahih ciangin Eli in tua numei zukhamin ngaihsun hi.

1Samuel1:15 Ahih hangin Hannah in dawngin

1Samuel1:18 Tua ciangin numei in

1Samuel1:20 a hun ciangin Hannah gai-in tapa khat nei a

1Samuel2:10 Topa ’ langte tamkham ding a

1Samuel2:12 Tu-in Eli’ tapate in bangmah man lo mite ahi uh hi; amaute in Topa zahtakna nei lo uh hi.
1Samuel2:13 Mite tungah siampite gamtatzia ding ngeinate don lo uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin a sa a huan lai takin siampipa’ nasempa sikkeu-ka-thum nei khat in a khut-ah tawi-in hong pai a
1Samuel2:14 amah in a sikkeu tawh sikbeel dai ahi a
1Samuel2:15 Tua tham loin a thau a kihal ma-in siampipa’ nasempa hong pai-in biakna a pia mipa kiangah

1Samuel2:17 Tua ahih ciangin Topa muhna-ah tangvalte’ khialhna lian mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mite in thusim lohna tawh Topa tungah biakpiaknate hih uh hi.
1Samuel2:18 Samuel in saihadial siampi puan silhin Topa mai-ah na a sem naupang khat ahi hi.
1Samuel2:19 Samuel’ nu in a pasal tawh kum sim biakna pia dingin a paitoh ciangin ama adingin puantual neu khat bawlin kum simin ama kiangah puak hi.

1Samuel2:24 Hilo hi
1Samuel2:25 Mi khat in mi dang khat tungah a khialh leh ama adingin Pasian in pa-lai sem ding hi; ahih hangin mi khat Topa tungah khial leh ama adingin kua in va thuumsak ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in a pa’ thu ngai lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua in amaute a thah nadingin Topa deihna ahi hi.
1Samuel2:26 Tu-in naupang Samuel a pumpi khangin Topa leh mite’ maipha a ngah toto hi.
1Samuel2:27 Tua ciangin Pasian’ mi khat Eli kiangah hong pai-in ama kiangah
1Samuel2:28 Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin amah ka siampi ahi ding

1Samuel2:31 En in
1Samuel2:32 Tua ciangin Israelte tungah ka piak daupainate khempeuh na lungkham hunin en’na mit tawh na en ding hi; na innkuan sungah puteek om ngei nawn lo ding hi.

1Samuel2:34 Na tapa nihte

1Samuel6:15 Levi mite in Topa ’ thuciamna singkuang leh kham milim a omna a gei-a singkuang la-in tua suangtumpi tungah koih uh hi; Bethshemesh mite in tua ni-in Topa tungah meihal biaknate pia-in biakpiaknate pia uh hi.
1Samuel6:16 Filistia ulian ngate in tua bang teng a muh khit uh ciangin tua ni mah-in Ekron-ah ciahkik uh hi.
1Samuel6:17 Filistiate in mawhna hanga biakna-in Topa tungah a piak uilut lim khamte in: Ashdod ading khat
1Samuel6:18 ulian ngate aa Filistia khuate kulh tawh a ki-um khuapite leh a ki-um lo khua neute a pha zah tawh kizui simbeng lim khamte zong ahi hi. Topa ’ thuciamna singkuang a koihna gei uh-a suangtumpi in Bethshemesh khuami Joshua lo-ah tu ni dongin teci ahi hi.

1Samuel7:9 Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in nawi a ne lai tuuno khat la-in Topa tungah a bup-a meihal biakna-in pia hi; Israelte’ adingin Topa tungah Samuel kiko a
1Samuel7:10 Samuel in meihal biakna a piak lai takin Filistiate in Israelte a do dingin hong naih uh hi; ahih hangin Topa in aw lianpi tawh tua ni-in Filistiate thawn gawpin amaute buaigawp sak hi; Israelte mai-ah amaute kinotkhia hi.

1Samuel16:4 Topa ’ thupiak bangin Samuel gamta-in Bethlehem ah pai hi. Tua khuapi upate a liingsa-in amah dawn dingin hong pai uh a

1Samuel16:11 Tua ciangin Samuel in Jessi kiangah
1Samuel16:12 Jessi in amah samsakin amah hong tumpih hi. Amah in cidam mel pua-in
1Samuel16:13 Tua ciangin Samuel in a sathau biing sunga sathau la-in a sanggamte laizangah amah sathau nilh hi. Tua ni a kipanin Topa ’ Kha khauh takin David tungah hong tung hi. Tua ciangin Samuel ding-in Ramah ah ciah hi.

1Samuel16:15 Saul’ nasemte in ama kiangah

2Samuel3:1 Saul’ innkuan leh David’ innkuante kikalah sau veipi gal kidona om hi; David thahat semsemin
2Samuel3:2 Hebron ah David’ tapate suak hi; a tacil in Jezre-el khuami Ahinoam tawh a neih Ammon ahi hi;
2Samuel3:3 a ta nihna in Karmel khuami Nabal’ zi meigongnu Abigail tawh a neih Khileab ahi hi; a thumna in Geshur kumpipa Talmai’ tanu Ma-akah’ tapa Absalom ahi hi.
2Samuel3:4 A lina in Haggith’ tapa Adonijah ahi hi; a ngana in Abital’ tapa Shefatiah ahi hi.
2Samuel3:5 A gukna in David’ zi Eglah ta Ithream ahi hi. Hihte Hebron khua-ah David’ sungpan hong suak hi.
2Samuel3:6 Saul’ innkuan leh David innkuante a kido sungin Saul’ innkuan sungah Abner amahmah kihatsak tawm hi.

2Samuel13:17 Amah in a na a sepsak tangvalpa samin

2Samuel19:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka to kumpipa’ mai-ah ka pa’ innkuante khempeuh a si zah dong dingin a sia ahi hi; ahih hangin nangmah in na sabuai-ah a ne mite lakah na nasempa na koih hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa tungah ka koh ding thu bang nei thuah nawn ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi.

1Kings4:1 Kumpi Solomon in Israel khempeuh tungah kumpi hi a
1Kings4:2 hihte in ama nuai-ah za lian a neite ahi hi: Zadok’ tapa Azariah in siampi ahi hi;
1Kings4:3 Shisha’ tapa Elihoref leh Ahijah in lai-atte ahi uh hi; Ahilud’ tapa Jehoshafat in thuciamtehpa ahi hi;
1Kings4:4 Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah in galkapte a uk ahi hi; Zadok leh Abiathar in siampite ahi uh hi;
1Kings4:5 Nathan’ tapa Azariah in uliante tungah a uk ahi hi; Nathan’ tapa Zabud in siampi leh kumpipa lam a lakpa ahi hi;
1Kings4:6 Ahishar in kumpipa inn uk ahi hi; Abda’ tapa Adoniram in aana tawh na a semte a uk ahi hi.
1Kings4:7 Solomon in Israel khempeuh tungah ulian sawm-le-nih nei-in tuate in kumpipa leh a innkuan adingin annek tuidawn pia hi; mi khat in kum khatin kha khat sung annek tuidawn pia uh hi.
1Kings4:8 Hihte in amaute’ min ahi hi: Efraim mualtung gam sungah Benhur;
1Kings4:9 Makaz khua
1Kings4:10 Arubboth khua sungah Benhesed (Soko leh Hefer gam khempeuh ama aa hi);
1Kings4:11 Nafathdor gamsung khempeuh ah Benabinadab (amah in Solomon’ tanu Tafath zi-in nei hi);
1Kings4:12 Ta-anak khua
1Kings4:13 Ramoth-gilead gam sungah Ben-geber (Amah in Gilead sunga om Manasseh’ tapa Jair’ khua neute leh Bashan sungah a om Argob gamsung
1Kings4:14 Mahanaim khua sungah Iddo’ tapa Ahinadab;
1Kings4:15 Naftali gam sungah Ahima-az (amah in Solomon’ tanu Basemath zi-in la hi);
1Kings4:16 Asher gam leh Bealoth khua sungah Hushai’ tapa Baana;
1Kings4:17 Issakhar gam sungah Paruah’ tapa Jehoshafat;
1Kings4:18 Benjamin gam sungah Ela’ tapa Shimei;
1Kings4:19 Amor mite kumpi Sihon leh Bashan kumpi Og gam ahi Gilead gam sungah Uri’ tapa Geber ahi hi. Tua ciangin hih sawm-le-nihte banah Judah gam sungah ulian khat om lai hi.
1Kings4:20 Judah leh Israelte tuipi gei-a sehnel bangin tam uh hi; amaute in ne-in dawnin lungdam uh hi.
1Kings4:21 Solomon in Eufrates panin Filistiate’ gam leh Izipt gamgi ciang dong kumpi gam khempeuh uk hi; amaute in siah hong puak uh a
1Kings4:22 Solomon’ ading ni khatin annek tuidawn in annel lawh sawmthum
1Kings4:23 bawngtal a thau sawm
1Kings4:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Eufrates nitumna lam gamsung khempeuh Tifsah panin Gaza ciang dong
1Kings4:25 Solomon’ hun sung khempeuh Judah leh Israel lungmuang takin omin
1Kings4:26 Solomon in a leengte adingin buk a nei ciat sakol tul sawmli leh sakol tung tuang mi tulsawm leh tulnih zong nei hi.
1Kings4:27 Tua uliante in Kumpi Solomon leh Kumpi Solomon’ sabuai-ah hong pai mite khempeuh adingin amau ciat sikh kha sung adingin annek tuidawn pia uh hi; amaute in bangmah kisamsak lo uh hi.
1Kings4:28 Amau’ nasep ciat tawh kizui-in a kisapna munah sakolte leh sakol zaptelte’ adingin mangbuhham leh buhtu zong paipih uh hi.

1Kings5:1 Amaute in ama pa’ munah kumpi-in amah sathau a nilhna thu a zak ciangin Tai-ar kumpi Hiram in a nasemte Solomon kiangah sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hiram in David it tawntung hi.
1Kings5:2 Tua ciangin Solomon in Hiram kiangah kam khak a
1Kings5:3 “ Topa in ama khe nuai-ah amaute a koihsak matengin amah a umcih a galte tawh kidona hangin ka pa David in Topa ama Pasian’ min dingin inn a lam theih lohna thu na thei hi.
1Kings5:4 Ahih hangin tu-in Topa ka Pasian in na khempeuh ah tawlngakna kei tungah hong pia hi; hong langpang ahi a
1Kings5:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah
1Kings5:6 Tua ahi ciangin Lebanon taamtaak singte kei adingin a kiphuk nading thu pia in; ka nasemte in nangma nasemte seppih ding uh a
1Kings5:7 Hiram in Solomon’ kam a zak ciangin nakpi takin a lungdam a
1Kings5:8 Tua ciangin Hiram in Solomon kiangah mi sawlin
1Kings5:9 Ka nasemte in Lebanon panin tuipi ah tuate hong puak suk ding uh hi; nangma cihna munah a pai dingin tuipi a tawn dingin keimah in tuate phongin ka bawl dinga
1Kings5:10 Tua ahih ciangin Hiram in ama deih taamtaak leh taaksan singte Solomon pia a
1Kings5:11 Solomon in Hiram tungah a innkuan an dingin mangbuh beem tul sawmnih dim pia a
1Kings5:12 Ama tungah a ciam bangin Topa in Solomon tungah pilna pia hi; Solomon leh Hiram kikalah kilemna om hi; amaute nih in thuciamna khat bawl uh hi.

1Kings5:14 Amah in Lebanon ah tua mite kha khatin tulsawm a kikhelin puak hi; amaute Lebanon ah kha khat omin innah kha nih om ding uh hi; Adorniram in hih a kila mite uk hi.

1Kings6:1 Izipt gam panin Israelmite a paikhiat zawh kum zali leh a kum sawmgiatna
1Kings6:2 Kumpi Solomon in Topa adingin a lam inn in a dung tong sawmguk sau-in
1Kings6:3 Biakinn mai-a innlim in inn zaina zahin tong sawmnih sau a
1Kings6:4 Tua ciangin amah in inn adingin a pualam a kihui kongvangneute bawl hi.
1Kings6:5 Amah in biakna pang tuak leh a nung lam inn kawm kimkotin inn kawm tungah zong inn lam hi; amah in a kimkot a pangah inndei bawl hi.
1Kings6:6 A dawl nuainung pen tong nga zai-in
1Kings6:7 Inn a kilam ciangin a kitawhna panin a kibawlsa suangte tawh kilam hi; tua ahih manin a kilam lai takin hei ahi a
1Kings6:8 A dawl nuainung pen lut nadingin inn’ leitaw lam pangah om hi; a dawl laita-ah kahlei zui-in kipai-in a dawl laita panin a thumna ah kipai hi.
1Kings6:9 Tua ahih ciangin amah in inn lamin zo hi; amah in innkalte leh taamtaak peekte tawh inndap bawl hi.
1Kings6:10 Amah in a inn buppi tungah a lambehte zomin
1Kings6:11 Tu-in Topa thu Solomon tungah hong tung a
1Kings6:12 ”Nangmah in na lam hih inn tawh kisai-in

1Kings6:14 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in inn lamin zo hi.
1Kings6:15 Amah in taamtaak peekte tawh innsung kawm dap hi; inn sual panin inndap innsunte dongin amah in singtawh a sunglam tuam hi; tua ciangin amah in taaksan peekte tawh inn sual tuam hi.
1Kings6:16 Amah in sual panin innsun dong inn nung lam tong sawmnih taamtaak peekte tawh lam a
1Kings6:17 Biakinn sungnung mai-a inn sung in tong sawmli sau hi.
1Kings6:18 Inn sunga om taamtaak singte tungah um gah leh pak palh lim kigelh hi; a vekpi-in taamtaak hi a
1Kings6:19 Amah in Topa thuciamna singkuang koih nadingin inn sung tawng penah biakinn sungnung bawl hi.
1Kings6:20 Biakinn sungnung in tong sawmnih sau-in
1Kings6:21 Tua ciangin Solomon in kham citak tawh inn sung zut a
1Kings6:22 Amah in inn khempeuh a zawh dongin inn buppi kham tawh zut hi. Biakinn sungnunga biakna tau buppi zong amah in kham tawh zut hi.
1Kings6:23 Amah in biakinn sungnungah oliv sing tawh kherub nih bawl a
1Kings6:24 Kherub kha lang khat in tong nga sau-in kherub kha lang dang khat in tong nga mah sau hi; a kha lang khat mong panin a mong lang khat dong tong sawm ahi hi.
1Kings6:25 Kherub adang khat zong tong sawm mah sau hi; kherubte gel asauna leh a pian’ lim kibang hi.
1Kings6:26 Kherub khat sauna in tong sawm hi a
1Kings6:27 Amah in inn sung tawngnung penah kherubte koih hi; kherubte’ khate kizal a
1Kings6:28 Amah in kham tawh tua kherubte zut hi.
1Kings6:29 Amah in a sungnung leh a puanung inndeite
1Kings6:30 A sungnung leh a puanung inndei sunga inn sualte amah in kham tawh zut hi.
1Kings6:31 Biakinn sungnung lut nadingin amah in oliv sing kongkhak peekte bawl hi; a bangtung zawl leh kongkhak khuamte in kiu nga piangsak hi.
1Kings6:32 Amah in kherubte
1Kings6:33 Tua mah bangin amah in kiu li nei-in biakinn sung lutna oliv sing kongkhak khuamte
1Kings6:34 leh taaksan sing kongkhak peek nihte bawl hi; kongkhak a pek nihte kikhepin
1Kings6:35 Tuate tungah amah in kherubte leh nisuh kungte leh pakpalhte bawl hi; amah in tua a bawlte tungah a tukimin kham tawh zut hi.

1Kings7:16 Khuampite tungah a bulh dingin amah in a kisung sumngo khuamluzepna nih zong bawl hi; khuamluzepna khat a sauna in tong nga hi a
1Kings7:17 Tua ciangin amah in khuampite lu dawn-a khuamluzepna khat adingin khainiang a kihuihek tawh a kibawl ngen banga kikalh simsiam nih bawl hi; ngen khat in khuamluzepna khat ading hi a
1Kings7:18 Tua mah bangin amah in a mangkawlsing gahte bawl hi; khuampi lu dawn-a om khuamluzepna tuam nadingin ngen tawh kibangin a bawl tung kimkotah gual nih bawl hi; amah in a khuamluzepna dang khat zong tua mah bangin bawl hi
1Kings7:19 Tua ciangin innlim-a om khuampi dawnah a om khuamluzepnate tong li pha a
1Kings7:20 A khuamluzepnate in a khuampi nihte tung leh ngen tawh kibanga kibawl gei-a a om a bem a dawk tungah om hi; a kimkotah gual nihna mangkawlsing gah zanih om hi; a khuamluzepna dang khatah zong tua bangmah ahi hi.
1Kings7:21 Amah in a khuampite biakinn innlim-ah phut hi; amah in leitaw lamah a khuam phutin a min Jakhin phuak hi; tua ciangin amah in leilu lamah a khuam phutin a min Boaz phuak hi.
1Kings7:22 A khuampite dawnah unok pak a kibawl om hi. Tua bangin khuampite a bawl man khin hi.
1Kings7:23 Tua ciangin amah in a kisung tuikuangpi bawl hi; tua in a bem hi a
1Kings7:24 A geivial nuai tong sawmthum sung
1Kings7:25 Bawngtal sawm-le-nihte tungah tua tuikuangpi kinga a
1Kings7:26 A sahna in khutpeek mai cia ahi hi; a geivial pen unok pak tawh a kibang hai geivial bangin kibawl hi; tua sungah tui tambong tulli ta hi.
1Kings7:27 Amah in sumngo kibawl din’na sawm zong bawl hi; tua din’nate tong li sau
1Kings7:28 Tua din’nate a kibawlna zia in hih bang ahi hi: tuate in a khawkte nei-in
1Kings7:29 tua ciangin a kungah a kibulh a khawkte tungah humpinelkai
1Kings7:30 Tua tham loin tua din’nate in sumngo tawh a kibawl leengpeite leh leengpeizawlte nei ciat hi; tua ciangin a kiu lite-ah tuikuangpi nan’nate om hi. Tua nan’nate a kisung hi a
1Kings7:31 A vang pen
1Kings7:32 A leengpei lite in a khawkte’ nuai-ah om hi; leengpei zawlte in a din’na tawh sa-khat ahi hi; leengpei a san’na in tong khat leh a lang ahi hi.
1Kings7:33 A peite pen sakol leengpei bangin kibawl hi; a peizawl
1Kings7:34 A din’nate kiu ciatah a nan’na li om ciat hi; tua a nan’nate in a din’na tawh sa-khat ahi hi.

1Kings8:18 Ahih hangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah
1Kings8:19 ahi zongin nangmah in a inn na lam kei ding a
1Kings8:20 Tu-in ama bawlsa thuciamna Topa in tungsak khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa David’ munah keimah khangin
1Kings8:21 Amah in Izipt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih lai-in amah in i pu i pate tawh a bawl Topa ’ thuciamna a omna thuciamna singkuang adingin tua lai-ah mun khat ka bawlsak hi
1Kings8:22 Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh omna Topa ’ biakna tau mai-ah Solomon ding a
1Kings8:23 amah in
1Kings8:24 na nasem ka pa David tungah na gensa thu na kipsak hi; hi hi
1Kings8:25 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian
1Kings8:26 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian aw
1Kings8:27 “Ahih hangin leitungah Pasian teeng taktak ding ahi hiam? En in
1Kings8:28 Ahi zongin na nasempa’ thungetna leh a hong thuumna hong don in la
1Kings8:29 ‘Tua lai-ah ka min om ding hi
1Kings8:30 Tua ciangin amaute in hih mun lamah hong nget uh ciangin na sempa leh na mi Israelte’ hong thuumna ngai in; hi hi
1Kings8:31 “Mi khat a vengpa tungah khialin
1Kings8:32 nangmah in vantung pan za-in
1Kings8:33 “Nangma tungah hong khialna hangin galte mai-ah na mi Israelte a guallelh ciangin
1Kings8:34 vantung panin za-in na mi Israelte’ khialna maisak in la
1Kings8:35 “Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin vantung kikhakcipin guah a zuk loh ciangin
1Kings8:36 vantung pan za-in na mi Israel
1Kings8:37 “Gam sungah kialpi tungin
1Kings8:38 mi khatpeuh ahi a
1Kings8:39 na ten’na vantung panin za-in maisak in; tua ciangin amau’ gamtatna khempeuh tawh kizui-in a lungsim uh na theih bangin amaute tungah pia ciat in (bang hang hiam cih leh nang
1Kings8:40 ka pu ka pate uh tungah na piak leitang tungah a nuntak hun sung khempeuh uh amaute in nang hong zahtak ding uh hi.
1Kings8:41 “Tua mah bangin na mi Israel a hilo gamdang mi khat nangma min hangin a gamlapi gam panin hong pai-in
1Kings8:42 “(bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lian nangma minthan’na leh nangma mite’ adingin na sepsak na liante thu za ding uh hi)
1Kings8:43 na ten’na vantung panin za in la
1Kings8:44 “A galte uh do dingin na mite kuan khia-in
1Kings8:45 vantung panin amau’ hong thungetna leh hong thuumna za-in amau’ vai huh in.
1Kings8:46 “Amaute nang tungah hong khialin – bang hang hiam cih leh mi a khial lo kuamah om lo hi–amaute tungah nang heh a
1Kings8:47 ahi zongin amaute in a kipuak khiatna leitungah amaute in a lungsim uhah tua thu ngaihsunin kisikkik a
1Kings8:48 amaute manin a puakhia a galte uh leitangah a ngaihsutna khempeuh leh a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh amaute kisikkik in
1Kings8:49 vantung na ten’na mun panin amau hong thungetna leh hong thuumna za-in
1Kings8:50 nang tungah hong khial na mite leh nang tunga hong gamtatna uh amau’ thupalsatnate khempeuh maisakin
1Kings8:51 (bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Izip panin na paikhiatpih
1Kings8:52 Na nasempa hong thuumna leh na mi Israelte’ hong thuumna ah maipha tawh hong en tawntung in la
1Kings8:53 Izipt panin ka pu ka pate uh na paikhiatpih lai-in na nasempa Moses tung tawnin na gen bangin nangma luah ahi dingin leitung mi khempeuh lak panin amaute na tengkhia hi
1Kings8:54 Tu-in Solomon in hih thungetna leh thuumnate khempeuh Topa tungah a bawl khit ciangin
1Kings8:55 tua ciangin amah dingin awging pha tawh Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha pia-in
1Kings8:56 “Ama hong ciamsa khempeuh tawh kizui-in ama mi Israelte tawlngakna a pia Topa in thupha ngah ta hen; a nasempa Moses tung tawnin a gensa ama thuciamna hoihte khempeuh kam khat zong maimawk lo hi.
1Kings8:57 I pu i pate tawh a om mah bangin Topa i Pasian eite tawh hong om hen; eite hong nusia-in
1Kings8:58 amah in i pu i pate a thupiaksa ahi ama lampi khempeuh zui ding
1Kings8:59 Topa mai-ah ka thuumna ka kammalte sun leh zanin Topa i Pasian nai-ah om hen la
1Kings8:60 leitung mi khempeuh in Topa in Pasian hi
1Kings8:61 Tua ahih ciangin Topa i Pasian tungah na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh thuman un la
1Kings8:62 Tua ciangin kumpipa leh amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh in Topa mai-ah biakna pia uh hi.
1Kings8:63 Solomon in thunuam-a biakna-in Topa tungah bawngtal tul sawmnih leh tul nih leh tuu tul za khat leh tul sawmnih pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa leh Israel in mi khempeuh in Topa ’ inn ap uh hi.
1Kings8:64 Tua ni mahin kumpipa in Topa ’ inn mai-a om inntual laizang ap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh meihal biakna leh an tawh biakna leh thunuam-a biakna a thaute a ta zo dingin Topa mai-a sumngo biakna tauneu lua ahih manin tua lai munah meihal biakna leh an tawh biakna leh thunuam-a biakna a thaute pia hi.
1Kings8:65 Tua ahih ciangin tua hunin Solomon leh amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh in Topa i Pasian mai-ah ni sagih sung
1Kings8:66 A ni giat ni-in amah in mite ciahsak hi; amaute in kumpipa thupha pia uh a
1Kings9:1 Solomon in Topa ’ inn leh kumpipa’ inn leh a lam nop khempeuh a lam a man khit ciangin
1Kings9:2 Gibeon a
1Kings9:3 Topa in ama kiangah
1Kings9:4 Nang ahih leh
1Kings9:5 na pa David tungah
1Kings9:6 Ahih hangin nang na hi a
1Kings9:7 amaute ka piaksa leitang panin Israel ka lakhia ding hi; tua ciangin ka min dingin ka apsa inn pen ka muhna panin ka lawnkhia ding hi; tua ciangin Israel in mi khempeuh lakah paunak leh thugentehna suak ding hi.
1Kings9:8 Tua ciangin hih inn in nin bulomtang suak ding hi; a nawk kha mi khempeuh in lamdang sa-in ee! ci ding uh hi; amaute in
1Kings9:9 Tua ciangin amaute in
1Kings9:10 Solomon in inn nihte
1Kings9:11 Tai-ar kumpi Hiram in Solomon’ deih zahzah taamtaak sing leh taaksan sing leh kham a piak manin
1Kings9:12 Ahih hangin Solomon in amah a piaksa khuapite en dingin Tai-ar panin Hiram hong pai ciangin
1Kings9:13 Tua ahih ciangin amah in “Ka sanggampa aw
1Kings9:14 Hiram in kumpipa kiangah a piak kham talen zakhat leh sawmnih pha hi.
1Kings9:15 Hih in Topa ’ inn leh ama inn
1Kings9:16 (Iziptte kumpi Faro paito a
1Kings9:17 tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Gezer) leh Bethhoron nuainung
1Kings9:18 leh Baalath leh Judah gamsung
1Kings9:19 leh Solomon in a neih vankoihna khuapi khempeuh
1Kings9:20 Israel mite a hi lo Amor mite
1Kings9:21 Israel mite in a suksiat khit siang zawh loh
1Kings9:22 Ahih hangin Solomon in Israel mite sila-in bawl lo hi; amaute in galkapte
1Kings9:23 Hihte in Solomon’ nasep a uk ulianpite ahi hi: na a sem mite a uk mi zanga leh sawmnga ahi hi.
1Kings9:24 Ahih hangin Faro tanu David khuapi panin ama adingin Solomon in a lamsak ama innah paito hi; tua ciangin amah in Millo lam hi.
1Kings9:25 Solomon in Topa adingin a lam biakna tau tungah meihal biakna leh thunuam-a biakna kum khatin thum vei pia-in Topa mai-ah paknamtui hal hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a inn zo hi.
1Kings9:26 Kumpi Solomon in Edom gamsung San Tuipi gei dunga om Eloth nai-a Ezion-geber-ah teembaw hon khat bawl hi.
1Kings9:27 Tua ciangin Hiram in tua teembaw honte tawh tuipi tung nasep a thei tuipi mite ahi a nasemte
1Kings9:28 tua ciangin amaute Ofir-ah pai-in tua lai panin kham talen zali leh sawmnih hong paipih uh hi; amaute in Kumpi Solomon kiangah tuate tun’ uh hi.
1Kings10:1 Tu-in Sheba kumpinu in Topa ’ min tawh kisai-in Solomon’ minthan’na a zak ciangin thudotna haksate tawh amah a ze-et dingin hong pai hi.
1Kings10:2 Amah nungzui honpi
1Kings10:3 Tua ciangin Solomon in ama dotna khempeuh dawng hi; kumpipa in ama tungah a gentel theih loh
1Kings10:4 Sheba kumpinu in Solomon’ pilna
1Kings10:5 a sabuai-ah a an
1Kings10:6 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah
1Kings10:7 ahih hangin kei hong pai-in keima mit in a muh mateng a kigente ka um kei hi; tu-in
1Kings10:8 Na zite mi hampha! Nangma mai-ah ding tawntungin na pilna a za hih na nasemte mi hampha!
1Kings10:9 Nang sungah lungdamin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah nang hong koih Topa na Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen! Topa in Israel it tawntung ahih manin nangmah in thutang leh thuman na sepkhiat theih nadingin amah in kumpi-in nang hong bawl hi
1Kings10:10 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa tungah kham talen za leh sawmnih
1Kings10:11 Tua tham loin Ofir panin kham hong pua Hiram’ teembaw honte in Ofir panin cingsing leh suang manpha tampi tak hong pua hi.
1Kings10:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa in cingsingte Topa ’ inn leh kumpipa’ inn khuamte
1Kings10:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon in citna tawh ama tungah a piak banah ama deih a nget khempeuh Sheba kumpinu tungah Kumpi Solomon in pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kihei-in a nasemte tawh ama gamah ciahkik hi.
1Kings10:14 Tu-in sumbawlte leh sumbukte
1Kings10:15 
1Kings10:16 Kumpi Solomon in a kiseek kham tawh kibawl lum lianpi za nih bawl hi; lum khatah kham shekel zaguk bei hi.
1Kings10:17 Tua ciangin amah in a kiseek kham tawh kibawl lum zathum bawl hi; lum khat ciangin kham minas thum bei hi; tua ciangin kumpipa in Lebanon Tulak Inn sungah tuate koih hi.
1Kings10:18 Kumpipa in saiha kumpi tokhom a lian khat zong bawl a
1Kings10:19 Kumpi tokhom in kahlei cial guk nei-in
1Kings10:20 kahlei cial gukte’ mong ciatah khat ciat a om humpinelkai sawm-le-nih ding hi. Kumpi gamsung khat peuhpeuhah tua tawh a kibang kibawl ngei lo hi.
1Kings10:21 Kumpi Solomon’ dawnna haite khempeuh kham hi a
1Kings10:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in Hiram’ tembaw honte tawh Tarshish teembaw honkhat tuipi-ah a pai nei hi. Tarshish teembaw honte in kum thumin khat vei hong pai-in kham
1Kings10:23 Tua bangin Kumpi Solomon in hauhna leh pilna tawh leitung kumpi khempeuh khumkhelh hi.
1Kings10:24 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama lungsim sunga a koih ama pilna a ngai dingin leitung buppi in Solomon’ omna zong uh hi.
1Kings10:25 Amaute khempeuh in letsong
1Kings10:26 Tua ciangin Solomon in leengte leh sakol tuangte khawm hi; amah in leeng tul-le-za-li leh tuan’na sakol tulsawm leh tulnih nei a
1Kings10:27 Kumpipa in Jerusalem ah suang bangin ngun ol sak a
1Kings10:28 Solomon’ sakol lakte Izipt leh Kue pan hi a

1Kings11:1 Tu-in Kumpi Solomon in gamdang numei tampi ngai hi; Faro’ tanu
1Kings11:2 Topa in Israel mite tungah
1Kings11:3 Amah in kumpi tanute
1Kings11:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Solomon a teek ciangin a zite in pasian dangte lamah ama lungsim heikhia uh hi; ama pa David’ lungsim bangin ama lungsim Topa tungah thuman bup taktak lo hi.
1Kings11:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Sidon mite’ nusian Ashtoreth
1Kings11:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topa muhna ah Solomon a sia gamta a
1Kings11:7 Tua ciangin Solomon in Jerusalem nisuahna lam mual tungah Moab mite’ aa ahi
1Kings11:8 Tua mah bangin amah in paknamtui halin a pasiante uh tungah biakna a pia a gamdang zite khempeuh adingin hihsak hi.
1Kings11:9 Ama tungah nih vei kilak khinin
1Kings11:10 
1Kings11:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Solomon kiangah
1Kings11:12 Ahi zongin na pa David’ hangin nangma hun sungin ka hih kei ding a
1Kings11:13 Ahi zongin kumpigam khempeuh ka balkhia kei ding hi; ka nasempa David hang leh ka teelsa Jerusalem hangin na tapa tungah minam khat ka pia ding hi
1Kings11:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Solomon’ lang khatah langpang khat
1Kings11:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Edom ah David a om lai
1Kings11:16 (Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Edom sunga pasal khempeuh a suksiat khit matengin Joab leh Israel khempeuh tua lai-ah kha guk sung om uh hi);
1Kings11:17 Ahih hangin Hadad naupangno ahih lai-in
1Kings11:18 Amaute Midian panin ding khia-in Paran tung uh a
1Kings11:19 Hadad in Faro’ mai-ah maipha lianpi mu a
1Kings11:20 Tua ciangin Tahpenes’ sanggamnu in amah tawh a tapa Genubath nei a
1Kings11:21 Ahih hangin Hadad in David a pate tawh ihmu-in galkap a ukpa Joab a sihna thu Izipt panin a zak ciangin Hadad in Faro kiangah
1Kings11:22 Ahih hangin Faro in ama kiangah
1Kings11:23 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama topa ahi Zobah kumpi Hadadezer kiang panin a tai Eliada tapa Rezon zong Solomon a langpang dingin khangsak hi.
1Kings11:24 Amah in ama kimah mi khawmin mite’ na a sut pawl a makai suak hi; amaute Damaskas ah pai-in tua lai munah teng uh a
1Kings11:25 Hadad mah bangin Solomon’ hun sung khempeuh amah Israelte langpangin omin siatna bawl hi; amah in Israel mudah a
1Kings11:26 Solomon’ nasem
1Kings11:27 Amah in kumpipa a lehdona thu in hih ahi hi. Solomon in Millo lamin a pa David khuapi a vangte hu hi.
1Kings11:28 Jeroboam in nasep siam mahmah khat hi a
1Kings11:29 Tua hun sungin Jerusalem panin Jeroboam a paikhiat ciangin Shiloni mi kamsang Ahijah in lampi ah amah mu hi. Tu-in Ahijah in puanthak khat na silh tawm hi; amau nihte gel bek gamlakah om uh hi.
1Kings11:30 Tua ciangin Ahijah in ama tungah a silh a puanthak lenin seh sawm-le-nih suahin balkeek hi.
1Kings11:31 Tua ciangin amah in Jeroboam kiangah
1Kings11:32 (ahih hangin ka nasem David hang leh Israel minam khempeuh sungpanin ka teelsa khuapi Jerusalem hangin amah in minam khat nei ding hi)
1Kings11:33 bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei hong nusia a
1Kings11:34 Ahi zongin ama khut sung panin kumpigam bup ka la khia kei ding hi; ka thupiaknate leh ka thukhamnate a zui
1Kings11:35 ahih hangin ama tapa khut sung panin kumpi gam la-in nangma tungah minam sawm kong pia ding hi.
1Kings11:36 Ahi zongin ka min koih nadingin ka teelsa khuapi Jerusalem ah ka nasempa David in keima mai-ah suan leh khak a neih tawntung theih nadingin a tapa tungah minam khat ka pia ding hi.
1Kings11:37 Tua ciangin keimah in nang hong la-in na deih khempeuh tungah na uk ding a
1Kings11:38 Ka nasempa David bangin ka thukhamte leh ka thupiaknate zuihna tawh nang kong thupiak khempeuh ngai-in
1Kings11:39 Hih thu hangin David suan leh khakte ka gimsak ding a
1Kings11:40 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Jeroboam thah dingin zong hi; ahih hangin Jeroboam ding-in Izipt gamsung
1Kings11:41 Tu-in Solomon’ sep a om laite
1Kings11:42 Jerusalem panin Israelte khempeuh tungah Solomon in a uk hun in kum sawmli sung ahi hi.
1Kings11:43 Tua ciangin Solomon a pate tawh ihmu a
1Kings12:1 Shekhem ah Rehoboam pai hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah kumpi a suaksak dingin Israel khempeuh Shekhem ah hong pai uh hi.
1Kings12:2 Nebat’ tapa Jeroboam in tua thu a zak ciangin (bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpi Solomon kiang panin a taina Izipt ah amah om lai hi)
1Kings12:3 Tua ciangin amaute in mi sawlin amah sam uh hi; tua ciangin Jeroboam leh Israel mi a kikhawm khempeuhte hong pai-in Rehoboam kiangah
1Kings12:4 “Na pa in ka hakkol uh a gikin bawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na pa’ nasep haksate leh kote tungah a gik hakkol zangsak in

1Kings12:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin saklam Israelte in David innkuan lehdo hi.

1Kings12:23 “Judah kumpipa

1Kings13:1 En in
1Kings13:2 Tua ciangin Topa ’ thu tawh biakna tau langpangin mipa kiko a
1Kings13:3 Tua ciangin tua ni mahin amah in lim khat pia a
1Kings13:4 Beth-el a
1Kings13:5 Topa ’ thu tawh Pasian’ mipa in lim khat a piaksa tawh kizui-in biakna tau zong kiphelin biakna tau panin a vutte kibuakhia hi.
1Kings13:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Pasian’ mipa kiangah
1Kings13:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Pasian’ mipa kiangah
1Kings13:8 Tua ciangin Pasian’ mipa in kumpipa kiangah
1Kings13:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ’ kammal in kei tungah thu hong pia khin zo a
1Kings13:10 Tua ahih ciangin amah lampi dangah pai-in Beth-el ah hong paina lampi tawnin ciahkik lo hi.
1Kings13:11 Tu-in kamsang khangham khat Beth-el ah teng hi. Ama tapate hong pai-in tua ni-in Pasian’ mipa in Beth-el ah a hih thu teng ama kiangah gen uh hi; kumpipa kiangah a gen thute zong
1Kings13:12 Tua ciangin a pa un amaute kiangah “Koi lampi ah amah pai ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a tapate in Judah panin hong pai Pasian’ mipa a paina lam hilh uh hi.
1Kings13:13 Amah in a tapate kiangah
1Kings13:14 Tua ciangin Pasian’ mipa nungah amah pai a
1Kings13:15 Tua ciangin amah in ama kiangah
1Kings13:16 Amah in
1Kings13:17 bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ’ kammal in kei tungah
1Kings13:18 Tua ciangin amah in ama kiangah
1Kings13:19 Tua ahih ciangin amah in zui-in hong paikik a
1Kings13:20 Amaute sabuai-ah a tut lai takun amah a ciahpih kik kamsangpa tungah Topa ’ thu hong tung hi;
1Kings13:21 Judah panin hong pai Pasian’ mipa tungah amah kiko a
1Kings13:22 nang hong pai kikin
1Kings13:23 Tua ciangin amah in an ne-in a dawn khit ciangin
1Kings13:24 Amah a paikhiat ciangin humpinelkai khat in lampi ah na dawntuahin amah that hi. Ama luanghawm lampi-ah kipaai a
1Kings13:25 En in
1Kings13:26 Lampi panin amah a ciahpih kik kamsangpa in tua thu a zak ciangin amah in
1Kings13:27 Tua ciangin amah in a tapate kiangah
1Kings13:28 Tua ciangin amah pai a
1Kings13:29 Tua ciangin kamsangpa in Pasian’ mipa luanghawm la-in la tungah koih a
1Kings13:30 Tua ciangin amah in ama hanah a luanghawm koih hi; tua ciangin ama hangin amaute kap uh a
1Kings13:31 Amah a vui khit ciangin a tapate kiangah
1Kings13:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Beth-el a
1Kings13:33 Hih thu khit ciangin ama gamtat sia panin Jeroboam kihei tuan lo a
1Kings13:34 Hih in leitung maitang panin khen khia-in a susia zah dingin Jeroboam innkuan tungah khialhna a suak hi.

1Kings15:1 Tu-in Nebat’ tapa Kumpi Jeroboam’ kum sawm-le-giatna kumin Abijam in Judah tungah uk ding kipan hi.
1Kings15:2 Amah in Jerusalem ah kum thum sung uk hi. Ama nu’ min in Maakah hi a
1Kings15:3 Ama mai-a a pa’ khialhna khempeuh amah in zui hi; a pu sawn David a thuman bangin Topa a Pasian tungah a lungsim thuman bup lo hi.
1Kings15:4 Ahi zongin David’ hangin Topa a Pasian in Jerusalem ah meivak khat pia a
1Kings15:5 bang hang hiam cih leh Hit mi Uriah thu-ah cih sim loh David in ama nuntak sung tawntung Topa ’ mit-ah a manin gamta-in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh panin amah pial lo hi.
1Kings15:6 Tu-in ama nuntak sung tawntung Rehoboam leh Jeroboam kikalah kidona om hi.

1Kings15:13 Amah in Asherah milim dingin a kibawl a kihhuai milim khat nei ahih manin kumpinu’ nu hihna panin a pi Ma-akah zong khinkhia hi; tua ciangin Asa in tua nu’ milim phukin Kidron lui ah hal hi.
1Kings15:14 Ahih hangin mual tunga biaknate kila khia lo hi. Ahi zongin ama hun sung khempeuh Asa’ lungsim Topa tungah thuman bup hi.
1Kings15:15 Tua ciangin amah in a pa’ apsa letsongte leh ama apsa letsongte

2Kings17:9 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Topa a Pasian uh langpanin a man lo na vaihawm uh hi. Amaute in amau’ adingin gal vilna bukno akipan kulh a nei khuapi dongin khuapi khempeuh ah mual tunga biakna bawl uh hi;

2Kings17:17 Amaute in biakna-in a tanute uh leh a tapate uh halin vankahna leh aisanna zang uh a
2Kings17:18 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite tungah Topa heh a

2Kings17:21 Amah in David innkuan panin Israel gam a balkhiat khit ciangin Israel mite in Nebat’ tapa Jeroboam kumpi-in koih uh hi. Tua ciangin Jeroboam in Topa zuihna panin Israel hawlkhia-in khialhna lianpi amaute bawlsak hi.
2Kings17:22 Israel mite in Jeroboam’ khialhna khempeuh hih uh hi; kamsangte ahi a nasemte khempeuh tung tawnin a gensa bangin Topa in ama muhna panin Israel a hepkhiat dongin tuate panin amaute kihem lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau’ gam panin Assiria’ah tu ni dongin Israel sal-in om hi.

2Chronicles23:5 tua ciangin seh-thum-suah-seh-khat kumpipa’ innah omin seh-thum-suah-seh-khat Khuabul Kulh kongpi-ah na om ding uh hi; tua ciangin mi khempeuh Topa ’ inn tualte’ sungah na om ding uh hi.

2Chronicles23:8 Siampi Jehoiada’ thupiak khempeuh bangin Levi mite leh Judah mi khempeuh gamta uh hi. Amaute in amau’ mi ciat sabbath ni-in na a sem ding mite tawh sabbath ni-in nasep a peng ding mite hong paipih uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh siampite Jehoiada in nasep a peng ding a khen pawlte ciahsak lo hi.

2Chronicles29:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah’ kiangah amaute tumin

2Chronicles29:21 Tua ciangin amaute in kumpigam leh biakinn leh Judah’ adingin khialhna hanga biakna-in bawngtal sagih
2Chronicles29:22 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a bawngtalte go uh a
2Chronicles29:23 Tua ciangin khialhna hanga biak nading keeltal sagihte kumpipa leh a kikhawmte kiangah hong kipaipih a
2Chronicles29:24 tua ciangin Israel khempeuh adingin pumkhat suahna bawl nadingin siampite in goin tuate’ sisan tawh biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna bawlna bawl uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel khempeuh adingin meihal biakna leh khialhna hanga biakna a bawl ding uh kumpipa in thu pia hi.
2Chronicles29:25 Tua ciangin amah in David leh kumpipa’ thu-mupa Gad leh kamsang Nathan’ thupiakna bangin Topa ’ biakinn sungah daltuahte
2Chronicles29:26 David’ lasaknate tawh Levi mite ding uh a
2Chronicles29:27 Tua ciangin biakna tau tungah meihal biakna a kipiak nading Hezekiah in thu pia hi. Meihal biakna a kipat ciangin Topa ’ tungah lasakna zong kipan a
2Chronicles29:28 A kikhawm khempeuh in bia-in
2Chronicles29:29 Biak piakna a kiman ciangin kumpipa leh amah tawh a om khempeuhte in kunin bia uh hi.
2Chronicles29:30 Tua ciangin David’ kammalte leh thu-mupa Asaf’ kammalte zangin Topa ’ tungah phatna la a sak nadingun kumpipa Hezekiah leh uliante in Levi mite thu pia uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in lungdamna tawh phatna late sa uh a
2Chronicles29:31 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in
2Chronicles29:32 A kikhawmte in a hong paipih meihal biakna a phazah in bawngtal sawmsagih
2Chronicles29:33 A ki-ap biaknate in bawngtal zaguk leh tuu tulthum ahi hi.
2Chronicles29:34 Ahih hangin siampite a mi tawm lua uh ahih manin meihal biaknate khempeuh a vun hawk khin zo lo uh a

2Chronicles36:3 Tua ciangin Izipt kumpipa in Jerusalem ah amah zakiasak a

2Chronicles36:6 Babilon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar amah do-in hong paito a

2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiakhin in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm-le-giat pha a
2Chronicles36:10 Tua kum khuakhal sungin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in mi sawl in Topa ’ inn a
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnih-le-khat pha a
2Chronicles36:12 Amah in Topa a Pasian’ muhna ah a sia gamta hi. Topa ’ kam panin thu a gen kamsang Jeremiah’ mai-ah amah kiniamkhiat lo hi.
2Chronicles36:13 Pasian tawh a kiciamsak Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar zong amah in lehdo hi; Israel Pasian
2Chronicles36:14 A makai siampite leh mi khempeuh zong tua mah bangin citak lo mahmah uh a
2Chronicles36:15 A mite leh ama teen’na mun khasiat ahih manin amau’ pute pate’ Pasian
2Chronicles36:16 ahih hangin a mite tungah Topa ’ hehna a suah ciang dong
2Chronicles36:17 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Khaldea mite’ kumpipa amaute’ lang khatah paipih a
2Chronicles36:18 Tua ciangin Topa ’ inn a
2Chronicles36:19 Tua ciangin amaute in Pasian’ inn halin Jerusalem kulh nusia uh a
2Chronicles36:20 Amah in namsau panin a suakta mite Babilon ah salin la a
2Chronicles36:21 Tua sungin Israel leitang in a sabbathte a kicingin na tang hi. Kamsang Jeremiah tung tawnin Topa ’ thugen a tun’ nadingin kum sawmsagih a cin’ nadingin leitang a kinusiat sung khempeuh leitang in sabbath tawlngakna a tang ahi hi.
2Chronicles36:22 Tu-in Persia kumpipa Sairas’ kum khatna kumin
2Chronicles36:23 “Persia kumpipa Sairas in hih bangin ci hi

Ezra3:1 A kha sagihna hong cin’ ciangin Israel mite amau’ khuapi ciatah teeng khin uh ahih manin

Ezra3:3 Amaute in tua gama midang teengte kihta uh ahih manin a mun lui mah-ah biakna tau phut pahin zing leh nitak simin Topa tungah meihal biakna pia uh hi.

Ezra5:1 Tu-in kamsangte Haggai leh Iddo’ suan Zekhariah in Judah gam leh Jerusalem a

Ezra5:3 Tua lai takin Eufrates Gungal gam sung teng a uk sawn Tattenai
Ezra5:4 Hih inn lam nasepna-ah a sem mite’ min zong amaute in dong uh hi.

Ezra5:6 Eufrates gungal gam a uk sawn Tattenai

Ezra5:8 Judah gam

Ezra6:1 Tua ciangin Kumpipa Darias in thupia a

Ezra6:3 “Kumpi Sairas’ kum khatna kumin Jerusalem khua a
Ezra6:4 a kawm pen suang thuap thum leh sing thuap khat tawh a kibawl thuap li hi ding hi; hih sum beinate ahih leh kumpi sum panin kipia ding hi.
Ezra6:5 Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem biakinn panin la khia-in Babilon ah a hong tun’pih Pasian’ inn sunga om kham leh ngun tawh kibawl um-le-beelte zong kipia kik ding hi; tuate khempeuh Jerusalem biakinn ah kipuak kik ding a
Ezra6:6 Tua ciangin kumpi Darias in hih bangin thupia hi: “Tu-in
Ezra6:7 Judah mi a ukpa leh a upate in hih Pasian’ inn a lamkik theih nadingun na tua ci omsak ding uh hi; ama mun ngei mah ah a inn lamsak kik un.
Ezra6:8 Hih a kigen Pasian’ inn a kilam kik theih nadingin hih Judah upate’ adingin na hih dingte uh zong thu kong pia hi. Hih nasepna a mawk khawl loh nadingin
Ezra6:9 Vantung Pasian’ tungah meihal biakna-in piak dingin a kisam khempeuh— bawngtalnote
Ezra6:10 Tua hi leh amaute in vantung Pasian’ tungah a namtui biaknate pia-in kumpipa leh a tapate’ nuntak nading thu hong ngetsak thei ding uh hi.
Ezra6:11 Tua tham loin
Ezra6:12 Hih ka thupiakna a siasak nuam
Ezra6:13 Tua ciangin kumpi Darias in amaute tungah a thupiak bang tektekin Eufrates gungal gam sung a uk sawn Tattenai
Ezra6:14 Tua hi a

Ezra7:14 Nang tungah hong kipia ahi na Pasian’ thukham tawh kisai-in Judah leh Jerusalem ah thu bangci om hiam cih a va thei dingin kumpipa keimah leh thu hong lamlak mihing sagihte in kong sawl uh hi.

Ezra8:30 Tua ahih manin siampite leh Levi mite in Jerusalem a
Ezra8:31 Tua ciangin Jerusalem zuan dingin kha masa a ni sawm-le-nih ni-in Ahava lui panin ka dingkhia uh hi; i Pasian in eite hong ompih ahih manin lam kal-ah galte leh pan’simna a tuamtuamte tawh hong kipelhsak hi.
Ezra8:32 Jerusalem khua ka tun’ uh ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga uh hi.
Ezra8:33 A ni li ni-in Uriah’ tapa siampi Meremoth’ tavuan lakna tawh i Pasian’ inn sungah ngun leh kham leh um-le-beelte kiseng hi; Finehas’ tapa Eleazar in amah huh a

Ezra10:1 Ezra in tu-a bangin thu ngenin mawhna pulakin khitui naptui tawh Pasian’ inn mai-ah kunin a om lai takin Israel mi numei
Ezra10:2 Tua ciangin Elam-te beh sung panin Jehiel’ tapa Shekaniah hong pau-in Ezra kiangah
Ezra10:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in
Ezra10:4 Ding in
Ezra10:5 Tua ciangin Ezra ding-in a kigensa bangin amaute a gamtat nadingun a kiciam dingin siampi liante
Ezra10:6 Tua ciangin Pasian’ inn panin Ezra paikhia-in Eliashib’ tupa Jehohanan’omna inndei ah pai-in tua lai-ah giak hi; salsuahna pan hong ciahkik mite’ khialhna hangin dah ahih manin amah in an leh tui ne zo lo hi.
Ezra10:7 Tua ciangin Judah leh Jerusalem sunga a om a hong ciahkik salte khempeuh Jerusalem ah a hong kikhop nading uh
Ezra10:8 leh ni thum sungin a hong tung lo a om leh uliante leh upate’ hoihsakna bangin a neihsa khempeuh kimanin
Ezra10:9 Tua ahih ciangin Judah leh Benjamin mi khempeuh ni thum sungin Jerusalem ah hong kikhawm uh hi; tua in a kha kuana a ni sawmnih ni ahi hi. Tua hi a
Ezra10:10 Tua ciangin siampi Ezra ding to-in amaute kiangah
Ezra10:11 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topa tungah na mawhna uh pulak un la
Ezra10:12 Tua ciangin a kikhawm mi khempeuh in dawngin kiko uh a
Ezra10:13 Ahi zongin mi tampi hi hang a
Ezra10:14 A kikhawm mihonpite’ tangin i makaite semsak in la
Ezra10:15 Asahel’ tapa Jonathan leh Tikvah’ tapa Jahzeiah tegel bek in nial uh a
Ezra10:16 Tua hi a
Ezra10:17 a kha masa a ni khat ni-in gamdang numei a ten’pih mite thu a kanna uh zo uh hi.

Ezra10:19 Amaute in a zite uh a mak ding uh kiciam uh a
Ezra10:20 Immer-te beh sung panin Hanani leh Zebadiah ahi uh hi.
Ezra10:21 Harim-te beh sung panin Ma-aseiah
Ezra10:22 Pashhur-te beh sung panin Elio-enai
Ezra10:23 Levi mite sung panin Jozabad

Nehemiah1:1 Hakaliah’ tapa Nehemiah’ thugen in hih bang ahi hi. A kum sawmnihna Khislev kha sungin kumpi khuapi Susa-ah ka om lai takin
Nehemiah1:2 ka sanggampa Hanani leh midang pawlkhat Judah gam panin hong tung uh hi; tua ciangin keimah in Jerusalem khua thu leh sal-a matna panin a suakta ahi a om suak Judah mite’ thu tawh kisai amaute kiangah ka dong hi.
Nehemiah1:3 Salsuahna panin a suakta
Nehemiah1:4 Hih thu ka zak ciangin tusukin ka kap niloh a
Nehemiah1:5 Ka thungetna-ah
Nehemiah1:6 Israel mi ahi
Nehemiah1:7 Nangma tungah kong khial khin uh a
Nehemiah1:8 Na nasem Moses tungah
Nehemiah1:9 ahi zongin kei kiangah hong ciahkikin ka thupiaknate zui-in na sep uh leh leimong dongah a kithehthangsa na mite uh kaikhawmin keima min om nadingin ka telnasa munah amaute ka ciahpih ding hi
Nehemiah1:10 Topa aw
Nehemiah1:11 Keima hong thungetna leh nangma min a zahtak nuam na nasemte’ thungetna na bil hong ngat in. Tu ni-in kei tungah mavan’na hong pia in la
Nehemiah2:1 Kei pen kumpipa’ anpiapa ka hi hi. Kumpi Artakzaksis’ kum sawmnihna Nisan kha sungin khatvei
Nehemiah2:2 Amah in

Nehemiah2:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in
Nehemiah2:5 tua khit ciangin kumpipa dawngin
Nehemiah2:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa in (kumpinu gei-ah tu kawmin)
Nehemiah2:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah
Nehemiah2:8 leh biakinn hut nading mun muanhuai kongpi ding
Nehemiah2:9 Tua ciangin Eufrates Gungal gam a uksawn mite kiang ka tung a
Nehemiah2:10 Ahih zongin Israel mite’ phattuam nading a sem dingin mi khat hong paina thu Horonaim khuami Sanballat leh Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah in a zak uh ciangin nakpi takin lungkim lo uh hi.
Nehemiah2:11 Jerusalem ka tun’ ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga hi.
Nehemiah2:12 Tua ciangin zan-in vak khia-in mi tawmkhat ka tonpih hi; ahi zongin Jerusalem’ adingin ka bawlsak ding ka Pasian in ka lungsim ah hong suahsak thu kuama kiangah ka gen kei hi. Keima tuan’na sim loh ganhing dang ka kizuisak kei hi.
Nehemiah2:13 Kuam Kongpi tawnin Gulpi Tuikhuk leh Nin Kongpi lamah ka pai a
Nehemiah2:14 Tua ciangin Tuinak Kongpi leh Kumpipa’ Bual-ah ka paisuak hi; ahi zongin ka tuan’na ganhing a paisuak theih nading mun om lo hi.
Nehemiah2:15 Tua hi a
Nehemiah2:16 Tua hi a

Nehemiah2:19 Ahi zongin Horonaim khuami Sanballat leh Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah leh Arab gam-a a sem Geshem in tua thu a zak uh ciangin
Nehemiah2:20 Tua ciangin amaute dawngin
Nehemiah3:1 Tua ciangin siampi lian Eliashib leh a siampi pihte in nasep kipanin Tuu Kongpi bawl uh hi. Amaute in a khuamte leh a zawlte bawlin a kongkhakte bulh uh hi; amaute in Mi Za Khat Tausang ciang banah Hananel Tausang dong sem uh a
Nehemiah3:2 Ama zomah Jerikho khuamite in sem uh hi. Amaute’ zomah Imri’ tapa Zakkur in sem hi.
Nehemiah3:3 Tua ciangin Hassena-ah’ tapate in Ngasa Kongpi bawl uh hi; amaute in a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna tawh bulh uh hi.
Nehemiah3:4 Amaute’ zomah Hakkoz’ tapa Uriah
Nehemiah3:5 a zom kikah Tekoa khuamite in puah uh a
Nehemiah3:6 Tua ciangin Paseah’ tapa Joiada leh Besodeiah’ tapa Meshullam in Jeshanah Kongpi puah uh hi; amaute in a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhnate tawh bulh uh hi.
Nehemiah3:7 Amaute’ zomah Gibeon leh Mizpah khuami ahi
Nehemiah3:8 Tua zomah khamseekpa Harhaiah’ tapa Uzziel in puah hi; a zomah paknamtui bawlpa Hananiah in puah hi; amaute in Kulh Zai ciang dong a ngeina bangin Jerusalem bawlkik uh hi.
Nehemiah3:9 Amaute’ zomah Jerusalem gam phel khat a uk
Nehemiah3:10 A zomah Harumaf tapa Jedaiah in ama inn mai san teng puah hi; tua ciangin a zomah Hashabneiah’ tapa Hattush in puah hi.
Nehemiah3:11 Harim’ tapa Malkhijah leh Pahathmoab’ tapa Hasshub in Meikhuk Tausang a huam khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:12 Amaute’ zomah Jerusalem gam a phel khat a uk Hallohesh’ tapa Shallum in a tanute tawh puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:13 Hanun leh Zanoah khua-a teeng mite in Kuam Kongpi puah uh hi; amaute in tua kongpi bawl pha-in a kongkhakte a kalhnate tawh bulh uh a
Nehemiah3:14 Bethhakkherem gam a uk
Nehemiah3:15 Mizpah gam a uk
Nehemiah3:16 Ama zomah Bethzur gam phel khat a uk
Nehemiah3:17 Ama zomah a puah Levi mite in: Bani’ tapa Rehum; ama zomah Keilah gam phel khat a uk Hashabiah in ama gam taangin puah hi.
Nehemiah3:18 Ama zomah a puah a behte in: Keilah gam a phel khat a uk
Nehemiah3:19 a zomah Mizpah gam a uk Jeshua’ tapa Ezer in a Kiu-a galvan koihna kahtohna san khawk khat puah hi.
Nehemiah3:20 Ama zomah Zabbai’ tapa Baruk in a Kiu panin siampi lian Eliashib’ inn kongkhak ciang dong khawk khat sung puah hi.
Nehemiah3:21 Ama zomah Hakkoz’ tapa Uriah
Nehemiah3:22 Ama zomah Jerusalem kiim nai-a om siampite in puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:23 A zomah Benjamin leh Hasshub in amau’ inn mai san puah uh hi. A zomah Ananiah’ tapa Ma-aseiah
Nehemiah3:24 Ama zomah Henadad’ tapa Binnui in Azariah’ inn panin a Kiu
Nehemiah3:25 leh kulh kiu ciang khawk khat sung puah hi. Uzai’ tapa Palal in a Kiu gal san teng leh kumpipa’ inn panin hong dawk khia
Nehemiah3:26 Amah zomah Parosh’ tapa Pedaiah leh Ofel mualtung a teeng biakinn nasemte in nisuahna lam manawhin Tui Kongpi gal san ciang leh tausang dawk puah hi.
Nehemiah3:27 Ama zomah Tekoa khuamite in a lian tausang dawk panin Ofel mualbo kulh ciang
Nehemiah3:28 Sakol Kongpi tung san teng ahih leh siampite in amau’ inn mai san ciat puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:29 Amaute’ zomah Immer’ tapa Zadok in ama inn mai san puah hi. Ama zomah Nisuahna Kongpi a cing
Nehemiah3:30 Ama zomah Shelemiah’ tapa Hananiah leh Zalaf tapa gukna Hanun in khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi. Amau zomah Berekhiah’ tapa Meshullam in ama inndei mai san teng puah hi.
Nehemiah3:31 Ama zomah khamseekpa Malkhijah in Kikaihkhopna Kongpi mai san-a om biakinn nasemte’ inn leh sumbukte’ inn ciang
Nehemiah3:32 Tua ciangin khamseekte leh sumbukte in a kiu-a inndei tungnung leh Tuu Kongpi kikal puah uh hi.

Nehemiah7:13 Zattu’ suante mi za giat leh sawmli-le-nga ahi hi.

Nehemiah7:68 Amau’ sakol uh za sagih leh sawmthum-le-guk
Nehemiah7:69 a kalaoh uh za li leh sawmthum-le-nga

Nehemiah7:73 Tua ciangin siampite
Nehemiah8:1 Tua ciangin Tui kongpimai tualpi ah mi khempeuh khe khat khai bangin hong kikhawmtuah diam hi; tua ciangin Topa in Israel mite tungah a piak ahi
Nehemiah8:2 Tua hi a
Nehemiah8:3 Tua ciangin amah in Tui Kongpi mai-a om tualpi lam mai ngatin zingsang tung-a kipan sun ciang dong
Nehemiah8:4 Tua ciangin thugen nadinga sing tawh kibawl tau tungah lai theipa Ezra dingto a
Nehemiah8:5 Mi khempeuh sangin a sangzaw munah amah ding ahih manin mi khempeuh’ muh theih dingin Ezra in a laibu hong hi; a laibu a hon’ ciangin mi khempeuh ding uh hi.
Nehemiah8:6 Tua ciangin Ezra in a lian Pasian
Nehemiah8:7 Mite amau’ omna san ciatah a om sungun mite in thukham a teltheih nadingun Levi mi Jeshua
Nehemiah8:8 Amaute in Pasian’ thukham laibu sung panin a kitel takin sim uh a
Nehemiah8:9 Tua ciangin gam ukpa Nehemiah
Nehemiah8:10 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah
Nehemiah8:11 Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in mite gamdai sak a
Nehemiah8:12 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh an ne tui dawnin midangte a kholh ding leh lungdam-a om dingin ciah uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah a kigen thute amaute in theitel uh hi.

Nehemiah9:8 Nangma tungah amah a cihtakna na mu a
Nehemiah9:9 “ ‘Nangmah in Izipt gamsunga ka pute ka pate uh gimna mu-in huhna ngenin San Tuipi-ah hong kikona uh na za a
Nehemiah9:10 amaute in ka pute ka pate uh kihihsakna tawh a hih gawpna thei na hih manin Faro leh a nasemte leh a gam mi khempeuh langpanin lim leh nalamdang na bawl hi; tua hi a

Nehemiah9:19 nang in na hehpih mahmah manin amaute gamlakah na nusia kei hi. Sunin lam a lak meii khuam in amaute nusia lo a

Nehemiah9:21 Kum sawmli tawntung gamlakah amaute na vak a

Nehemiah9:23 Nangmah in amau’ suan leh khakte van-a aksi zahin sim zawh lohin na tamsak a

Nehemiah9:25 Tua hi a
Nehemiah9:26 “‘Ahi zongin amaute in dem nopna lungsim nei-in nang hong lehdo uh hi; amaute in na thukham nungngat uh a
Nehemiah9:27 Hih thu hangin a galte uh khut sungah amaute na ap a

Nehemiah9:32 “‘Tua ahih ciangin tu-in a lian
Nehemiah9:33 Kote tungah hong tungsa thu khempeuh ah nangmah a thutang na hi a
Nehemiah9:34 Ka kumpite uh
Nehemiah9:35 Amaute tungah na piak gamzai leihoih ah omin
Nehemiah9:36 Tu-in kote sal ka hi uh hi; ka pu ka pate un a leitang pan-a piangte ne-in a na hoih khempeuhte nuam tak-a a ngah nadingun na piak gam hih lai munah kote sal ka hi ta uh hi.
Nehemiah9:37 Tu-in leitang tunga piang khempeuh pen kote’ mawhna hangin kote tungah nong koih kumpite tungah tung ta hi. Tua kumpite in kote pumpi tungah thu hong nei-in
Nehemiah9:38 Hih thute khempeuh hangin a kip thuciamna khat bawlin lai-in ka gelh uh a

Nehemiah13:25 Amaute tai gawpin ka samsia a

Esther1:1 Hih lai-a kigen thu piangte pen India gam panin Ethiopia gam dong
Esther1:2 Hih hun lai takin kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi sunga a kumpi tokhom tungah amah tu hi.
Esther1:3 Ama uk a kum thumna kumin ama nuai-a a uliante khempeuh leh a nasemte’ adingin pawi khat bawksak hi. Ama khut nuai-a om Persia leh Media galkapmangte leh ama nuai-a uliante leh a ma nuai-ah gam a uk sawnte a om lai takin
Esther1:4 a kumpi gam hauhna leh ama thupi ziazuana ni tampi sung
Esther1:5 Hih pawi hun a bei khit ciangin kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga om mi lian mi neu mi khempeuh adingin kumpipa in pawi khat bawl hi; tua pawi pen kumpi inn huang sungah kibawl a
Esther1:6 Tua huang sungah suangkang khuamte kiphut a
Esther1:7 Khamhai nam tuamtuamte tawh zu kihawm a
Esther1:8 Tua lai-ah zu nekna zia pen kihah piak cih om lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh in amau’ duh zahzah bek a neksak nading uh kumpipa in ama nuai-a uliante thupia hi.
Esther1:9 Tua banah Kumpinu Vashti in zong numeite’ adingin Kumpipa Ahasu-eras’ inn sung mah-ah pawi khat bawl hi.
Esther1:10 A ni sagih ni
Esther1:11 
Esther1:12 Ahih hangin Kumpinu Vashti in innsung mangte’ thu puak kumpipa’ sapna nial hi. Hih a nialna thu ah kumpipa heh mahmah a
Esther1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in upadi siam a mi pilte thu dong hi; bang hang hiam cih leh upadi leh biakna lam thu theite khempeuh thu dotpen kumpipa’ zat ngei khat ahi hi;
Esther1:14 ama gei nai pen ah a tu
Esther1:15 “Innsung mangte’ tung tawnin keimah Kumpi Ahasu-eras’ thupiakna bangin gamta lo ahih manin Kumpinu Vashti tungah upadi tawh kizui-in bangci kihih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
Esther1:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa leh uliante’ zakin Memukan in dawng a
Esther1:17 Kumpinu’ gamtatna thu numei khempeuh in thei ding uh a
Esther1:18 Hih banga kumpinu’ gamtatna thu a za Persia leh Media gam numei liante in kumpipa nuai-a uliante tungah tu ni mahmah-in hih thu gen ding uh a
Esther1:19 Kumpipa in hoih nasak leh
Esther1:20 Tua banga kumpipa’ thupiakna thu kumpigam sung khempeuh ah a kizak ciangin numei khempeuh in a neu a lian amau’ pasal ciat zahtak ding uh hi
Esther1:21 Kumpipa leh uliante in hih ngaihsutna hoih sa uh a
Esther1:22 Pasal khempeuh in ama innsung ukpa ahih nading leh ama kam a kizuih kim nadingin kumpipa’ ukna gam khempeuh ah amau’ lai ciat
Esther2:1 Hih thu teng a pian’ khit
Esther2:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ nasemte in ama kiangah
Esther2:3 Kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi-a numeite’ omna-ah a meel hoih nungak khangno khempeuh hong paipih nadingun na ukna gam tuamtuam khempeuh ah uliante sawl in. Tua numeite pen numeite a uk

Esther2:6 Amah pen
Esther2:7 Amah in a innlak pate khat tanu’ a min masa Hadassah
Esther2:8 Kumpipa’ thupiakna kithei kimin
Esther2:9 Amah in tua nungak hoihsa-in pakta mahmah ahih manin paknamtuite leh a annek ding pia pah a
Esther2:10 Mordekai in khaam ahih manin Esther in ama nam leh phung gen khia lo hi.
Esther2:11 Esther bangci om a

Esther2:13 Kigin’ kholhna hun cing a
Esther2:14 Nitak-in kumpipa kiangah va pai a
Esther2:15 Mordekai in ama tanu dingin a lak a innlak pa Abihail’ tanu Esther pen kumpipa kiangah a pai ding hun a tun ciangin
Esther2:16 Ama uk a kum sagihna
Esther2:17 kumpipa in ama numei dangte khempeuh sangin it zaw a
Esther2:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Esther pahtawina-in ama uliante leh a nasemte khempeuh’ adingin pawi lianpi khat bawl hi. Amah in ama ukna gam khempeuh ah tua ni nasep khawlin zum a khak nading uh zong thu zasak kim a
Esther2:19 Kumpipa’ kongtual-ah Mordekai om hi;
Esther2:20 ama hilhna tawh kizui-in Esther in ama minam ahi a
Esther2:21 Ni khat
Esther2:22 Hih thu Mordekai in phawkin Kumpinu Esther kiangah ko a
Esther2:23 A thu kikanin a manna a kitheih ciangin khuampite tungah tua mi nihte gel kikhai lum hi. Hih thu piangte khempeuh kumpipa’ theihin kumpi Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kiciamteh hi.
Esther3:1 Hih thute khit ciangin Kumpipa Ahasu-eras in Agag-te beh Hammeda-tha’ tapa Haman a za khangsak a
Esther3:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpi huang sunga om kumpipa’ nasem khempeuh in Haman zahtak bawlin ama mai-ah kun uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua banga a hih ding uh kumpipa in thupia hi. Ahih hangin Mordekai in amah zahtakna limin a mai-ah kun lo hi.
Esther3:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa huang sunga om kumpipa’ nasemte in Mordekai kiangah
Esther3:4 Ni simin amaute in Mordekai kiangah gengen uh a
Esther3:5 Ama mai-ah Mordekai a kun lohna
Esther3:6 Amah in Mordekai’ mipihte a theih ciangin amah bek suk taak sa lo a
Esther3:7 Kumpi Ahasu-eras’ uk a kum sawm-le-nihna
Esther3:8 Tua ciangin Haman in Kumpipa Ahasu-eras’ kiangah
Esther3:9 Kumpipa in hoih nasak leh amaute a kisuksiat nading thu pia-in lai-in gelh in; tua hi leh nangma sumkholna sungah koih dingin na khut nuai-a na uliante tungah ngun talen tul sawm ka pia ding hi
Esther3:10 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in ama khut tung panin a min thuhna zungbuh suahin Judah mite’ gal
Esther3:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman kiangah
Esther3:12 A kha masa a ni sawm-le-thum ni-in kumpipa’ lai-atte khempeuh kisam a
Esther3:13 Tua bangin kumpipa’ ukna gam khempeuh ah laitaite lai kipiasak a
Esther3:14 Tua a ni seh ni-in amaute a baihsa-in a om theih nadingun hih thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuh ah dal khat ciat kipuakin tua thu pen a gamsung mi khempeuh tungah a kizasak kim ding ahi hi.
Esther3:15 Kumpipa’ thupiakna tawh laitaite kinawh sawl a

Job32:3 Job’ lawm thumte tungah zong a heh suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Job a dawn’na ding uh thei lo uh ahih manin Pasian a khial tawh hong kibang hi.

Job32:5 Ahi zongin hih mihing thumte in Job a dawn’ theih loh a muh ciangin a hehna thuak zo nawn lo hi.

Job32:14 Job in note tungah thu hong gen a

Job32:18 Ka thugen ding ka ngak lah a

Job34:2 “No mipilte aw

Job34:4 Thuman bang hiam cih teng khia ni; thuhoih bang hiam cih mu khia ni.

Job34:6 kei thuman napi thuzuau genin hong seh hi

Job34:12 A taktakin ci lehang

Job34:15 nuntakna nei khempeuh si pah ding a
Job34:16 “Job aw
Job34:17 Vanglianpa in thutang deih lo dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam? Nang in a thuman Pasian mawhsak na hi hiam?

Job34:19 Pasian pen mi khempeuh a piangsakpa hi a
Job34:20 Mihingte zan khat thu-in si pak thei hi. Pasian in mite sat pukin si sak thei a

Job34:24 Amah in thu kan kul loin mi vangliante sugawp a

Job34:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a thu mang nawn lo uh a

Job34:29 Pasian in bangmah hih het kei taleh zong

Ecclesiastes5:1 Biakinn-ah na pai ciangin lim takin kingaihsun in. Aman leh aman lo a khen thei lo mihaite’ biakpiaknate tawh a kibang piakna sangin thungai dingin biakinn-a paina hoihzaw hi.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Thu ngaihsun masa-in pau in la
Ecclesiastes5:3 Na lunghimawh semsem leh na mang sia semsem ding a
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pasian tungah thu na ciam ciangin manlangin tung sak pah in. Amah in mihaite dik sa lo hi. Na thuciamna bangin tung sak in.
Ecclesiastes5:5 Na thuciamna bangin na tunsak loh ding sangin thuciamna neih vet loh ding hoihzaw hi.
Ecclesiastes5:6 Pasian’ siampipa’ mai-ah ka khial kha hi ci-in na gen ding kisam kha ding ahih manin na kampauna hangin khial kha kei in. Tua bangin gamta kha lecin nangma tungah Pasian heh ding a
Ecclesiastes5:7 Mang tam man leeng a mawkna mah tam a
Ecclesiastes5:8 Kumpite in mizawngte gim ngah sakin
Ecclesiastes5:9 Gam khat peuhpeuh in a kumpipa in lokhawhna lamsang a lunghimawh kumpi kisam hi.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Sumdeihna lungsim na neih leh lungkim hun cih na nei ngei kei ding hi; na hauh nop hangin na deih khempeuh na ngah ngei kei ding hi; hih in a mawknapi ahi hi.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Hau semsem lecin na vak ding mi tam semsem a
Ecclesiastes5:12 Na a sem mipa in a nek ding nei taleh nei takei leh lungnuam takin ihmu thei a
Ecclesiastes5:13 A hoih het lo na khat hih leitungah ka mu hi: mite
Ecclesiastes5:14 Na a sep khialh manin a neihsa teng uh suplawh uh a
Ecclesiastes5:15 I nute’ sung panin bangmah nei loin tangguakin i suah mah bangin tangguak mahin i ciahkik hi. I sepnate
Ecclesiastes5:16 A dahhuai mahmah thu in: i suah hun lai-a mah bang tektekin i ciahkik ding hi; a mawknapi dinga i sepna-ah bang phattuamna ngah i hi hiam?

Ecclesiastes5:19 Pasian in mi khat neih leh lam guan’in
Ecclesiastes5:20 Pasian in lungdamin om sak ahih manin a nuntak tom lam phawkin nei kha lo ding hi.

Isaiah1:12 “Kei’ mai-ah kilaak ding a

Isaiah1:17 gamtat hoih ding kisin un; thumanin gamta un la

Isaiah1:20 Ahih hangin note in kei hong nialin nong lehdo uh leh namsau in note hong vatmai ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khin zo hi.”

Isaiah15:2 A sangna munte ah a kap dingin Dibon khuamite pai to uh hi; Nebo leh Medeba khuate’ hangin Moab mite nakpi takin kap uh hi. Dahna limin lu khempeuh kimettol a
Isaiah15:3 kongzing lakah amaute in puanhampi teng uh hi; innkhumzang leh kongzing lampi kituahnate ah mi khempeuh nakpi-in kapin khitui tawh kawt uh hi.

Isaiah66:1 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Vantung in keima tokhom hi a
Isaiah66:2 Hih nate khempeuh keima khut in a bawlsa hi a
Isaiah66:3 “Biakna-in bawngtal a gopa in mihing zong that hi; biak piakna-in tuuno a gopa in ui ngawng zong tan hi; an tawh biak piakna a bawlpa in vok si zong pia hi; paknamtui tawh phawkna biak piakna a bawlpa in milim zong bia-in thupha pia hi. Hih mite in amau’ ut bang ciatin gamta uh a
Isaiah66:4 Tua ahih ciangin amaute tungah gimna ka tungsak ding a
Isaiah66:5 Ama thu ah lau-in a liing mite aw
Isaiah66:6 Ngai un
Isaiah66:7 Ka khuapi siangtho pen nausuak natna a thuak ma-in nau a suak nupi tawh kibang hi; nausuak gimna a tun’ ma-in amah in tapa khat nei hi.
Isaiah66:8 A tuaci bang kua’n za ngei na hi uh hiam? A tuaci bang kua’n mu ngei na hi uh hiam? Ni khat thu-in gam khat piang ngei ahi hiam? Tomno khat sungin minam khat piangkhia ngei ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Zion in nausuak gimna a thuak phetin a minamte suak khia pah hi.
Isaiah66:9 Nau suah hun tungsak napi-in suakkhia sak lo ding ka hi hiam? Topa in ci hi; nau a suakkhiasak keimah in naugil khakcip ding ka hi hiam? na Pasian un ci hi.

Jeremiah1:2 Amon’ tapa Josiah

Jeremiah1:4 Topa in kei hong hopih-a

Jeremiah1:11 Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah
Jeremiah1:12 Tua ciangin Topa in
Jeremiah1:13 Topa in a nih veina hong hopih leuleu-a

Jeremiah52:3 Topa in Jerusalem khua leh Judah mite ama’ kiang panin a hawlkhiatna zah ding dongin a hehna a lian hi. Zedekiah kumpipa in Babilon kumpipa a langpan’ hi.
Jeremiah52:4 Tua ciangin amah kumpi a suah zawh a kum kua kum
Jeremiah52:5 Zedekiah kumpipa a maan’ zawh kum sawm leh kum khat a phak dong khuapi a kisim hi.

Jeremiah52:12 Babilon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar a maan’ zawh kum sawm leh kum kua a phak kum
Jeremiah52:13 Amah in Topa ’ biakinnpi akipan kumpipa’ inn leh Jerusalem khua-a inn lian khempeuh a hal hi.
Jeremiah52:14 Amah tawh a omkhawm Khaldea galkap khempeuh in Jerusalem khua kimkot a

Jeremiah52:18 Tua banah
Jeremiah52:19 Biak piakna-a kizang keu neute
Jeremiah52:20 Solomon kumpipa in Topa ’ biakinnpi adingin a bawl khuampi nih kuangpi khat leh tua nuai-a a pua
Jeremiah52:21 Tua khamte khat ciangin tong sawm leh tong giat sang a
Jeremiah52:22 A tunglam tong nga ciang sumngo hi-in tua mun teng a kimkotah sumngo tawh a kibawl mangkawlsing lim a kisuai hi.
Jeremiah52:23 Mangkawlsing a vekpi-in a kimkotah zakhat om a
Jeremiah52:24 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa in siampi lianpenpa Seraiah tawh
Jeremiah52:25 khuapi sung panin galkapte a uk galkapmang khat leh khua sunga a kimu kumpipa’ uliante sagih tawh
Jeremiah52:26 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in amaute paipihin Riblah khua-ah Babilon kumpipa’ kiangah a tun’pih hi.
Jeremiah52:27 Babilon kumpipa in zong Hamath gam Riblah khua-ah amaute sat-in a thatlum hi. Tu-a bangin Judah mite a gam panun sal dingin a kila khia hi.
Jeremiah52:28 Nebukhadnezzar in sal ding a
Jeremiah52:29 a kum sawm leh giat kumin Jerusalem khua panin Nubukhadnezzar in mi zagiat sawmthum-nih sal dingin a paipih a;
Jeremiah52:30 Nebukhadnezzar a maan’ zawh a kum sawmnih leh thum kumin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in sal dingin Judah mi zasagih sawmli-nga a pai khiatpih hi. A vekpi-in mi tulli leh zaguk a pha hi.
Jeremiah52:31 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin a saltan’ zawh kum sawmthum leh sagih kum ciangin Babilon-ah Evil-merodak kumpi a suak hi. Tua kumpipa in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin hehpih a
Jeremiah52:32 Hoih takin a hopih a
Jeremiah52:33 Tua ahih manin Jehoiakhin in a thong puante a suahkhia hi. A nuntak hun sung teng khempeuh kumpipa’ sabuai-ah ni simin an a ne hi.
Jeremiah52:34 A sih ni a tun’ mateng a nuntak hun sung tengin ni simin a kisapna bangin kumpipa in a pia tawntung hi.

Ezekiel10:10 Tua leengpeite a pianzia kibang kim a

Ezekiel10:12 A leengpei kualte

Ezekiel16:32 A pasal it zaw loin
Ezekiel16:33 Numei paktatte sum tawh kiguai a

Ezekiel16:35 “Tua ahih ciangin numei paktat aw

Ezekiel16:37 na lawm luite khempeuh—na itte hita leh

Ezekiel16:46 Na u nu in leilu lam-a om Samaria leh a khuaneute ahi hi. Na nau nu in leitaw lam-a om Sodom leh a khuaneute ahi hi.
Ezekiel16:47 Amaute’ khekhap zui-in a muhdahhuai amaute’ gamtatnate bek tawh na lungkim zo nai kei lai a
Ezekiel16:48 Keimah in a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin kong cihin ah: Nang leh na khuaneute gamtat siat zahin na sanggamnu Sodom leh a khuaneute gamtat sia ngei nai lo hi.
Ezekiel16:49 Na sanggamnu’ mawhna in: Amah leh a tanute in nek ding tampi nei-in nuamsa mahmahin dai takin om uh ahih manin amaute kiphasak uh a
Ezekiel16:50 Amaute kihisakin ka deih loh nate gamta uh ahih manin
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria in nangma gamtatsiat zah lang zong gamta lo hi. Na sanggamnu sangin gamtat sia zaw mahmah na hih manin
Ezekiel16:52 Tu-in na mindaina teng na thuak kul hi. Na sanggam numeite’ mawhna sangin nangma mawhnate nak siatzaw lua ahih manin nang kiang panin amaute a mawh lo tawh kibang phial hi. Na sanggam numei dangte a siangtho bangsak phial na hih manin zahla in la

Ezekiel40:7 Tua ban-ah lampi khat om a
Ezekiel40:8 Hih inndei golzaw a teh ciangin tong giat
Ezekiel40:9 Hih inndei pen biakinn tun’ nading lampi tawpna hi a
Ezekiel40:10 (Hih lampi pang tuak-a om galvilna inndei neute pen a golna kikim a
Ezekiel40:11 Tua ciangin a mipa in a lampi teh a

Ezekiel40:13 Tua ciangin inndei neu kawm nung panin lampi kantanin a gal san-a inndei neu kawm nung dong teh a
Ezekiel40:14 Inndei nunung pen zomah biakinntual om a
Ezekiel40:15 Kulhkong pua panin inndei nawlnung kawm pua dong lampi sauna tong sawmnga pha hi.
