Ezekiel40:17 Tua ciangin a mipa in kongpi tawnin a tualah hong paipih hi. A tual pualam kawm tawh kizomin inndei sawmthum om a
Ezekiel40:18 Hih suangphah pen a tual kimkotah om a
Ezekiel40:19 Tua ciangin a sung lam tual lut nadingin a sang zaw-ah kongpi khat om hi. A mipa in hih kongpi nih kikal a teh ciangin tong za khat pha hi.
Ezekiel40:20 Tua ciangin a mipa in a pualam tual paina ahi
Ezekiel40:21 Tua bangin a teh ciangin lampi pang tuaka om galvilna inndei neu thumte
Ezekiel40:22 A inndei golzaw
Ezekiel40:23 Nisuahna lam pang-a om bang teek mahin
Ezekiel40:24 Tua ciangin a mipa in leitaw lam pangah hong paipih a
Ezekiel40:25 Kongpi dang-a omte mah bangin hih lai-ah zong inndeite in kongvangneu nei uh hi. A kongpi lampi pen tong sawmnga sau-in tong sawmnih leh nga zai hi.
Ezekiel40:26 Tua kongpi lampi tun’ nadingin kahlei cial sagih mah om a
Ezekiel40:27 Hih lai-ah zong tual sungnung paina kong lampi khat mah om hi. A mipa in kong leh kong kikal a teh ciangin tong za khat pha hi.
Ezekiel40:28 Tua ciangin Leitaw lam kongpi tawnin tual sungnungah hong paipih hi. A lampi a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi.
Ezekiel40:29 A galvilna inndei neute
Ezekiel40:30 
Ezekiel40:31 A inndei golzaw pen in tual puanung lam nga hi. Lampi pang tuaka kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a
Ezekiel40:32 Tua ciangin nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin a tual sungnung-ah hong paipih hi. A lampi a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi.
Ezekiel40:33 A galvilna inndei neute
Ezekiel40:34 A inndei golzaw pen a tual puanung lam nga hi. Lampi pang tuaka om kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a
Ezekiel40:35 Tua ciangin leilu lam kongpi lampi-ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel40:36 A dangte mah bangin hih in zong galvilna inndei neute
Ezekiel40:37 A inndei golzaw pen a tual puanung lam nga hi. Lampi pang tuaka om kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a
Ezekiel40:38 Tual puanung sungah lampi tawh a kimatin inndei gol khat om a
Ezekiel40:39 Hih inndei gol sungah sabuai li om a
Ezekiel40:40 Hih inndei pualam
Ezekiel40:41 Tua ahih manin inndei sungah sabuai li
Ezekiel40:42 Meihal biakna-in piak ding ganhingte bawl nadinga kizang sabuai lite pen suang a kiseek ahi hi. Tua sabuaite tong khat sang a
Ezekiel40:43 Hih sabuaite kimkotah khut peek cia bang a zai geihual kibawl hi. Biakna-in piak ding sa khempeuh hih sabuaite tungah kikoih hi.
Ezekiel40:44 Tua ciangin a pualam panin a tual sungnungah hong paipih a
Ezekiel40:45 A mipa in kei kiangah hih bangin hong gen hi: Leitaw lam a nga inndei pen biakinn sungah na a sem siampite’ ading hi a
Ezekiel40:46 leilu lam a nga inndei pen biakna tau-ah na a sem siampite’ ading ahi hi. Tua siampite khempeuh pen Zadok’ suan Levi mite vive ahi uh hi. Ama na a sem dingin Topa ’ omna-ah amaute bek kipaisak hi
Ezekiel40:47 A mipa in hih tual sungnung a teh ciangin a dung a vai tong za khat tuak pha hi. A biakinn mai-ah biakna tau khat om hi.
Ezekiel40:48 Tua ciangin biakinn sung lutna inndei-ah hong paipih hi. Amah in a sung lutna lampi teh a
Ezekiel40:49 Innsung lutna inndei pen tong sawmnih sau a

Ezekiel41:2 tong sawm zai a
Ezekiel41:3 Tua ciangin inndei tawngnungah amah pai a
Ezekiel41:4 Tua inndei tawngnung a teh ciangin a dung a vai tong sawmnih tuak pha hi. Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah
Ezekiel41:5 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn kawm puanung teh a
Ezekiel41:6 Hih inndei neute dawl thum pha a
Ezekiel41:7 Tua biakinn kawm pang bel-a kibawl inndei neute sungah kahlei om to a
Ezekiel41:8 Biakinn kimkot teng a lei kitawito a
Ezekiel41:9 Inndei neute a kawm sahna tong nga pha a
Ezekiel41:10 biakinn kimkotah suangphah bangin a kitawito-a kibawl a zaina in tong sawmnih ahi hi.
Ezekiel41:11 Biakinn kimkot-a om inndei neute-ah paina ding kongvang
Ezekiel41:12 Tua ciangin nitumna lamah biakinn lam a nga inn khat om hi. A inn dung tong sawmkua hi a
Ezekiel41:13 Tua ciangin mipa in biakinnpi teh a
Ezekiel41:14 Nisuahna lam pang biakinn mai lam a vai lamin a mun awng tawh kigawmin tong za khat mah ahi hi.
Ezekiel41:15 Tua ciangin biakinn nitumna lam pangah a om
Ezekiel41:16 a sual panin a kongvangneute ciang dong singpeek tawh kidap hi. A kongvangneute pen a pualam a kihui-a kibawl ahi hi.
Ezekiel41:17 Biakinn sung lam kawmte pen kongkhak zang ciang dong lim kibawlte tawh kidim a
Ezekiel41:18 nisuh kungte leh kherub limte vive ahi hi. Amasa-in nisuh kung
Ezekiel41:19 A mihing maitang in a pang khat lama om nisuh kung lam nga a
Ezekiel41:20 sual panin kongkhak zang kikal sung khempeuh ah a dimin om hi.
Ezekiel41:21 Biakinn deipi kongkhak khuamte pen a siik kikim vive ahi hi.
Ezekiel41:22 Tua ciangin Siangthopen Mun mai-ah sing tawh a kibawl biakna tau tawh a kibang pian khat om hi. Tong thum sang a
Ezekiel41:23 Inndeipi sung lut nading leh Siangthopen Mun lut nading ah kongkhak om hi.
Ezekiel41:24 Tua kongkhakte pen a laizang-a kituah
Ezekiel41:25 Biakinn sung kawmte tungah a kibawl mah bangin hih biakinn deipi sung lutna-a kongkhakte tungah nisuh kung leh kherub limte kibawl hi. Kongkhak pualam
Ezekiel41:26 Hih inndeipi sung kawmte tungah a pualam a kihui kongvangneute om a

Ezekiel42:4 Hih inn leilu lam pangah tong sawm zai-in

Ezekiel42:6 Biakinn tual-a inn dangte mah bangin tua inndei dawl thumte pen a cial tungah kinga uh a
Ezekiel42:7 A cial nuainung-a inndeite pen tong sawmnga sau a

Ezekiel43:2 nisuahna lam panin Israelte’ Pasian’ minthan’na hong pai ka mu hi. Pasian’ awging pen tuipi ging tawh kibang a
Ezekiel43:3 Hih ka maang muhna pen
Ezekiel43:4 Topa ’ minthan’na in nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin biakinn sungah lut hi.

Ezekiel43:7 “Ezekiel aw

Ezekiel43:9 Ahi zongin tu-in amaute in pasian dangte bia nawn loin
Ezekiel43:10 Tua ciangin Topa in a thugen hong zom lai a
Ezekiel43:11 Amaute a gamtatnasate uh hang hong maizum theih uh leh

Ezekiel43:13 “Biakna-tau golna pen hih bang hi ding hi. A teh nadingin biakinn tehna-a kizang ngeite mah hi ding hi. A biaknatau bul kimkot pen tong khat sangin

Ezekiel43:20 Nangmah in a sisan pawlkhat la-in biaknatau kiu li-a om ki lite
Ezekiel43:21 Mawhna hangin biakna-in a kipia bawngtal pen la-in biakinn huang pualam
Ezekiel43:22 A zing ciangin pauban’na a om lo keeltal khat la-in mawhna hangin biakna-in na pia ding hi. Bawngtal si tawh na sian’ suah mah bangin hih keeltal si tawh zong biakna tau na sian’suah ding hi.

Ezekiel44:1 Tua ciangin a mipa in nisuahna lam biakinn huang kongpi pua-ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel44:2 Topa in kei kiangah
Ezekiel44:3 Ahi zongin hih lai-ah gam-uk na a sem laitak ulianpa pen keima omna-ah biakna an siangtho a ne dingin hong pai thei ding hi. Amah hong pai ciangin inndeipi tawnin inndei sungnung kongvangah hong lutin tua lai mahah pusuak ding hi
Ezekiel44:4 Tua ciangin a mipa in leilu lam kongpi tawnin biakinn mai-ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel44:5 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah
Ezekiel44:6 A lehdo thei hih Israel mite’ tungah Topa Pasian keimah in ka gen thute
Ezekiel44:7 Keimah biakna-in sathaute leh sasite nong piak uh ciangin
Ezekiel44:8 Ka biakinn sungah biakna ngeinate na zui kei uh a
Ezekiel44:9 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in tu-in kong genin ah: Vun ki-at lo gamdang mite peuhmah ka biakinn sungah lut lo ding uh a
Ezekiel44:10 No Israel midangte tawh kei hong nusia khawmin milim a bia Levi mite in zong daan thuak ding uh hi.
Ezekiel44:11 Amaute in biakinn kong cin’ leh biakinn sung nasepte sem thei ding uh hi. Meihal biakna-a kipia ganhingte leh mite in biakna-in a piak ganhingte go thei ding uh a
Ezekiel44:12 Ahi zongin amaute in milim biakna lamah Israel mite makaih-in mawhna sungah Israel mite tun’pih uh ahih ciangin
Ezekiel44:13 Amaute in keima siampi na sem loin
Ezekiel44:14 Ahi zongin biakinn sunga nasep a kisam dangte a sem dingin amaute ka seh thei ding hi
Ezekiel44:15 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah
Ezekiel44:16 Ka biakinn sungah amaute lutin
Ezekiel44:17 A tual sungnung paina kongpi-ah a lut uh ciangin saihadial puan silh ding uh hi. Tual sungnung sung leh biakinn sungah na a sep lai takun samul puan peuhmah silh lo ding uh hi.
Ezekiel44:18 Amaute in saihadial puan khimin
Ezekiel44:19 Mi dangte a omna biakinntual puanung ah a pusuah ma-un
Ezekiel44:20 “Amaute in a sam uh mettol lo ding uh a
Ezekiel44:21 Biakinntual sungnung ah a lut ma-un siampite in leenggahzu ne lo ding uh hi.
Ezekiel44:22 Meigong numei ahi a
Ezekiel44:23 “Amaute in ka mite tungah
Ezekiel44:24 Thu nei khatpeuh peuh a om ciangin

Ezekiel44:26 Amaute a kisian’suah khit uh nipi kal khat khit ciang bekin
Ezekiel44:27 biakinntual sungnung ah pai-in biakinn sungah na a sep kik theih nadingun kisian’suahna biakna pia ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi.

Ezekiel45:1 “Israel minamte tungah piak dingin leitang a kihawm ciangin

Ezekiel45:3 Hih biakna leitang siangtho sung panin siangthopen mun leh biakinn mun dingin a sau lam tong tul sawmnih leh tul nga
Ezekiel45:4 Hih a kisehkhia mun sung teng pen biakna leitang siangtho hi ding a
Ezekiel45:5 Hihte banah
Ezekiel45:6 Khuapi huang sung dingin a dung tong tul sawmnih leh tul nga

Ezekiel45:15 tuu na neih sung uh pan za nih ciangin khat hi ding hi. Hihte pen an tawh biakna
Ezekiel45:16 Israel mi khempeuh in hihte pen biakna-a piak dingin
Ezekiel45:17 Gam uk ulianpa in meihal biakna-a piak ding ganhingte

Ezekiel45:23 Tua pawi ni sagih sung ni simin pauban’na a om lo bawngtal sagih leh tuutal sagih la-in Topa tungah meihal biakna-in pia ding a
Ezekiel45:24 Bawngtal leh tuutal a kipia zah tawh kizui-in an tawh biak nadingin an bung khat pai leh sathau bing khat pai tawh piakhawm ding hi.

Ezekiel46:1 “ Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Nisuahna lama om

Daniel1:1 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim kumpi a suah zawh a kum thumna kumin
Daniel1:2 Topa in
Daniel1:3 Kumpipa in Israel salte sunga kumpi nam leh mi lian namte lak pan mi pawlkhat a teel khia dingin innsung mang lianpen Ashpenaz thu a pia hi.
Daniel1:4 Tua mite in kumpi inn sunga nasem siamte a suah theih nadingun a mel hoih
Daniel1:5 Amaute in kumpi inn sunga nasem dangte mah bangin ni simin an leh leenggahzu tawh vak dingin kumpipa in thu a pia hi. Tua banga kumthum sung sinna a neih khit uh ciangin amaute kumpipa’ mai-ah a kilak kik ding uh ahi hi.
Daniel1:6 Tua banga a kiteelte in Judah mi vive ahi Daniel
Daniel1:7 Innsung mang lianpenpa in amaute minthak phuah a
Daniel1:8 Daniel in kumpi inn sunga an leh leengahzu tawh a pumpi a thanghuai sak loh nadingin a lungsim a khentat hi. Amah in innsung mang lianpen Ashpenaz kiangah tua bang an a kipiak loh nadingin a ngen zaw hi.
Daniel1:9 Tua ciangin Pasian in Ashpenaz in Daniel tungah maipha leh hehpihna a neih theih nadingin a bawlsak hi.
Daniel1:10 Ahih hangin Ashpenaz in Daniel kiangah
Daniel1:11 Tua ciangin Daniel in Ashpenaz in amah leh a dang thumte cing dinga a koihpa kiangah a pai hi.
Daniel1:12 Amah in
Daniel1:13 Tua ciangin kumpi’ an ne khangnote tawh hong enkak khawm in la
Daniel1:14 Amah in amau nget bang mangin nisawm sung etcik dingin a thukim hi.
Daniel1:15 Nisawm a cin’ khit ciangin amaute kumpi’ an nete sangin cidam zaw uh a
Daniel1:16 Tua ciangin a cingpa in kumpi’ an leh lenggahzu pia loin amaute anteh an a pia hi.
Daniel1:17 Pasian in tua khangno lite lai theih siamna leh pilna thukte a pia hi. Daniel pen mangmuhna leh mang khiat siamna a pia hi.
Daniel1:18 Kumpipa sehsa kumthum a cin’ khit ciangin Ashpenaz in khangnote khempeuh kumpipa kiangah a paipih hi.
Daniel1:19 Kumpipa in amaute khempeuh hopih a
Daniel1:20 Kumpipa in bangbang thu haksa nono a dot hangin
Daniel1:21 Sairas
Daniel2:1 Nebukhadnezzar kumpi a suah zawh a kumnih lai takin mang khat a man’ hi. A lungsim patau lua mahmah ahih manin a ihmu thei kei hi.
Daniel2:2 Tua ahih ciangin bang mang man’ cih a hilh dingin mitphial siamte

Daniel7:4 Amasa pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a
Daniel7:5 Tua ciangin a nihna sapi vompi tawh a kibang khat ka mu hi. A nunglam khe tawh ding-in a kam sung a ha kikalah nakguh thum pet a
Daniel7:6 Ka et lai leh kamkei tawh a kibang sapi dang khat ka mu hi. A nungzangah vasa-kha tawh a kibang kha li a nei hi. Tua sapi in lutang li nei a
Daniel7:7 Ka et lai leh sapi lina ka mu hi. Tua sapi kihtak huai mahmah a
Daniel7:8 Tua kite ka et lai takin a dang kineu khat hong po a
Daniel7:9 Ka et lai takin kumpi tokhomte a hong kikoih hi. A nungta tawntung mi Pa khat in tua tokhomte khat tungah a tu hi. A puante vuk bangin ngo a
Daniel7:10 tua sung panin meikuang gunpi a hong luangkhia hi. Ama nasem ding mihing tulza om a
Daniel7:11 Ka et lai takin tua kineu in kiphatsakna kamsia a pau ka za hi. Ka et lailai leh tua sapi lina kithat a
Daniel7:12 Sapi dangte ahih leh a vangliatna uh kilakkhiat sak a
Daniel7:13 Zan ka mangmuh hun sungin ka khuadak leh mihing tapa tawh a kibang mi khat meii tunga hong pai ka mu hi. A nungta tawnung mipa’ kiangah pai-in

Daniel10:7 Tua mangmuhna keimah bekin ka mu hi. Ka gei-a om mi dangte in bangmah a mu kei uh hi. Ahih hangin lau-in taimangin a bu uh hi.
Daniel10:8 Kei guak bek hong kinusia ahih manin tua a lamdang mangmuhna keimah guak bek mah in ka mu hi. Ka tha neih teng bei khin a
Daniel10:9 Tua mipa’ kam pau ka zak ciangin ka khup lamin lei lakah ka tuksuk a
Daniel10:10 Tua lai takin khut khat in kei hong lenin
Daniel10:11 Amah in
Daniel10:12 Tua ciangin amah in
Daniel10:13 Persia gam a uk kumpipa in ni sawmnih leh nikhat sung a hong nial hi. Tua ciangin vantungmi thupite khat ahi Mikhael in kei hong panpih dingin a hong pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Persia gam sungah keimah guak bek ka om hi.
Daniel10:14 Mai lam hunah na mipihte’ tunga hong tung ding thu hilhkhol dinga hong pai ka hi hi. Hih in mai lama hong piang lai ding mangmuhna ahi hi.
Daniel10:15 Amah in hih thu a hong gen ciangin keimah in bangmah pau thei loin lei ka en suk gega lel hi.
Daniel10:16 Tua ciangin pasal mel tawh a kibang mi khat thakhatin ka mai-ah hong suak-a ka muk a hong lawn’sak hi. Tua ciangin kamka-in thugen dingin ka kisa hi. Ka mai-a dingpa kiangah
Daniel10:17 A Topa mai a ding sila khat tawh ka kibang hi. Bang ci banga thu hong gen thei ding ka hi hiam? Husan’ zawh nading thatang nangawn ka nei kei hi
Daniel10:18 Amah in khat vei hong lenkik leuleu a

Daniel10:21 
Daniel11:1 “Media mi Darias a kum khatna hunin keimah in amaute hansuahin a kip a kho nadingun ka hanciam hi.
Daniel11:2 “Tu-a na tunga kong gen ding thu in thuman ahi hi. Kumpi thum in Persia gam uk lai ding a
Daniel11:3 Tua ciangin a thahat kumpi khat a hong kilang ding hi. Amah in gam zapi tak uk ding a
Daniel11:4 Ahih hangin a thahat pen lai takin a gam hong kitam dinga khen li a kisuah ding hi. A suan a khakte in ama gam uk kha loin ama vangliatna zah vaang a nei zo kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama ukna kibotkhia-in midangte’ tungah kipia ding hi.
Daniel11:5 “Khanglam kumpi a hong thahat ding hi. Ahi zongin a galkap mang lianpente khat thahatpen dinga gam lianzaw a uk ding hi.
Daniel11:6 Kum sauvei sim khit ciangin Izipt kumpipa in kipawl khop theih nadingin a tanu leh Siria kumpipa a kiteng sak ding hi. Ahih hangin tua kipawl khopna kip lo ding a
Daniel11:7 “A sawt loin tua nu behte khat in Siria sim ding a
Daniel11:8 Amah in amaute’ milim pasiante leh na manpha ngun leh khamte Izipt gamah a pua ding hi. Kum tawm vei sung bek kilemna a om ding hi.
Daniel11:9 Siria kumpipa in Izipt gam sim ding a
Daniel11:10 “Siria kumpipa’ tate in galdo dingin kithawi-in galkap ding mi tampi a kaikhawm ding uh hi. Tua galkap mangte khat thahat diakin tuikhang bang dinga galte’ kulhpi a luh zo ding hi.
Daniel11:11 Izipt kumpipa zong heh mahmahin Siria kumpipa in zo gawp ding a
Daniel11:12 A galhat man leh galkap tampi a thahna hangin kisa thei mahmah ding a
Daniel11:13 Siria kumpipa khatvei kuan kikin amasa sanga a tam zaw galkap a kaikhawm ding hi. A hun kicingta a kisak ciangin galkap tampi leh galhiam kicing pikpek tawh a kuankhia ding hi.
Daniel11:14 “Tua hun ciangin mi tampi takin Izipt kumpipa a lehdo ding uh hi. Daniel’ mipihte ahi
Daniel11:15 Tua ahih ciangin Siria kumpipa in kulhpi tawh a kiumcih khuapite luh zo-in a la khin ding hi. Izipt galkapte in galdo suak zo nawn lo ding uh a
Daniel11:16 Galdo zo ding om nawn lo uh ahih manin a galte a ut utin a gamta ding uh hi. Thuciam Gamah zong lutin a khut sungah tua gam a suksiat nading thahatna a nei ding hi.
Daniel11:17 Siria kumpipa in a galkap neih khempeuh zangin galsim ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Olno taka a gualzawh theih nadingin a tanu leh a galte teen’ sak ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Ahih hangin a lawhcing zo kei veve ding hi.
Daniel11:18 Tua khit ciangin tuipi gei-a
Daniel11:19 Kumpipa in a kulhpi zuankik dingin a gamah hong ciah ding a
Daniel11:20 “Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat in ama nung hong zuikik leuleu ding a
Daniel11:21 A zom-a Siria kumpi ding pen mi gilo
Daniel11:22 Ama mai-ah galkap honpite kisiak khia ding a
Daniel11:23 Zuau gensiamna zangin minam dangte tawh kilemna a bawl ding hi. Minam tawmno khat bek a uk hangin a thahatna a khang semsem ding hi.
Daniel11:24 Amah in a pu a pate’ hih ngei loh
Daniel11:25 Izipt gam hang taka a sim theih nadingin galkap tampi a kaikhawm ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Izipte in zong galkap tampi tawh nasia takin a na do ding uh hi. Izipt kumpipa in kheemna thuak kha ding ahih manin gal a zo kei ding hi.
Daniel11:26 Ama muan pen a thudot mipilte in amah lehbawlin a siasak ding uh hi. A galkapte tampi tak si ding ahih manin gal a lel ding hi.
Daniel11:27 Tua kumpi tegel in sabuai khat tungah tu in
Daniel11:28 Tua ciangin Siria kumpipa in a galvan lak teng tawh a gamah ciahkik ding a
Daniel11:29 “Tua nung ciangin Izipt gam sim kik leuleu ding a
Daniel11:30 Nitumna tuipi gei a
Daniel11:31 A galkapte pawl khat in biakinnpi leh biakinnpi huang a niinsak ding uh hi. Amaute in nisim biak piaknate khawlsak ding uh a
Daniel11:32 Kumpipa in tua biakna a nusia khinsa mite a thu zawh theih nadingin zuau gen siamna a zang ding hi. Ahih hangin Pasian nung a zui mite in ahih uh leh kiptakin a nial ding uh hi.
Daniel11:33 Pilna a nei mite in a pilna uh midang tampite a hilh ding uh hi. Ahih hangin tawl khat sung mi pawlkhat in gal sunga sihna leh meikuang sunga thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Mi kim khatte in lawkgawpna leh thongkiatna thuak ding uh hi.
Daniel11:34 Tua banga thahna a thuak lai takun
Daniel11:35 Mi pawlkhat in thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua banga a pian’na thu in
Daniel11:36 “Siria kumpipa in a ut bangbangin a gamta ding hi. Amah in pasiante sangin ka lianzaw a
Daniel11:37 Kumpipa in a pu a pate’ biak pasian leh
Daniel11:38 Tua pasiante sangin kulhpi a dal pasian a thupi sim zaw ding hi. Amah in kham
Daniel11:39 Amah in a kulhpi cing dingin pasian dang a biate a sawl ding hi. Amah in amah kumpi-a a sangte minphatna
Daniel11:40 Siria kumpipa hun a bei dektak ciangin
Daniel11:41 Amah in Thuciam Gam zong sim ding a
Daniel11:42 Amah in gam tampi tak sim ding a
Daniel11:43 Amah in Izipt gam sunga kisel
Daniel11:44 Tua ciangin
Daniel11:45 Amah in a kumpi puanbuk lianpite biakinn din’na mualtung leh tuipi kikalah a lam ding hi. Ahih hangin amah a si ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a huh ding kuamah a om kei hi.
Daniel12:1 “Tua hun ciangin na mite a cing
Daniel12:2 A sisa mi tampite in nuntakna a ngah kik ding uh hi. Pawl khatte in nungta tawntung ding uh a
Daniel12:3 A pilte ahih uh leh vantung khuavak tawh a taang khawm ding uh hi. A pha-a a gamtat nading uh mi tampi thu a hilhte in aksi bangin a taang tawntung ding uh hi.
Daniel12:4 Tu-in Daniel aw
Daniel12:5 Tua ciangin keimah Daniel in gun pang tuaka ding mi nih ka mu hi.
Daniel12:6 Tua mite khat in puanpak silh a
Daniel12:7 Puanpaak silhpa in a khut tegel vantung lamah lamto kawm sa-in
Daniel12:8 A thugen ka za a
Daniel12:9 Amah in
Daniel12:10 Mi tampite kisiansuahin a hoih leh a hoih lo lam a kikhentel ding hi. Mi gilote in bangmah thei tel thei lo uh ahih manin a gi kei semsem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin mi pilte in theih tel theihna a nei ding uh hi.
Daniel12:11 Amaute in nisim biak piakna a khawlsak leh a Lipkhaphuai na a hong pian’ ciang ni tulkhat leh zanih leh sawmkua a sawt ding hi.
Daniel12:12 Ni tulkhat leh zathum leh sawmthum leh nga dong muan’ huai taka a ngak zo kenkante in thupha a ngah ding uh hi.
Daniel12:13 Nang

Obadiah1:13 Ka mite in haksatna a tuah ni-un a kongpi sungah tum kei un. A tuahsiat ni-un a thuaknate uh munuam kei un. A tuahsiat ni-un a sum a paite laksak kei un.

John15:3 Ka thuhilhna hangin note tu-in na siangtho uh hi.

John15:17 Hih in keima thupiakna ahi hi; Khat leh khat na ki-it un.”

Romans5:1 Tua ahih ciangin i upna tawh dikkisakna i ngah ahih ciangin eite Topa Zeisu Khazih hangin Pasian tawh i kilem hi.
Romans5:2 Tua Topa hangin eite omna hehpihna sungah upna hangin tum theihna thu i ngah hi; Pasian’ vangliatna lamenin lungdamin i om hi.

Romans5:4 Thuakzawhna in teci kilatsakna a piangsak hi. Teci kilatsakna in lawpna a piangsak hi.

Romans14:1 Upna neu mi na mang un. Ahih hangin up khialh nading thute tua mi tawh na kikum kei un.

Romans14:3 An pawl khempeuh a ne mi in a ne lo mi simmawh kei hen. A ne lo mi in a ne mi dongtel kei hen. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh

Romans14:5 Mi khat in ni khat sangin ni khat a manpha zaw hi ci-in a ciamteh hi. Mi khat in ni khempeuh a kibang hi ci-in a ciamteh thei hi. Mikim in ama lungsimah pha a sak bang hi ta hen.

Romans14:13 Tua ahih ciangin eite in tu-a kipanin khat leh khat thu kisuah loin om ni. Unau khat puk nading ahi zongin

Romans15:13 Note in Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna hangah lametna pha tawh na dim nadingun
Romans15:14 Ute naute aw
Romans15:15 Kha Siangtho in hong sian’ thosak deihhuai biakna ahi Gentailte pia dingin
Romans15:16 keimah in Pasian’ Lungdamna Thuhilh na semin Gentailte tungah Khazih’ nasem ka hih nading
Romans15:17 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian tawh a kituak nate hangah note lamsang ah keimah in Khazih Zeisu suangin ka kisathei hi.
Romans15:18 Gentailte in kam tawh ahi zongin
Romans15:19 lim leh nalamdang vangliatna leh Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna lakin keima tungah a bawl nate bek ka gen ngam hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem khua panin Ilirikum gam dongin
Romans15:20 Ahi hi. Midangte khuamphuhna tungah ka lam loh na’ngin
Romans15:21 Lai Siangtho sungah: “Tua mi thu
Romans15:22 Tua ahih ciangin note omna munah kong pai theih loh nading tam veipi hong kikham zo hi.
Romans15:23 Tu lai takin hih munte-ah ka hih ding om lo ahih ciangin note omna-ah kong pai ding pen sau veipi-in deihin
Romans15:24 Spain ka pai ciangin lampi-ah note tawh kimu-in
Romans15:25 Tu-in ahih leh

Romans15:33 Nopna hong pia Pasian in note khempeuh tawh omkhawm ta hen. Amen.
Romans16:1 Kenkhrea khua-ah a om pawlpi nasem numei ahi
Romans16:2 Misiangthote in ahih ding a kilawm bangin
Romans16:3 Kei tawh kibang Khazih Zeisu’ nasem khawm Prisilla leh Akuila na hopihsak un.
Romans16:4 Amaute in keima nuntakna tang ding amau ngawng a dawh ngamte ahi uh hi. “Amau in hehpihna a nei uh hi
Romans16:5 Amau inn sungah a om pawlpi zong na hopihsak un. Asia gamah Khazih ading a gah masabel ka it Epainetas zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:6 Note nasem a hahkat Mari na hopihsak un.
Romans16:7 Kei tawh thongkia khawm
Romans16:8 Pasian hangah ke’n ka it Amflias na hopihsak un.
Romans16:9 Kote tawh Khazih’ nasem khawmpa Urbanas leh ka it Stakhus zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:10 Nungzui taktak ahi Epelles leh Aritobulus’ innkuante zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:11 Ka beh Herodion leh Narkissas’ innkuante lakah Topa nung a zuite zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:12 Topa’ nasemte ahi Trifana leh Trofosa na hopihsak un. Topa’ nasem ahi it ding a kilawm numei Persis zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:13 Topa’ teelsa Rufas leh a nu ahi
Romans16:14 Asinkritas
Romans16:15 Filologas
Romans16:16 Khat leh khat siangtho kinapna tawh na kihopih un. Khazih’ pawlpite khempeuh in note hong hopih uh hi.
Romans16:17 Ute naute aw
Romans16:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
Romans16:19 Note’ thuman’na in mi khempeuhte lakah kithang ahih ciangin
Romans16:20 Nopna hong pia Pasian in a sawt loin note khe nuai uh ah Satan a bawlsia ding hi. Eite Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thupha in note tungah om ta hen.
Romans16:21 Kei tawh na a semkhawm Timoti akipan ka behte ahi uh Lukias
Romans16:22 Hih lai a gelh keimah Tertias in Topa hangin kong hopih hi.
Romans16:23 Kei ahi zongin
Romans16:24 I Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thu note khempeuh tawh omkhawm ta hen.)
Romans16:25 Tanglai tawntung kiseel khin a
Romans16:26 
Romans16:27 pilna tawh a dim Pasian
1Corinthians1:1 Pasian’ deihna hangin Khazih Zeisu’ sawltak za-ah hong koih
1Corinthians1:2 Khazih Zeisu hangin mawhna tawh kipelh
1Corinthians1:3 Topa Zeisu Khazih leh i Pa Pasian kiang panin hehpihna thupha leh nopna nomau tungah hong tung ta hen.
1Corinthians1:4 Khazih’ thu tecipan’na nomau lakah a kip ahih ciangin
1Corinthians1:5 note in amah hangah thu genna leh lungpilna a kipan
1Corinthians1:6 Khazih Zeisu hangah no hong piak thupha hehpihna suangin
1Corinthians1:7 Tua ahih ciangin note in i Topa Zeisu Khazih hong kilat ding ngakin na om lai takun hong piakna thupha khat beek na sam kei uh hi.
1Corinthians1:8 Tua Topa in eite Topa Zeisu Khazih’ Ni-inah mawhsak nading tawh na kipelh nadingun a tawp dongin no hong kipsak ding hi.
1Corinthians1:9 I Topa ahi ama Tapa Zeisu Khazih tawh kipawlna sungah hong sam Pasian in ciam pelh mi ahi kei hi.
1Corinthians1:10 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians1:11 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians1:12 Note in
1Corinthians1:13 Khazih a kikhen hiam? Paul in note tang dingin singlamteh tungah a si hiam? Ahih kei leh
1Corinthians1:14 Krispas leh Gaias longal note lakah kuamah ka baptaiz kei hi ci-in Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat hi.
1Corinthians1:15 Tua ahih ciangin
1Corinthians1:16 Stefanas-te innkuan zong ka baptaiz hi. Midangte ka baptaiz lam ka thei kei hi.
1Corinthians1:17 Khazih in baptaiz dingin kei hong sawl lo hi; Lungdamna Thu hilh dingin hong sawl hi. Ahih hangin Khazih’ singlamteh a mawkna ahih loh nadingin kam pilna tawh hilh ding hong sawl kei hi.
1Corinthians1:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians1:19 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians1:20 Lungpil mi koi-ah a om hiam? Laithei mi koi-ah a om hiam? Hih leitung thu kidong thei mi koi-ah a om hiam? Pasian in leitung pilna a haisak hilo ahi hiam?
1Corinthians1:21 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians1:22 Judah mite in nalamdang a ngen thei uh hi. Grik mite in lungpilna a zong thei uh hi.
1Corinthians1:23 Eite i hih leh
1Corinthians1:24 Ahih hangin Judah mi hi taleh
1Corinthians1:25 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians1:26 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians1:27 Pasian in lungpilte zumsak nadingin leitung mihaite a teelkhia hi. A thahatte a zumsak nadingin leitungah a thanemte a teelkhia hi.
1Corinthians1:28 A omte a man’than sak nadingin leitungah a gina lote leh a kigina sim lote akipan
1Corinthians1:29 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian mai-ah kuamah a kisathei ding a om kei hi.
1Corinthians1:30 Tua Pasian hangin note in Khazih Zeisu sungah na om uh hi. Tua Khazih Zeisu in eite ading Pasian kiang pan pilna
1Corinthians1:31 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin
1Corinthians2:1 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians2:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians2:3 Note tawh ka omkhawm lai takin thanemin
1Corinthians2:4 Note’ upna un mite’ pilna-ah kip loin Pasian’ vangliatna-ah a kip nadingin
1Corinthians2:5 ka kam leh ka thuhilhna in mite’ pilna tawh kipawl zolna kam ahi kei hi; Kha Siangtho hong lahna vangliatna ahi hi.
1Corinthians2:6 A kicing mite kiangah pilna thu i gen hi. Ahih hangin leitung pilna thu ahi zongin
1Corinthians2:7 Leitung pian’ ma-in eite minthan’ nadingin Pasian in a vaihawm kholh pilna ahi
1Corinthians2:8 Tua pilna pen leitung ukte khat beek in a thei kei uh hi. Thei uh hi leh
1Corinthians2:9 Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin: “Pasian a itte adingin Pasian bawlsate in
1Corinthians2:10 Pasian in ama Kha Siangtho tawh tua nate eite hong lak hi. Bang ci hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians2:11 Mi sungah a om kha longal mi khatpeuh tawh kipawl lungsimte kua in a theithei ding hiam? Tua mah bangin Pasian’ Kha Siangtho longal Pasian’ nate a thei kuamah a om kei hi.
1Corinthians2:12 Ahih hangin eite in leitung tawh kipawl Kha i ngah kei hi; Pasian in aman ngen loin hong piakte i theih nadingin Pasian kiangpan hong kipia Kha i ngah zo hi.
1Corinthians2:13 Tua nate kote in mi pilna hong hilh kam tawh ka gen kei uh hi; Kha Siangtho in hong hilh kam tawh kha thute khamite kiangah ka gen uh hi.
1Corinthians2:14 Kha Siangtho a nei lo mi in Pasian’ Kha Siangtho’ thute a mang kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians2:15 Kha Siangtho a nei mi in na khempeuh khen thei a
1Corinthians2:16 Topa a hilh dingin ama lungsim a thei kua ahi hiam? Eite in ahih leh

1Corinthians3:5 Tua ahih ciangin Apollos kua ahi hiam? Paul kua ahi hiam? Topa in thu a hong piak ciat mah bangin note thu up nadingin nasemte hilo ka hi uh hiam?

1Corinthians3:7 Tua ahih ciangin a suanpa in mi phamawh ahi kei hi; tuibuakpa in mi phamawh ahi kei hi; a khangsakpa Pasian in mi phamawh ahi hi.

1Corinthians4:8 Tu-in na kicing zo uh hi! Sum na hau zo uh hi! Komau tawh loin na maang uh hi. Note tawh ka man’ theih nadingin note na maang takpi le-uh teh ka ut hi.
1Corinthians4:9 Thah dinga kikoih mite bangin

1Corinthians4:12 Ka khut uh tawh gimpi-in na semin ka om uh hi. Hong kikosiat ciangin thupha pia-in ka thuk uh hi. Hong kibawlsiat leh
1Corinthians4:13 Gensiatna ka thuak uh ciangin ka thuum uh hi. Tu dongin kihhuainate bangin ahi zongin
1Corinthians4:14 Kong zumsak nadingin hih bangin gelh ka hi kei hi. Ka it ka tate bangin hilh nadingin kong gelh hi.
1Corinthians4:15 Khazih sungah thuhilh thenkhat na neih uh hangin pa tampi na nei kei uh hi! Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh

1Corinthians5:2 Tua banga gamtate note lakah na hawlkhiat nadingun

1Corinthians5:4 Ka thukhenna in i Topa Zeisu’ min tawh note in keima kha tawh na kikhop uh ciangin
1Corinthians5:5 Topa Zeisu’ Ni ciangin tua mipa’ kha in gupna a ngah theih nadingin ama pumpi a kisiat na’ng Satan’ khut sungah na pia ta un ci-in ka khen hi.
1Corinthians5:6 Na kisaktheihna uh a hoih kei hi. Silngo tawmkha in annel sial lom khat a tawksak ding thei lo na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians5:7 Note in silngo tawh na kipelh mah bangun annel sial thak na suah theih nadingun silngo lui na mangsak khin un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh

1Corinthians5:13 A pua lamah a omte Pasian in thu a khen ding hi. Tua a gilopa note lak pan na hawlkhia un.

1Corinthians6:3 Eite in vantungmite thu i khen ding thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih ciangin leitung thu a khen dingin kilawm zaw hilo na hi uh hiam?

1Corinthians6:6 U tawh nau tawh kisel tham loin
1Corinthians6:7 Tua bangin note in khat leh khat na kitot uh ciangin na guallelhna uh a kilang mahmah hi. Thuum loin bawlsiatna bang hangin thuak zaw lo na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin sum zatna thuak zaw lo na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians6:8 Tua bang thuak lo tham loin
1Corinthians6:9 Mi diklote in Pasian’ Gam a luah theih loh ding thu thei lo na hi uh hiam? Na kikheem kei un: Numei tawh a mawhte
1Corinthians6:10 sum gutate
1Corinthians6:11 Note kimkhat in nidang lai-inah tuate bangin na om uh zongin
1Corinthians6:12 Keimah in na khempeuh ka bawl theih hangin na khempeuh hih ding a kilawm kei hi. Na khempeuh ka hih theih hangin tuate khat’ sila-in ka kai kei ding hi.
1Corinthians6:13 An leh tui in gilpi ading
1Corinthians6:14 Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh Zeisu thosak a

1Corinthians8:13 Tua ahih ciangin ka annekna
1Corinthians9:1 To nei lo mi hilo ka hi hiam? Sawltakpa hilo ka hi hiam? I Topa Zeisu a mu mi hilo ka hi hiam? Note in Pasian sungah ka nasepna gah hilo na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians9:2 Midangte kiangah sawltak ka hih loh hangin note kiangah sawltak ka hi hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians9:3 Keimah hong teldotte kiangah ka mawh phel nading hih thu-in ka dawng thei hi.
1Corinthians9:4 Kote in an neek na’ng
1Corinthians9:5 Kefas leh Topa’ sanggamte akipan adang sawltakte bangin thu-um zite ka tonpih kawikawi nading uh thu nei lo ka hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians9:6 Ahih kei leh
1Corinthians9:7 Ama sum zangin kua in galkap-na sem ding ahi hiam? Kua in lo kho a
1Corinthians9:8 Leitungmite a gen uh bangin hih thu ka hong gen hiam? Thukham in zong hih bang ci hilo ahi hiam?
1Corinthians9:9 Moses’ Thukham lai sungah: “Bawng in buh a cil lai takin a muk na hen kei un
1Corinthians9:10 Ahih kei leh
1Corinthians9:11 Kote in note lakah Kha Siangtho khaici ka tuh khit uh ciangin note lak panin leitung gah ka lak uh leh
1Corinthians9:12 Midangte in note tungah hih bang thu a ngah theih uh leh
1Corinthians9:13 A siangtho nate a semte in biakna innpi panin an a ne uh hi. Biakna tau na a semte in biakna tau tawh kipawlin an a ngah uh thei lo na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians9:14 Tua mah bangin Lungdamna Thu a hilhte in Lungdamna Thu pan a kivaak nadingun Topa in thu a pia hi.
1Corinthians9:15 Ahih hangin ka zat theih nate ka zang kei hi. Note in kei tungah tua bang nong bawl nadingun hih lai ka gelh kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians9:16 Lungdamna Thu ka hilh manin kisaktheih nading thu om lo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians9:17 Ka ut thu-in hih na ka sep leh
1Corinthians9:18 Tua ahih leh
1Corinthians9:19 Keimah in kuamah’ sila ka hih loh hangin mi tampi ka ngah nadingin mi khempeuh’ sila ka suak hi.
1Corinthians9:20 Judah mite ka ngah nadingin Judah mite ading Judah mi bang ka hi hi. Thukham zui lo mi ka hi napi-in Thukham a zuite ka ngah nadingin Thukham a zuite ading Thukham zui mi ka hi hi.
1Corinthians9:21 Pasian’ thukham zui lo bangin ka om loh hangin
1Corinthians9:22 Thazawngte ka ngah nadingin thazawngte ading thazawng bang ka hi hi. Mi kimkhat lam khatpeuh mah tawh ka gupkhiat theih nadingin mi khempeuh ading na khempeuh ka suak hi.
1Corinthians9:23 Midangte tawh Lungdamna Thu ka ngah khawm nadingin Lungdamna Thu ading na khempeuh ka bawl hi.
1Corinthians9:24 Tai kidemte khempeuh a tai uh hangin khat bek in pahtawina a ngah hi cih thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih ciangin note in zong pahtawina na ngah theih nadingun na tai un.
1Corinthians9:25 Pawikhamna sungah a kidemte khempeuh in na khempeuh ah a pumpi uh a kham cip thei uh hi. Tuate in a vulgawp thei pahtakna lukhu a ngah nop manun a kidem uh hi. Eite i hih leh
1Corinthians9:26 Tua ahih ciangin ka tai ciangin a mawkna bangin ka tai kei hi. Mi tawh ka kitup ciangin huih tum bangin ka tum kei hi.
1Corinthians9:27 Midangte thu ka hilh khit ciangin hawlkhiatna ka thuak loh nadingin ka pumpi tumin
1Corinthians10:1 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians10:2 a vekpi-un meii leh tuipi sungah Moses’ baptaizna a ngah uh ahi zongin
1Corinthians10:3 a vekpi-un kha an a nekhawm uh ahi zongin
1Corinthians10:4 kha tawh kipawl tui a dawnkhawm uh ahi zongin
1Corinthians10:5 Ahih hangin Pasian in amaute lakah a tampite tungah a lungkim kei a
1Corinthians10:6 Amaute in a hoih lote a deihgawh uh bangin i deihgawh loh nadingin hih thute in eite adingin lim kilahna ahi hi.
1Corinthians10:7 “Mite in an ne
1Corinthians10:8 Tuate in numei leh pasal mawhna bawl uh a
1Corinthians10:9 Tuate kimkhat in Topa a ze-et uh a
1Corinthians10:10 Tuate kimkhat in kihhuaina a bawl uh a
1Corinthians10:11 Tua thu khempeuh in limlahna ahih nadingin tuate tungah a na tung hi. Leitung khang a nunung bela piang eite hong kihilh nadingin a kigelh hi.
1Corinthians10:12 Tua ahih ciangin ka lungkip hi ci-in a ki-um mi in a puk loh nadingin kikem hen.
1Corinthians10:13 Mi in a thuak theih loh ze-etna khat beek na thuak kei uh hi. Pasian in thumanna lungsim tawh kidim ahih ciangin na thuak zawh loh uh ze-etna hong tun’ nadingin thu a pia kei ding hi. Note in na thuak ding uh ze-etna a hong tun’sak ciangin na thuak zawh nadingun suahtak nading lampi zong hong bawlsak ding hi.
1Corinthians10:14 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw
1Corinthians10:15 Lungpil mi kiangah ka gen mah bangin note kiangah kong gen hi. Ka thu na ngaihsun un.
1Corinthians10:16 Eite in hehpihna i phatna thupha’ hai in Khazih’ si tawh kizopna hilo ahi hiam? Eite balnen khomun in Khazih’ pumpi tawh kizopna hilo ahi hiam?
1Corinthians10:17 Khomun pumkhat bek om a
1Corinthians10:18 Ci-le-sa lamsangah Israelte na en ta un. Biakna sa a nete in biakna tau tawh kipawl hilo ahi uh hiam?
1Corinthians10:19 Tua bang ka cihna in bang ka cihnopna ahi hiam? Milim ahi a
1Corinthians10:20 Tua bang ahi kei hi. Gentailte’ biakna in Pasian a biakna uh hi loin
1Corinthians10:21 Topa’ hai leh dawigilote’ hai na dawnkhawm zo kei ding uh hi. Topa’ sabuai leh dawigilote’ sabuai-ah an na nekhawm zo kei ding uh hi.
1Corinthians10:22 Ahih kei leh
1Corinthians10:23 Na khempeuh i bawl theih hangin na khempeuh hih ding a kilawm kei hi. Thu khempeuh i hih theih hangin thu khempeuh in hong kipsak thei kei uh hi.
1Corinthians10:24 Ama noptuamna bek kuamah in zong kei hen; midangte’ noptuamna zong hen.
1Corinthians10:25 Kitheihna lungsim tawh ngaihsunin sumbuka kizuak khempeuh teldot loin na ne un.
1Corinthians10:26 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians10:27 A um lote khat in no hong vaak dingin hong sam a
1Corinthians10:28 Ahi zongin mikhat in
1Corinthians10:29 Kitheihna lungsim ka cihna ah
1Corinthians10:30 Lungdamna kohna tawh hehpihna phatin an ka nek leh
1Corinthians10:31 Tua ahih ciangin note in anneek tuidawn akipan na khempeuh na bawl uh ciangin Pasian’ minthan’ nading ngaihsunin na hih un.
1Corinthians10:32 Midang tampite in gupna a ngah nadingun kei in keima noptuamna zong loin
1Corinthians10:33 mi tampite’ noptuamna zongin
1Corinthians11:1 Kei in Khazih bangin ka gamtat mah bangin note zong kei gamtat bangin na gamta un.
1Corinthians11:2 Note in na khempeuh sung pan kei nong ngaihsut uh a
1Corinthians11:3 Pasalte’ lu un Khazih ahi hi
1Corinthians11:4 Thungen ahi zongin
1Corinthians11:5 Ahih hangin thungen ahi zongin
1Corinthians11:6 Numei in a lu a tuam kei leh
1Corinthians11:7 Pasal in Pasian’ lim leh minthan’na ahih ciangin a lu sit ding a kilawm kei hi. Numei ahih leh
1Corinthians11:8 Pasal in numei pan piang ahi kei hi
1Corinthians11:9 Numei ading pasal piang ahi kei hi
1Corinthians11:10 Tua ahih ciangin vantungmite hangin numei in a lu tungah ukna lim a om nading a kilawm hi.
1Corinthians11:11 Ahih hangin Topa sungah pasal loin numei piang ahi kei hi
1Corinthians11:12 Numei in pasal pan a pian’ mah bangin pasal in zong numei pan piang ahi hi; nate a vekpi-in Pasian pan a piang uh hi.
1Corinthians11:13 Numei in a mai tuam loin Pasian kiangah thungen leh
1Corinthians11:14 Pasal in sam sau a neih leh
1Corinthians11:15 Ahih hangin numei a sam a sau leh
1Corinthians11:16 Ahih hangin mi khat peuhmah in hong nial leh
1Corinthians11:17 Ahih hangin note in hoih zawk nading hi loin
1Corinthians11:18 Amasa bel thu in pawlpi kikhopna-ah na kikhop uh ciangin khat leh khat na kikhen thangna thu uh ka za hi. Ka zak bangin kimkhat hi takpi dingin ka um hi.
1Corinthians11:19 Note lakah miphate a kilat nadingin pawlpi sungah kikhenna a om ding hi.
1Corinthians11:20 Note na kikhop uh ciangin na nek pen uh Topa’ Nitak-an ahi kei hi.
1Corinthians11:21 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians11:22 Na nek nading na dawn nading uh inn nei lo na hi uh hiam? Ahih kei leh Pasian’ pawlpi kikhopna simmawh-in
1Corinthians11:23 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians11:24 hehpihna a phat khit ciangin khomun balnen a
1Corinthians11:25 Tua mah bangin nitak an a nek khit uh ciangin hai zong la a
1Corinthians11:26 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians11:27 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ khomun leh hai a kilawm loin a ne a dawn mi in Topa’ pumpi leh a sisan tungah a mawh ding hi.
1Corinthians11:28 Mi khat in a pumpi a kiteldot khit ciangin khomun ne in
1Corinthians11:29 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians11:30 Tua thu hanginah note lakah thanem leh cidam lo mi tampi a om uh a
1Corinthians11:31 Eite in i pumpi i teldot leh
1Corinthians11:32 Thukhenna i thuak ciangin leitungmite tawh mawhsakna i thuakkhawm loh nadingin Topa’ hilhna a thuak i hi hi.
1Corinthians11:33 Tua ahih ciangin ka ute ka naute aw
1Corinthians11:34 Na kikhopna uh mawhna kikhopna a suah loh nadingin a gilkial mi in ama innah an ne hen. Thu a om laite ka hong tun’ ciangin i vaihawm ding hi.
1Corinthians12:1 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians12:2 Note in Gentailte na hih lai takun
1Corinthians12:3 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian’ Kha Siangtho tawh
1Corinthians12:4 A hong piaksa hehpihna atuam atuam a om hangin a hong pia Kha Siangtho khat bek a om hi.
1Corinthians12:5 Nasepna za atuam atuam a om hangin Topa khat bek a om hi.
1Corinthians12:6 Nasepna atuam atuam a om hangin mi khempeuh tungah na khempeuh a bawl Pasian khat bek a om hi.
1Corinthians12:7 Ahi zongin a hoih a phattuam om nadingin Kha Siangtho’ kilatkhiat nading mikim tungah a pia hi.
1Corinthians12:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians12:9 Tua Kha Siangtho tawh mi khat kiangah thu upna a pia hi. Tua Kha Siangtho tawh mi khat kiangah cina damsak theihna a pia hi.
1Corinthians12:10 Mi khat kiangah nalamdang bawlna thu
1Corinthians12:11 Hih thu khempeuh Kha Siangtho khat bek in bawl a
1Corinthians12:12 Pumpi in khat bek hi-in na tampi nei a
1Corinthians12:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians12:14 Pumpi in na khat bek nei loin
1Corinthians12:15 Khe in
1Corinthians12:16 Bil in zong
1Corinthians12:17 Pumpi khempeuh in mittang ahih leh
1Corinthians12:18 Tu-in ahih leh
1Corinthians12:19 Tuate khempeuh in na khat ahih leh
1Corinthians12:20 Tu-in na tampi a om napi-in pumpi khat bek a om hi.
1Corinthians12:21 Mittang in khut kiangah
1Corinthians12:22 Tua tham loin
1Corinthians12:23 A thupi lo tawh a kibang pumpi nate minthan’na tamzaw i pia thei hi. A kilawmna nei lo nate in kilawmna tamzaw a ngah thei uh hi.
1Corinthians12:24 A kilawmna om nate in kilawmna a sam kei uh hi.
1Corinthians12:25 Pumpi sungah nate khat leh khat kikhen loin
1Corinthians12:26 Tua ahih ciangin na khat in gimna a thuak leh
1Corinthians12:27 Note in Khazih’ pumpi na hi uh hi. Na vekpi-un a nate na hi uh hi.
1Corinthians12:28 Pasian in a masa belin sawltakte
1Corinthians12:29 Mi a om khempeuh in sawltakte ahi uh hiam? A om khempeuh in thuhilhte ahi uh hiam? A om khempeuh in laihilhte ahi uh hiam? A om khempeuh in nalamdang bawl theite ahi uh hiam?
1Corinthians12:30 A om khempeuh in cina damsak theite ahi uh hiam? A om khempeuh in pautuam tampi gen theite ahi uh hiam? A om khempeuh in tua kamte a khiatna gen theite ahi uh hiam?
1Corinthians12:31 Note in Kha Siangtho’ piak thupha a lianbelte na deih un. Tua tham loin lam phazaw kong lak ding hi.
1Corinthians13:1 Keimah in leitungmite’ kam ahi zongin
1Corinthians13:2 Kamsangte’ pilna nei-in
1Corinthians13:3 Mizawngte vaak dingin ka sum khempeuh ka hawmsak tham loin
1Corinthians13:4 Itna in a lungduai thei hi
1Corinthians13:5 a kituak loin a gamta kei hi
1Corinthians13:6 gitlohna thu-ah a lungdam thei kei hi
1Corinthians13:7 na khempeuh a thuak thei hi
1Corinthians13:8 Itna in a mangthang kei ding hi. Kamsangte’ thu a om leh a mangthang ding hi. Pautuam gen theihna a om leh
1Corinthians13:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians13:10 Ahih hangin kicin’na a tun’ ciangin a kicing lote a mangthang ding uh hi.
1Corinthians13:11 Naupang ka hih lai takin naupang bangin thu ka gen hi
1Corinthians13:12 Tu lai takin kimu tel loin limlang sungah i en hi. Tu nung ciangin i maitang a tel takin i mu ding hi. Tu-in a kicing loin ka thei hi. Tu nung ciangin Pasian in kei hong theih bangin ka thei ding hi.
1Corinthians13:13 Tu-in upna
1Corinthians14:1 Itna na delh tham loin Pasian’ Thu hilh nadingin Kha Siangtho hong piak thuphate na deih pha un.
1Corinthians14:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians14:3 Ahi zongin kamsang mi in kipsakna thu
1Corinthians14:4 Kamtuam tawh a gen mi in ama pumpi bek a kipsak hi. Kamsang mi in pawlpi a kipsak hi.
1Corinthians14:5 Note khempeuh in kamtuam tawh gen thei le-uh teh ka deih hi. Ahih hangin kamsang le-uh teh ka deihzaw hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians14:6 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians14:7 Tua mah bangin a aw a ging thei
1Corinthians14:8 Peengkul in zong a man lopi-in a gin’ leh
1Corinthians14:9 Tua mah bangin note in a theih baih ding kam na gen kei uh leh
1Corinthians14:10 Leitungah kam pawl tampi om a
1Corinthians14:11 Tua ahih ciangin kam khiatna ka theih kei leh
1Corinthians14:12 Tua ahih ciangin note in zong Kha Siangtho hong piak thuphate na deih mahmah uh ahih ciangin pawlpi kipsak nading
1Corinthians14:13 Tua ahih ciangin pau namtuam a gen mi in a khiatna zong a gen theih nadingin thu ngen hen.
1Corinthians14:14 Pau namtuam tawh thu ka nget leh
1Corinthians14:15 Tua ahih leh
1Corinthians14:16 Ahih kei leh
1Corinthians14:17 Nang in hehpihna pha takpi-in na phat hangin midang ading kipna a piang kei hi.
1Corinthians14:18 Note khempeuh sangin keimah in pautuam dang gen thei ka hih ciangin Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat hi.
1Corinthians14:19 Ahih hangin pawlpi lakah pautuam dang tawh kam thenkhat ka gen theih sangin midangte hilh thei nadingin kam nga bek lungpilna tawh hilh theih nading ka deihzaw hi.
1Corinthians14:20 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians14:21 Thukham lai sungah: “Pautuam a neite leh mipawl dangte’ kam tawh hih mipawlte ka hilh ding hi. Ahih hangin ka thu a ngai kei ding uh hi
1Corinthians14:22 Tua ahih ciangin pautuam dangte in thu-umte ading lim ahi kei hi
1Corinthians14:23 Tua ahih ciangin pawlpi khempeuh kikhawmin
1Corinthians14:24 Mi khempeuhte in kamsangin a om lai takin a um lo mi ahi zongin
1Corinthians14:25 Tua pa in a lungsim sunga a selsim khempeuh kilang khia-in
1Corinthians14:26 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians14:27 Pau namtuam dang tawh kamsan’na a om leh
1Corinthians14:28 Kamphen a om kei leh
1Corinthians14:29 Kamsangte in nih ahi zongin
1Corinthians14:30 A tu mite’ kiangah na khatpeuh peuh a kilah leh
1Corinthians14:31 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians14:32 Kamsangte’ kha in kamsangte’ ukna nuai-ah a om ding uh hi.
1Corinthians14:33 Pasian in kitotna tawh kipawl Pasian hi loin kilemna tawh kipawl Pasian ahi hi.
1Corinthians14:34 Misiangthote’ pawlpi khempeuh sung panin numeite in pawlpi lakah pau loin om ta uh hen. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
1Corinthians14:35 Numeite in thu khatpeuh peuh a sin nop uh leh
1Corinthians14:36 Pasian’ thu in note pana hong piang ahi hiam? Ahih kei leh
1Corinthians14:37 Mi khat peuhpeuh in kamsang mi ka hi hi ci-in ahi zongin
1Corinthians14:38 A kitheih mawhbawl mi
1Corinthians14:39 Tua ahih ciangin ka ute ka naute aw
1Corinthians14:40 Na khempeuh akilawm akituakin na hih un.
1Corinthians15:1 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians15:2 Tu-ma a
1Corinthians15:3 Ka ngah bangin note kiangah ka hong gen masak thu in: Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin Khazih in eite mawhna taang ding sihna a thuak hi.
1Corinthians15:4 A kivui khit ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin
1Corinthians15:5 Kefas kiangah a kilat khit ciangin sawm-le-nihte kiangah a kilang hi.
1Corinthians15:6 Tua nung ciangin ute naute za nga tham lote kiangah thakhatin a kilang hi. Tuate a tampi in tudong a nungta lai uh hi. Kimkhat a si zo uh hi.
1Corinthians15:7 Tua nung ciangin Jeim kiangah a kilang hi. Tua nung ciangin sawltakte khempeuh kiangah a kilang hi.
1Corinthians15:8 A nunung belin a hun cing lopi-a suak keima kiangah hong kilang hi.
1Corinthians15:9 Keimah in a beisa hunin Pasian’ pawlpite a bawlsiapa ka hih ciangin a neubel sawltak ka hi a
1Corinthians15:10 Ahih hangin Pasian’ hehpihna thupha hangin ka hi bangin ka hi hi. Ka ngahsa hehpihna thupha a mawkna ahi kei hi
1Corinthians15:11 Tua ahih ciangin kei ka hi zongin
1Corinthians15:12 Tu-in Khazih in sihna pan a thawhkikna thu a kihilh ciangin
1Corinthians15:13 Misite’ thawhkikna om lo hi leh
1Corinthians15:14 Khazih thokik lo hi leh
1Corinthians15:15 Tua tham loin
1Corinthians15:16 Misite a thokik lo hi leh
1Corinthians15:17 Khazih a thokik lo hi leh
1Corinthians15:18 Tua tham loin
1Corinthians15:19 Eite in hih leitung nuntakna sung ading bek a
1Corinthians15:20 Tu-in Khazih in misite lakah a gah masabel suak a
1Corinthians15:21 Tua ahih tak ciangin mi khat hangin sihna thu a piang mah bangin misi thawhkikna thu in zong mi khat hangin a piang ahi hi.
1Corinthians15:22 Adam sungah mi khempeuh a sih mah bangin Khazih sungah mi khempeuh a nungta uh hi.
1Corinthians15:23 Ahih hangin mi khempeuh in amau hun bang a zui ciat ding uh hi. Khazih in a gah masa bel ahi hi. Tu nung ciangin Khazih hong pai ciangin ama mite in thawhkikna a ngah ding uh hi.
1Corinthians15:24 Tua ciangin Khazih in ukna aana leh vangliatna apawl pawlte khempeuh siangsakin Pa Pasian tungah Gam a piak khit ciangin leitung a bei ding hi.
1Corinthians15:25 Pasian in galte khempeuh ama khe nuai-ah a khiat khit dong matengin Khazih in a maang ding hi.
1Corinthians15:26 A khakbel a gal ahi sihna mangpa in lelhna a thuak ding hi.
1Corinthians15:27 “Na khempeuh ama khe nuai-ah a khia hi
1Corinthians15:28 Na khempeuh Khazih nuai-ah a khiat khit ciangin na khempeuh ama nuai-ah a khiapa
1Corinthians15:29 Ahih kei leh
1Corinthians15:30 Kote in zong hong tung ding gimna tawh bang hangin kituak niloh ka hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians15:31 Ute naute aw
1Corinthians15:32 Leitung ngeina bangin Efesa khua ah sahangte tawh ka kitot hangin bang lawhtak ka hi hiam? Mi sisate thokik lo ding ahih leh
1Corinthians15:33 Na kikheem kei un
1Corinthians15:34 Note kimkhat in Pasian kitheih mawhbawl na hih uh ciangin kilehkik un
1Corinthians15:35 “Misite bangci-in thokik ding uh ahi hiam? Bang ci pumpi hong suak ding uh hiam?” ci-in mi kimkhat in hong dong uh hi.
1Corinthians15:36 Lungpil lo mi aw
1Corinthians15:37 Khaici na tuh uh ciangin a nung ciangin a hong piang ding a kungpi pen a tuhpah na hi kei uh hi. Mangbuh ahi zongin
1Corinthians15:38 Pasian in a deih bangin tua tang kung a pia hi; khaici a vekpi-in amau pawl bangin kung a pia ciat hi.
1Corinthians15:39 Sa khempeuh nam khat bek ahi kei hi. Mihing’ sa namkhat
1Corinthians15:40 Vantung pumpite a om uh hi
1Corinthians15:41 Ni a vangliatna a om hi
1Corinthians15:42 Tua mah bangin misite a thawhkikna thu ahi hi. Pumpi a kituh ciangin muat theihna a om hi. A thawhkik ciangin muat theih lohna a om hi.
1Corinthians15:43 A kituh ciangin maizum theihna a om hi
1Corinthians15:44 A kituh ciangin leitung pumpi ahi hi. A thawhkik ciangin kha pumpi ahi hi. Leitung pumpi a om leh
1Corinthians15:45 Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin
1Corinthians15:46 Ahih hangin kha pumpi a piang masa hi lo hi. Leitung pumpi a piang masa hi. A nung ciangin kha pumpi a piang hi.
1Corinthians15:47 A masa bel mi in lei pan hong piang ahih ciangin leitung mi ahi hi. A nihna mi in vantung pan a hong piang hi.
1Corinthians15:48 Leitung mite in leitungmite tawh kibang hi. Vantungmite in vantungmite tawh a kibang hi.

Ephesians1:2 I Pa Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih kiang pan hehpihna thupha leh nopna note tungah om ta hen.
Ephesians1:3 Eite in Pasian mai-ah itna sungah siangthoin
Ephesians1:4

Philippians4:21 Khazih Zeisu sungah a om misiangthote khempeuh na hopihsak un. Kei tawh a omkhawm ute naute-a kipan misiangthote in note hong hopih uh hi.

Philippians4:23 Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thupha in note lungsim kha tawh omkhawm ta hen. Amen.
Colossians1:1 Pasian’ deihna hangin Khazih Zeisu’ sawltak keimah leh i sangampa Timoti in Kolose khua-ah a om Khazih sungah misiangthote leh a thuman ute naute kiangah thu ka hong zasak uh hi. I Pa Pasian kiang panin hehpihna thupha leh nopna in note tungah om ta hen.
Colossians1:2 
Colossians1:3 Khazih Zeisu sungah na upna uh leh misiangthote ading na itna uh thu ka zakna uh ahi zongin
Colossians1:4 
Colossians1:5 
Colossians1:6 Tua thu in leitung khempeuh ah a kizelh khit mah bangin
Colossians1:7 Kote ading Khazih’ nasem muanhuai
Colossians1:8 Amah in Kha Siangtho sungah a om note’ ki-itna zong kote kiangah hong gen zo hi.
Colossians1:9 Tua ahih ciangin kote in zong ka zak uh ni pan akipan
Colossians1:10 Ka thungetna un: note in gamtat hoihna apawlpawl ahi gah gahin
Colossians1:11 thahatna tawh dimin ahi zongin Topa tawh a kilawmin gamta-in
Colossians1:12 Khuavakna sungah a om misiangthote’ luahna
Colossians1:13 
Colossians1:14 Tua a Tapa’ sisan hangin i mawhnate maisakna ahi hong tatkhiatna thupha i ngah hi.

Colossians3:15 Note lungsim sung uhah Khazih’ nopna na uksak un. Tua bang deihna-in note in pum khat bek sungah hong sapna a ngah na hi uh hi. Hehpihna phatna lungsim na nei un.

Colossians4:4

Colossians4:6 Mi khempeuh tungah bang ci dawn’ kik ding cih na theih nadingun
Colossians4:7 Topa sungah dikna nei-in nasem khawm sila ka hihpih
Colossians4:8 Note in kote thu na theih nading uh leh amah in note lungsim hong hehnep theih nadingin
Colossians4:9 
Colossians4:10 Kei tawh thong a kia khawm mi Aristarkhas akipan Barnabas’ nau Marka leh Justas a kici Zeisu te in note a hong hopih uh hi. Marka thu tawh kipawl note kiangah ka hong khak zo hi. Amah note kiangah a hong tun’ ciangin dawnin na tungsak un.
Colossians4:11 Vunatna a thuak mite lakah hih mite bek Pasian’ Gam ading ka naseppihte ahi uh a
Colossians4:12 Note lakah a piang Khazih Zeisu’ sila Epafras in note hong hopih hi. Note kicingin Pasian’ deihna khempeuh ah lunghihmawhna om loin na lungkim nadingun
Colossians4:13 Note-a kipan Laodikia khua leh Hierapolis khua ah a om mite adingin nakpi-in a hahkatna thu keimah in amah ading teci ka pang hi.
Colossians4:14 Itna a ngah zato mangpa Luka leh Demas in note hong hopih uh hi.
Colossians4:15 Laodikia khua-ah a om ute naute a hi zongin
Colossians4:16 Hih lai na sim khit uh ciangin Laodikia khua-ah a om pawlpite zong na simsak un. Laodikia khua pan a kingah ding lai zong na sim un.
Colossians4:17 Arkhippas kiangah zong
Colossians4:18 Kei Paul in ka khut tawh note hopihna hih lai kong gelh hi. Kei’ thuak kikhihna na ngaihsun un. Note tungah hehpihna thupha om ta hen.

1Timothy1:2 Upna sungah ka ta taktak ahi Timoti kiangah kong zasak hi. Pa Pasian leh Khazih Zeisu i Topa’ hehpihna thupha
1Timothy1:3 Thu hilhna tuamdang hilh lo ding ci-in ahi zongin
1Timothy1:4

Hebrews5:14 Ahih hangin an tak in a sia a pha khen theihna pilna a nei

Hebrews11:6 Upna loin Pasian kilungdamsak zo lo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
Hebrews11:7 Noah in a muh nai loh thute-ah thupiakkholhna a ngah khit ciangin upna tawh Pasian kihta-in ama innkuanpihte gum dingin teembaw a lam hi. Tua upna hangin amah in leitung mite mawhna thu khenin a upna tawh kipawl dikkisakna a luah hi.

Hebrews13:1 Ute naute ki-itna kip ta hen.
Hebrews13:2 Zinte do nading na mangngilh kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
Hebrews13:3 Khau khihna a thuak mi tawh kikhih khawm bangin kingaihsun un: pumpi tawh kipelh lo na hih uh ciangin bawlsiatna a thuakte na ngaihsun un.
Hebrews13:4 Mi khempeuh lakah kiteen’na kithupisim ta hen. Pasalte leh zite in khat leh khat a thuman ciat ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
Hebrews13:5 Sumduh luatna tawh na kipelh un. Na neihsa zah uh sum tawh lungkim un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
Hebrews13:6 Tua ahih ciangin: “Topa in kei hong huhpa hi a

Hebrews13:9 A tuam dangdang

Hebrews13:11 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh

Hebrews13:13 Tua ahih ciangin eite in Topa tawh kosiatna thuakin giahbuk pualam ama kiangah nai ni.
Hebrews13:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
Hebrews13:15 Tua ahih ciangin tua Topa hangin eite in ama min i man’ muk’ gah ahi
Hebrews13:16 Thupha bawlna
Hebrews13:17 No hong uk mite’ thu ngai un la
Hebrews13:18 Kote ading thu hong ngetsak un. Bang hang na cih uh leh
Hebrews13:19 Keimah in note kiangah a manlang zaw-a kong paikik theih nadingin
Hebrews13:20 A tawntung kiciamna sisan hangin Tuucing lianpa ahi
Hebrews13:21 ama deihna thu Zeisu Khazih hangin eite sungah hong bawlna
Hebrews13:22 Ute naute aw
Hebrews13:23 I sanggampa Timoti a kikhah khitna thu na thei un. Amah in a sawt loin hong tung leh
Hebrews13:24 Note hong uk mite khempeuh leh misiangthote khempeuh na hopih un. Itali mite in note hong hopih uh hi.
Hebrews13:25 Note khempeuh tungah hehpihna thupha om ta hen. Amen.
James1:1 Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih’ sila ahi keimah Jeim in mun khempeuh ah kikhen thangin a om
James1:2 Ka u ka naute aw
James1:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
James1:4 Note in a neu kha beek kisam loin na kicin’ nadingun
James1:5 Note lakah khatpeuh peuh in lungpilna a deih leh
James1:6 Ahih hangin um khial loin upna tawh ngen ta hen. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
James1:7 Tua bang mi in lungka mi
James1:8 
James1:9 Mi kiniamsak sanggamte in a ngah a san’ na uhah kilungdamsak thei ta uh hen.
James1:10 Sumhau sanggam in kiniamsakna a thuakna ah kilungdamsak thei ta hen. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
James1:11 Ni in a satna tawh hong suah ciangin lopa kung in keugaw a
James1:12 Ze-etna a thuak zo mi in thupha a ngah ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
James1:13 Mi khat in ze-etna a thuak ciangin
James1:14 Ama lunggulhna in kai a
James1:15 Tua nung ciangin lunggulhna in gai-in mawhna a suak hi; mawhna in zong a kicin’ ciangin sihna a suak hi.
James1:16 Ka it ka ute ka naute aw
James1:17 A pha a kicing hong piak thupha a om khempeuh in khuavakna’ Pa kiang vantung panin hong pai uh hi. Tua pa in kikheel lo tham loin
James1:18 Ama pian’ sakte lakah eite in a gah masa bel i suah nadingin thuman thutak tawh ama deihna bangin eite hong piangsak hi.
James1:19 Ka it ka u ka naute aw
James1:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
James1:21 Tua ahih ciangin a kihhuai na khempeuh leh hazat luatna lungsimte paaikhia-in
James1:22 Note’ pumpi uh kikheemin thungaite bek hi kei un; thu banga gamtate na hi un.
James1:23 Mi khat in thu zui lo-a a ngaih bek leh
James1:24 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
James1:25 Suahtakna tawh kizom a kicing thukham lim takin entel a
James1:26 Mi khat in
James1:27 I Pa Pasian mai-ah a nin lo

James3:4 Ngai un

James4:1 Note lakah galdona leh kitotna koi pan hong piang ahi hiam? Note’ pumpi sung uhah a om nate lakah gal a bawl thei na deihgawhnate uh pan piang hilo ahi hiam?
James4:2 Note in na deihgawh uh hangin na ngah kei uh hi
James4:3 Thu na nget uh hangin na deihgawh nopsakna hoih lote na ngah nadingun ngen khial na hih ciangun na ngah kei uh hi.

James4:13 “Tu-ni ahi zongin

Revelation21:10 Kha Siangtho tawh kei a sang mual lian dawnah hong paipih a
Revelation21:11 Tua khuapi a taan’na a vang in kristal bangin jasper suangmanpha bangin a om hi.
Revelation21:12 Tua khuapi kimah a lian a sang khua kulh
Revelation21:13 Khuapi ni suahna lamah kong vang thum
Revelation21:14 Khuapi kulh nuai-ah a nuaiphah sawm leh nih om a
Revelation21:15 Kei tawh kiho mi in khuapi tawh
Revelation21:16 Tua khuapi in kiu li nei-in om a
Revelation21:17 Khuapi kulh a teh ciangin mi’ tong tawh kibang vantungmi’ tong za leh sawmli leh li a pha hi.
Revelation21:18 Tua khuapi kulh pen jasper suangmanpha tawh kibawl hi. Khuapi in a siangtho limlang tawh kibang kham taktak ahi hi.
Revelation21:19 Khuapi kulh nuaiphahte suangmanpha a pawlpawl tawh kizeem hi. A masa bel nuaiphah in jasper suangmanpha
Revelation21:20 ngana in sardonik suangmanpha
Revelation21:21 Khuapi kong khak sawm leh nih in
Revelation21:22 Tua khuapi sungah biakinnpi ka mu kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh
Revelation21:23 Ni tan’na
Revelation21:24 Mipawl pawl khempeuh in tua khuavak tawh lam pai-in leitung kumpite in tua khuapi sungah amaute vangliatna pua-in a tung uh hi.
Revelation21:25 Tua san takah zan om lo hi. Sun lai takin kongkhak kikhak ngei lo hi.
Revelation21:26 Mipawl pawl khempeuh in a vangliatna leh phatna tua khuapi sungah a paipih ding uh hi.
Revelation21:27 A kihhuainate-a kipan muhdahhuai
Revelation22:1 Tua nung ciangin vantungmi in kei kiangah kristal suangmanpha tawh kibangin tangin
Revelation22:2 Tua gun lang tuakah nuntakna sing kung khat om a
Revelation22:3 Hamsiatna cikmah hunin omkik lo ding hi. Pasian leh Tuuno’ silate in Topa bia-in
Revelation22:4 a maitang a mu ding uh hi. A min zong amaute taltang tung uhah a om ding hi.
Revelation22:5 A nung ciangin zan om nawn lo ding hi. Amaute in meivakna ahi zongin
Revelation22:6 Tua lai takin vantungmi in
